body:
We’ll be frank – we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2025. Becoming an official member is the best step you can take to help build a better future in the states. | | |
---
| |
---|---
We can’t believe it: over 4,000 Democrats have already renewed their Official 2025 DLCC Membership! That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. But we’ll be frank, we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2025 yet. Does this look right? | **2025 DLCC MEMBERSHIP SUPPORTER RECORD**

Becoming an official member of this grassroots movement to elect state Democrats is the _best_ step you can take to help build a better future in the states.

Becoming an official member is the best step you can take to help build a better future in the states. | | | | | ---|--- We can’t believe it: over 4,000 Democrats have already renewed their Official 2025 DLCC Membership! That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. But we’ll be frank, we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2025 yet. name: Steve Daines
subject: Getting back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. |
---

Peter,

I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=77ee125f6faa4377900758855b43ffb8&_e=rysVv-BU3YWSdsy09L973vhT_tf2bIEWI1rPAa7dfISiK79DUdXEjUUB5FcJDC_w02MhIcWhJAf6VylTQNiphHFVYx9J260yScVjzvAl30g5UhFoWWiCdMf5f9MWiSzxcHmwM9wHyi_B3rQp-uhlYDWqCG3_3rQk_M2E7ify6sZPcyW726gMAx0izI5Lz9TgloBIoWbQWz2n4t9ohMxQ7nA1ygLTKZJQRdZEDCo-3S6JMmEobRwwDJkIyxe6_S6CfhDIHoZKYSyA4RuEoWhBVrKbfiaK0PzVTHnZJdzNA8OLv4JKekEes4OQiUG-Vt819RbUjGHrnp-WQ6VNxk1irBX5i-w45TrscHxPY9RJMaK9XV4K11SKM6nT3PspDms4mS2BDbCcJ8BdH32yritHx8i6fXiGuXZrdP7K40k2_YRgFYdEGx5N5PKPbThoigD2yBGfhyEJSZvNZLAbIXhhjdYcqonb8xbHVnr5v500m4mtclGTt1ioYCeYmJsTbiGpTGZzKMK2y8XHDVypFD5vATAlAB2hPXSuYTRDg6cxZsJQagceznJrw4UGzB5hQ0NB3oDIWl5uWchb37vnAeD_LQ%3D%3D)
Now, I’m back in D.C., ready to resume my work for the American people. And Peter, we have A LOT of work to do. Democrat control in Washington left our new Republican Senate Majority a monumental mess to clean up, from the economy to the crisis at our Southern Border.

We need to hear from Americans like you to help us prioritize the work we need to accomplish. [**That’s why you were hand-chosen to answer our 2025 American Priorities Survey.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=77ee125f6faa4377900758855b43ffb8&_e=rysVv-BU3YWSdsy09L973vhT_tf2bIEWI1rPAa7dfISiK79DUdXEjUUB5FcJDC_w02MhIcWhJAf6VylTQNiphHFVYx9J260yScVjzvAl30g5UhFoWWiCdMf5f9MWiSzxcHmwM9wHyi_B3rQp-uhlYDWqCG3_3rQk_M2E7ify6sZPcyW726gMAx0izI5Lz9TgloBIoWbQWz2n4t9ohMxQ7nA1ygLTKZJQRdZEDCo-3S6JMmEobRwwDJkIyxe6_S6CfhDIHoZKYSyA4RuEoWhBVrKbfiaK0PzVTHnZJdzNA8OLv4JKekEes4OQiUG-Vt819RbUjGHrnp-WQ6VNxk1irBX5i-w45TrscHxPY9RJMaK9XV4K11SKM6nT3PspDms4mS2BDbCcJ8BdH32yritHx8i6fXiGuXZrdP7K40k2_YRgFYdEGx5N5PKPbThoigD2CeCQm3n5Ks5Px_C15bGvZNA81NedxSd69SAo4inFpJwYVQsyVy6VowD7AIRKuRDS4jQgV9cjmtyJ3W3r5Av23GBFvEoW1LiVFLOb8tznuXsq_lwv8hgVcOIrTWbLziIkUvyvbffAbGUtnaiP0G5UIg%3D%3D)

[**Please take a minute to respond to our exclusive one-question survey, telling us what you want to see accomplished first as we work to undo the damage left by Joe Biden and the Democrats.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=77ee125f6faa4377900758855b43ffb8&_e=rysVv-BU3YWSdsy09L973vhT_tf2bIEWI1rPAa7dfISiK79DUdXEjUUB5FcJDC_w02MhIcWhJAf6VylTQNiphHFVYx9J260yScVjzvAl30g5UhFoWWiCdMf5f9MWiSzxcHmwM9wHyi_B3rQp-uhlYDWqCG3_3rQk_M2E7ify6sZPcyW726gMAx0izI5Lz9TgloBIoWbQWz2n4t9ohMxQ7nA1ygLTKZJQRdZEDCo-3S6JMmEobRwwDJkIyxe6_S6CfhDIHoZKYSyA4RuEoWhBVrKbfiaK0PzVTHnZJdzNA8OLv4JKekEes4OQiUG-Vt819RbUjGHrnp-WQ6VNxk1irBX5i-w45TrscHxPY9RJMaK9XV4K11SKM6nT3PspDms4mS2BDbCcJ8BdH32yritHx8i6fXiGuXZrdP7K40k2_YRgFYdEGx5N5PKPbThoigD2DhPQCqhbvmGHwIA0DN-C2lrJ6szlhQTzQhJVPY4ZFzolMaME_Eh3y1LxocQWoVPiF9hKE0OP6SAfVayOEyExpXR-t4_1oMWP-zYjbEJpCA04NmXMckj_Kp6M2kz1idsVYrajW6Is9my8Lwqgwb7LnQ%3D%3D)

Making sure we’re on the same page before our Republican Majority is sworn in will guarantee we start 2025 from a position of strength and signal to Democrats their obstructionist tactics won’t work.

[**I hope I can count on your advice as soon as possible.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=77ee125f6faa4377900758855b43ffb8&_e=rysVv-BU3YWSdsy09L973vhT_tf2bIEWI1rPAa7dfISiK79DUdXEjUUB5FcJDC_w02MhIcWhJAf6VylTQNiphHFVYx9J260yScVjzvAl30g5UhFoWWiCdMf5f9MWiSzxcHmwM9wHyi_B3rQp-uhlYDWqCG3_3rQk_M2E7ify6sZPcyW726gMAx0izI5Lz9TgloBIoWbQWz2n4t9ohMxQ7nA1ygLTKZJQRdZEDCo-3S6JMmEobRwwDJkIyxe6_S6CfhDIHoZKYSyA4RuEoWhBVrKbfiaK0PzVTHnZJdzNA8OLv4JKekEes4OQiUG-Vt819RbUjGHrnp-WQ6VNxk1irBX5i-w45TrscHxPY9RJMaK9XV4K11SKM6nT3PspDms4mS2BDbCcJ8BdH32yritHx8i6fXiGuXZrdP7K40k2_YRgFYdEGx5N5PKPbThoigD2v5qLnKyHoHDeQMV6IvWjiv0vUUxxj2IvBJWZHUYi5eoCgOMb0xNx0owpn19J3eEi6Z4zFdg_4PkvdEHALQAXHaUbhMtz4Ysb6pnQuCr_DokrJC0AlzeL59bQPstB3pU3ODS0_sfVzxmGuNyr5BZG4w%3D%3D)

clean_body: I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. | Peter, I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. Now, I’m back in D.C., ready to resume my work for the American people. And Peter, we have A LOT of work to do. Democrat control in Washington left our new Republican Senate Majority a monumental mess to clean up, from the economy to the crisis at our Southern Border. We need to hear from Americans like you to help us prioritize the work we need to accomplish. Making sure we’re on the same page before our Republican Majority is sworn in will guarantee we start 2025 from a position of strength and signal to Democrats their obstructionist tactics won’t work. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: the privilege to serve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
“May the works I have done speak for me.”
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100129423/521865446/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGM2OWFhZi1lOGNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmJzXaEctOBeAo8TyCRCxmy9-YwkG4zeIgHxPbogqzQ=&emci=5452557a-e7ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=78c69aaf-e8ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek –
As I write this, I’m journeying home by train to Pennsylvania after being in Washington for the last seven days. I left my family early on Friday, Jan. 3, to travel down to be sworn in as part of the 119th Congress. Why is it called the 119th Congress? Because the first Congress happened 236 years ago, and each Congress lasts for two years, so ... history and math. On Jan. 3, 2027, the 120th Congress will begin. You get the idea. This 119th Congress will be when we celebrate this nation’s 250th birthday.
The U.S. Constitution has a lot to say about the peaceful transfer of power and mandates that Jan. 3 be “swearing-in day.” It also mandates that on Jan. 6, every four years, members of the new Congress convene to certify the results of the most recent presidential election. Because of the importance of Monday, Jan. 6, and because of the coming snowstorm that ended up shutting down much of the East Coast, many of my colleagues and I stayed in Washington over the weekend to make sure we didn’t get stranded elsewhere and could be present on Jan. 6.
**Jan. 3 was a good day.** I’m grateful to my community for reelecting me and I am optimistic that my team and I will continue to make progress on things such as paid family leave and quality of life improvements for service members and their families. Once again, I was proud to vote for my friend and colleague, Rep. Hakeem Jeffries, for Speaker of the House. I think 2027 will be his year?
If you followed the speaker vote, you know that Rep. Mike Johnson didn’t have an easy time securing the speakership – this says a lot about the power of the most extreme members of the Republican Party. It’s likely going to be a rocky, difficult two years.
**In contrast, Jan. 6 was a hard day.** Memories of being barricaded in my office four years ago ... walking through metal fencing and heavily armed law enforcement that rioters four years ago made necessary ... anger watching many Republicans in Congress pretend it didn’t happen, that it was a “day of love” ... and finally watching Vice President Harris – a woman we all worked so hard to elect, who would have (and maybe someday still will) represented our nation’s values immeasurably better than Donald Trump will – graciously preside over the certification of the results of the election ... It was a hard day for many of us.
This week, in my first vote of the new Congress, I also voted against a bill – the Laken Riley Act – that has become highly politicized, with understandably compelling talking points. But what most people don’t know or perhaps may choose to ignore is that, as written, this bill would erase the well-established constitutional protections of due process. **As an Air Force veteran and now as a U.S. representative, I have taken many oaths “to support and defend the Constitution.” I take that oath seriously, so my first vote in the 119th Congress was certainly going to be in protection of the Constitution, as will be each of my subsequent votes.**
Lastly, this week, I had the opportunity and privilege to attend a memorial service for President Jimmy Carter, a smart and decent man who made our nation better. I was most struck by a particularly poignant quote in the service that reflected on his life: “May the works I have done speak for me.” His life of public service, his pursuit of civility and decency, and his compassion for those who are struggling are themes that I carry with me. I hope you do, too.
Thank you for the privilege to serve. Thank you for allowing me to share these early reflections. And thank you for being on this journey with me. 😊
There is work to be done.
Chrissy

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Mark Zuckerberg, Jeff Bezos, Elon Musk, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Here’s what we’ve seen in just the past week:

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0)
---
Do you hear that? It’s the sound of billionaire CEOs falling over themselves as they race to kiss up to Donald Trump. Just in the past week, Mark Zuckerberg announced that Meta would no longer fact-check content on its platforms — a win for leaders who prefer to share “alternate facts.” We found out that Apple CEO Tim Cook will donate $1 million to Trump’s inauguration committee — joining a pile of gifts that already includes $1 million donations from Meta and Amazon. And Jeff Bezos’ _Washington Post_ refused to publish a political cartoon that showed this whole phenomenon in action: Bezos and other Big Tech leaders bending the knee to Trump. (Also, remember how he blocked the Post from endorsing Kamala Harris last fall?) Clearly, these billionaire CEOs are trying to curry favor with Donald Trump — so they can make _our_ government work great for _their_ giant corporations and _their_ giant pocketbooks. [**But if you believe we need Washington to work not just for the billionaires but for all working people, can you make a donation of $28 or any amount to power our grassroots movement for reform?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2892?amount=28&t=8&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2892?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2892?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2892?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2892?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2892?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2892?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0)
---

---
Look: Donald Trump made big promises on the campaign trail about fighting for working people, like making groceries less expensive. It’s important to note that once he got elected he then started saying it will actually be “hard” to bring down grocery prices. Now, we’re seeing a government of the billionaires, by the billionaires, and for the billionaires. He’s nominated billionaires to lead the Departments of the Treasury, Commerce, Education, and the Interior. And the Small Business Administration. And NASA. Not to mention the unofficial co-president, Elon Musk, and the billionaire co-head of his Department of Government Efficiency. And Republicans in Congress are advancing an agenda to hand even more tax breaks to — you guessed it — billionaires and their billionaire corporations. They want to make it possible for Bezos to once again (and again, and again) pay a lower tax rate than a public school teacher. And their tax plan would give Apple an extra $2.7 billion in handouts. (Really puts Tim Cook’s $1 _million_ personal donation into perspective.) Instead of passing those giveaways and sweetheart deals, how about we invest in working families? How about we fund universal child care, paid leave, and early education? How about we put our government on the side of working people? I’m in those fights all the way. In the U.S. Senate, I’ll keep laying out plans for the changes that families need, I’ll keep standing up to Republican attempts to reward the rich, and I’ll keep being grateful to have your support — you make this work possible. [**If it makes sense for you right now, please make a donation to help fund our fight against Trump and his billionaire buddies who are trying to rig the rules even further in their favor.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2892?t=14&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2892?t=12&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=2445%2E4032634%2E909Xq0)
---|---|---|---
| Paid for by Warren for Senate

PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

---

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: We can break through
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Jamie Raskin, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren -- with more and more powerful voices throwing their weight behind abolishing the Electoral College, we are on the verge of a breakthrough!
We deserve a popular vote system in this country to protect our democracy and our rights, from voting to choice and more. RUSH $5, $15, $25 or whatever you can to help ditch the Electoral College forever >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=010925_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010925_2&amount=25]
MSNBC: Jamie Raskin thinks the Electoral College threatens democracy. He's right. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=010925_2&amount=35]
Congressman Jamie Raskin knows the score, friend. Here's what he had to say:
“ I think that the Electoral College now, which has given us five popular vote losers as president in our history, twice in this century alone, has become a danger not just to democracy, but to the American people . It was a danger on January 6th, 2021. There are so many curving byways and nooks and crannies in the Electoral College that there are opportunities for a lot of strategic mischief. ”
The Electoral College isn’t just a vestige of the past; it is a ticking time bomb for exploitation in our democratic system. Congressman Raskin knows this, which is why he wanted the Jan. 6th Committee to propose getting rid of it. They didn't all agree, so it didn't make their list of final recommendations to Congress.
We know the vote suppressors will do anything in order to win. We have to remove this danger once and for all -- chip in $5, $15, $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=010925_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=010925_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=010925_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=010925_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=010925_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=010925_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=010925_2&amount=35]
We don’t have to wait for Congress to act, either. The National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) is an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia.
16 states plus DC have already joined, accounting for 206 electoral votes and 76% of the states needed to essentially make the popular vote the law of the land. Maine is also moving a bill through their state legislature to join.
Whether it's the NPVIC or something else, the Electoral College needs to go.
Help us end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=010925_2&amount=25]
Thanks,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010925_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010925_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010925_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010925_2&amount=25]

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. # [#]
Peter, it’s officially 2025 which means we can expect cabinet confirmation hearings for Trump’s WILD nominations to begin any day now . Here at TOP PAC, we’ve been keeping a close eye on Trump nominations so in case you missed it, here are a few of his picks:

❌ Dr. Mehmet Oz for Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services
❌ Elon Musk + Vivek Ramaswamy for Department of Government Efficiency
❌ Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for Department of Health and Human Services
❌ Pete Hegseth for Secretary of Defense

Trump is appointing unqualified “celebrities” to some of the highest offices in the land, but then again — Trump himself is an erratic, unqualified celebrity!

Trump will only continue to nominate the most unqualified and inexperienced picks for his cabinet. Look, we think these picks are AWFUL, but we need to know if our top supporters feel the same.

We think these picks are AWFUL, but we need to know if our top supporters feel the same. Your response to our one-minute survey is needed before midnight tonight: Do you support or oppose Trump’s current cabinet nominations? [https://secure.everyaction.com/8q1zlH6IdUuqPS8iQmuq3A2]

Thank you for your response!

name: =?utf-8?b?VGhhbmsgeW91LCBKb2UgQmlkZW4hIOKcie+4jyAodmlhIFZQUCk=?=
subject: Limited Spots Left to Sign >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Add your name to our exclusive card to President Biden!
| Folks, in the final days of President Biden’s historic presidency, we’re sending him a card to thank him for his service over the past 4 years...

[**We have just 142 spots left for top Democrats. Sign on NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85957?t=6&akid=18408%2E878179%2EBHjNZX) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85957?t=7&akid=18408%2E878179%2EBHjNZX) | [142 SPOTS LEFT: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85957?t=8&akid=18408%2E878179%2EBHjNZX)
---
Dear President Biden,

I have one thing to say to you: **Thank you.**

You have accomplished so much, and saved our country from the nightmare that Donald Trump left behind.

I remember how excited I was when you won in 2020.

I have had your back since you became President, and I am so proud of everything you've done for working families in our country.

✅ You capped prices on prescription drugs.

✅ You protected good-paying union jobs.

✅ You passed historic legislation addressing climate change.

✅ You have done everything in your power to strengthen our Democracy.

I have zero doubt in my mind: **You will go down as a truly GREAT American President.**

**I truly thank you for putting the country and our Democracy first — _that is something that Trump and the Republicans will NEVER do._**

[**I'm signing this letter and sending a small donation of $3 with VPP now to show that I'm still fighting — for our country and for your legacy, Mr. President. With a MAGA trifecta, it's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together. I’m chipping in $3 to do my part. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85957?t=9&akid=18408%2E878179%2EBHjNZX) | [142 SPOTS LEFT: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85957?t=10&akid=18408%2E878179%2EBHjNZX)

clean_body: Abigail is running for Governor because she understands the challenges facing families across the Commonwealth—and she has a bold, inclusive vision for what we can achieve together. But she can’t do it alone. | = | Peter, As we close in on the first 10 days of 2025, all eyes are on Virginia. The Governor’s race is heating up, and it will be the first big test for both Democrats and Republicans as we look toward the future. Abigail knows this moment requires leadership that puts Virginians first—leadership that focuses on the issues that truly matter: ✅ Strong Schools ✅ Safe Communities ✅ More Opportunities for Our Kids | = Abigail is running for Governor because she understands the challenges facing families across the Commonwealth—and she has a bold, inclusive vision for what we can achieve together. But she can’t do it alone. Your support will be the difference in making sure Abigail has the resources to communicate her vision and push back against the national Republicans and special interest groups that want to take Virginia in the wrong direction. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Spanberger for Governor HQ * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. name: Post-Campaign Transitional Team
subject: From Campaign to Movement: Organizing for Long-Term Truth, Justice, and LOVE!
body:
Discover how you can help shape the future of justice by joining our mission to uplift and empower communities nationwide.

| | |
---
Dear Peter, From the beginning of this historic campaign, we have been guided by an unwavering commitment to the pursuit of justice. Brother West has always been clear: our work extends far beyond elections. It is a Movement rooted in Truth, Justice, and Love. As we transition to the next phase, the WEST/ABDULLAH 2024 Transitional team has worked diligently with legal experts to chart a clear path forward for the Justice For All movement. I am honored to invite you to an important gathering where we’ll share our vision and next steps:

Cutting wasteful government spending and slimming down our bloated federal government is no small task, but it’s what we were elected to do.
Complete the DOGE survey today
|
---
| | | **Waste

Fraud

Inefficiency**

Friend, our House Majority was elected on the back of our beliefs in creating a small government that works for the people of this great country.

Cutting wasteful government spending and slimming down our bloated federal government is no small task, _but it 's what we were elected to do._

name: California Dems
subject: We stand ready to support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
re: these devastating fires |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100130832/521896965/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjE0YzFhNy1mN2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ewNdFb4tCgZpuAqlSuDa5TPSUPUQS_O-cqb_PM9Hf18=)
---
| Dear friends, Our hearts go out to all those affected by the devastating wildfires raging across our state. The safety of our communities is our top priority, and we urge everyone in the affected areas to heed evacuation orders and take every precaution to protect themselves and their loved ones. We commend the bravery and dedication of California’s firefighters and first responders who are risking their lives to protect our neighborhoods. The California Democratic Party stands ready to support those affected and to continue advocating for the necessary climate action to mitigate the underlying cause of these escalating climate disasters. Our thoughts are with everyone in harm’s way. **If you are safe and able, we are working to raise money for on-the-ground organizations that are delivering relief to impacted Californians.** **[By clicking here, you can split a donation between The Los Angeles Fire Department Foundation, United Way of Greater Los Angeles, and the Los Angeles Regional Food Bank. clean_body: re: these devastating fires | = | Dear friends, Our hearts go out to all those affected by the devastating wildfires raging across our state. The safety of our communities is our top priority, and we urge everyone in the affected areas to heed evacuation orders and take every precaution to protect themselves and their loved ones. We commend the bravery and dedication of California’s firefighters and first responders who are risking their lives to protect our neighborhoods. The California Democratic Party stands ready to support those affected and to continue advocating for the necessary climate action to mitigate the underlying cause of these escalating climate disasters. Our thoughts are with everyone in harm’s way. If you are safe and able, we are working to raise money for on-the-ground organizations that are delivering relief to impacted Californians. = = Please stay safe and know that we will stand with you in these difficult times. body:
#
We wanted to be sure we shared this good news with you from earlier this week:
Alexandria has been pushing non-stop for President Biden to take action to protect our planet.
The movement for our climate is beginning to crack the grip of fossil fuels on our politics. And it was only possible because of the steadfast support of folks like you.
Alexandria can’t do this work alone. She needs a movement alongside her.
[ Will you donate $5 right now to power our fights? With a Republican Speaker elected, and Trump returning to the White House in just 11 days, we need to be ready to fight for racial, social, environmental, and economic justice like never before.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250109.gorvf9&refcode=em20250109-7881-P_FND_CTR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7881%2E2526796%2E2A_kJ9)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250109.gorvf9&refcode=em20250109-7881-P_FND_CTR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7881%2E2526796%2E2A_kJ9)**
Whether or not you can give today, **thank you so much for being a part of this movement.**
In solidarity,
Team AOC

clean_body: We wanted to be sure we shared this good news with you from earlier this week: Alexandria has been pushing non-stop for President Biden to take action to protect our planet. The movement for our climate is beginning to crack the grip of fossil fuels on our politics. And it was only possible because of the steadfast support of folks like you. Alexandria can’t do this work alone. She needs a movement alongside her. Whether or not you can give today, thank you so much for being a part of this movement. In solidarity, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Young Democrats of America
subject: NEW: Young Democrats of America Urge Senate Democrats to Reject“Laken Riley Act”
body:
For inquiries contact: comms@yda.org | |
---
|
---
**NEW: Young Democrats of America Urge Senate Democrats to Reject “Laken Riley Act”**
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **January 9, 2025**
**Contact: Kait Ahern — communications@yda.org**
---
**WASHINGTON, D.C.** —Today, the Young Democrats of America are calling on the Senate Democratic Caucus to reject the passage of the Senate version of H.R. 7511 (S.5), also known as the “Laken Riley Act”. This follows the invocation of cloture on the measure by several Democratic senators, including John Fetterman (D-PA), Ruben Gallego (D-AZ), Gary Peters (D-MI), and Elissa Slotkin (D-MI), who have announced their intention to support the bill.
Make no mistake— this is not a show of bipartisanship, but instead members of our own party capitulating to the lies and vitriol of the Republican party. The same Republican party that has always scapegoated innocent immigrant populations to push their radical, divisive agenda forward.

“S.5 is nothing short of a shameful attempt to exploit the tragic death of Laken Riley in order to stoke fear and hatred in the hearts of Americans, and push the same racist, anti-immigration agenda which has been offered by the GOP for decades”. **said YDA President Quentin Wathum-Ocama**. “Democratic Senators must see through this charade, which will do nothing to prevent these kinds of tragedies. It only serves to endanger and alienate our neighbors and fellow Americans.”

This proposed legislation is an attack on the fundamental values that our party, and our nation, promise to its people. It would allow undocumented immigrants (including DACA recipients) who are so much as suspected or charged with a crime to face deportation proceedings or indefinite detention by federal authorities. This violates the constitutional promise to a fair trial and due process.
**In the words of Emma Lazarus, whose poetry famously greeted generations of immigrants at the base of the Statute of Liberty: “Until we are all free, we are none of us free.”**

YDA firmly believes that America is and always will be a nation of immigrants. To vote for this legislation is to ignore our history and turn our backs on the communities who have built this country in its hour of need. We are calling on Senate Democrats to remember the oaths they swore only days ago to protect, preserve, and defend the Constitution by rejecting this unconstitutional and unconscionable legislation.
---
###
---
|
---
The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To learn more about the YDA visit: **[www.yda.org

name: Josh Harder
subject: California Wildfires
body:
What we can do.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100130922/521897343/-2119468418?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQ5ZWFlMzktZmJjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=38U6lqXnJfiGCI4UOGW5eHHpEF9GaJBWqHJb1rVpzWk=&emci=49bce2cc-f6ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=1d9eae39-fbce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6455652) | Hi Peter, We’ve all seen the scary images coming out of California right now with these tragic wildfires. Personally, Pam and I know multiple families who have lost homes and many more who are evacuating as we speak. It’s nothing short of devastating. I also know a lot of you reading this might not be here in California and are asking, what can we do to help? First off, our top priority is controlling these fires and keeping everyone safe. If you are in the LA area, here are some [_**wildfire safety tips and resources to keep your family safe.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100130923/521897344/-10615340?akid=39382.461272.hjkbBe&rd=1&t=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQ5ZWFlMzktZmJjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=38U6lqXnJfiGCI4UOGW5eHHpEF9GaJBWqHJb1rVpzWk=&emci=49bce2cc-f6ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=1d9eae39-fbce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6455652) If you’re not local, please [_**consider supporting the California Community Foundation Wildfire Relief Fund**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100130924/521897345/469570114?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQ5ZWFlMzktZmJjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=38U6lqXnJfiGCI4UOGW5eHHpEF9GaJBWqHJb1rVpzWk=&emci=49bce2cc-f6ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=1d9eae39-fbce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6455652) who are on the frontlines providing both short term emergency assistance and long term recovery. I’ll also add it is not lost on me that some of us have been yelling from the rooftops for a while now that wildfires are a legitimate crisis. Know that as we work to help these communities in the short term, I’m also working on what the heck we can do long term to fight this crisis. Our communities need real, long term solutions and that means the federal government needs to get its act together and DO SOMETHING to proactively fight back. Please, please stay safe, and don’t be afraid to reach out if you need support. We will get through this. Pam and I are sending all our thoughts to our Southern California neighbors. \- Josh
---
* * *

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt4tarr2m9f8m0ckrsp1vlo8p8eg3ibouv0dd25o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or6cjh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5s1ekp85tascgud37erm241i8t01se7vcn64ps8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or6cjh2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg7e5j3dq2e8lbosmetpia6lqp9o2jgtimbj3ocg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or6cjh2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf9squfl5fdg0ro16gt4v6bu8hl2oqkjogela74g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or6cjh2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9rnf3rc2vcsvmj11nnukg90vfrjdt2o36k0k3lg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or6cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpge6pb6c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3283v69aghpo0d9ohh5k8ukbefifs2ocrhcana0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or6cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z94hon2a5qke17jh0ra65c7cbnt971i03hpcm9v0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cdgm9p73cpie49fg)

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

subject: History in the Making - You're Invited (Limited Time)
body:
On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office...

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi9jqiglo1oe9ff1g2sd5ghvkodfsitjsj81khco_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or1cdh2bs)

Friend, On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office... **_...and Friend, YOU could be there!_**
---

---
**Turning Point USA is offering one special supporter (and their guest) an ALL-EXPENSES-PAID trip for inauguration weekend** - a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME opportunity to be part of one of the most significant moments in modern American history. **[Friend, will you make a generous gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to support Turning Point USA before January 10th? We'll choose the supporter for this special giveaway on January 11th!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp3j5mjfd7aqbv290dlrpi0caafjisv2u6t2vgio_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or1cdh2bs)**

[ **Support Turning Point USA now**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztuauqs3kjqvchsote1mt5jmj7dgai9a5s8sckcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or1cdh2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrd98tgdo3vvl39inqhqeegmv3t9ghaua304k66o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or1cdh2bs)
---
At Turning Point's AMERICAFEST in December, President Trump stood before thousands of young patriots and declared that a new era of AMERICAN GREATNESS was beginning. **[**Now YOU and your guest have the opportunity to potentially join Turning Point USA to celebrate INAUGURATION WEEKEND:**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3qf79k4pa4cjsdcctafdp1dlgd28a35uvi6nav0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or1cdh2bs)**
* On SUNDAY midday, join President Trump's pre-inauguration event,

* On SUNDAY evening, enjoy VIP tickets to the Turning Point Inaugural Ball, and

* On MONDAY midday, attend the INAUGURATION of the 47th President in Washington, DC!

Plus, you'll receive round-trip flights to Washington, DC and luxury hotel accommodations for inauguration weekend. **Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to be part of history, Friend.** **[Make your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more by 11:59 PM ET on January 10th-- and you could be the special Turning Point USA supporter who wins this inauguration weekend celebration!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh077gkfcirn51scum8adgo8souq200oinndlpjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or1cdh2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA now**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2obb1idill4ohkbtg22k2u9uir1n3aicv7gfqcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or1cdh2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism and your generous support. In 2024, we worked together to inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again -- and won back an ENTIRE GENERATION in favor of FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM. Now, in 2025, you can help Turning Point USA do more than ever before, starting with this massive celebration of AMERICA'S GOLDEN AGE. **[Please, Friend, don't miss your chance: make your gift right away to secure your chance to join me and Turning Point USA for inauguration weekend.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqiagirqe7mam48q4atv3nra1l2h1s7o9ibal7eg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5ie9or1cdh2bs)**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

**Reagan Knopp and Bryan Iverson sit down with Congresswoman Val Hoyle from her office in Washington DC. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We’ve never offered this before...
body:
On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office...

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd6djvq9etdp6vkvk5m1el4oja7f5qt9jmdsfe8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs)
---
Friend, On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office... **_...and Friend, YOU could be there!_**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqq2hjed7qi4eitpk17gkeul91qr5k28bdpp4i2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs)
---
**Turning Point USA is offering one special supporter (and their guest) an ALL-EXPENSES-PAID trip for inauguration weekend** - a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME opportunity to be part of one of the most significant moments in modern American history. **[Friend, will you make a generous gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to support Turning Point USA before January 10th? We'll choose the supporter for this special giveaway on January 11th!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5r6rn4krb8ajdbv6nibcjicvub6dquppqviajj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdpgk75bna9ag7q2kjbs9p78mkfobn9mdm9bfse0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj3kj41uvg42m2pfquiens80mdv9ik95u7oslq28_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs)
---
At Turning Point's AMERICAFEST in December, President Trump stood before thousands of young patriots and declared that a new era of AMERICAN GREATNESS was beginning. **[**Now YOU and your guest have the opportunity to potentially join Turning Point USA to celebrate INAUGURATION WEEKEND:**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvl7u06fa2g1h980fajb1dc7njvjfr2i0onpfr2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs)**
* On SUNDAY midday, join President Trump's pre-inauguration event,

* On SUNDAY evening, enjoy VIP tickets to the Turning Point Inaugural Ball, and

* On MONDAY midday, attend the INAUGURATION of the 47th President in Washington, DC!

Plus, you'll receive round-trip flights to Washington, DC and luxury hotel accommodations for inauguration weekend. **Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to be part of history, Friend.** **[Make your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more by 11:59 PM ET on January 10th-- and you could be the special Turning Point USA supporter who wins this inauguration weekend celebration!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zovjq23vm7mjl1pqaeqel3h2b0dmr7t7lg8qse3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbbn03mik4fcqcm5vjh9qqnafdu4jntt1oh4i4t8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism and your generous support. In 2024, we worked together to inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again -- and won back an ENTIRE GENERATION in favor of FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM. Now, in 2025, you can help Turning Point USA do more than ever before, starting with this massive celebration of AMERICA'S GOLDEN AGE. **[Please, Friend, don't miss your chance: make your gift right away to secure your chance to join me and Turning Point USA for inauguration weekend.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmsp1s4jk7s8vh9fgkv6339123tp8gi9el5mcplg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs)**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z10psf2haf63sk7sqocndejekrjh7lkkuirp5v10_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs)

In a despicable act of treachery, Joe Biden awarded the Medal of Freedom to **[George Soros](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zoa3n0la8rg2b5h27q69nvlkurutq3lr2u26ii60_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5c3h2bs "George Soros")** , a billionaire activist who has dedicated his life to destroying the very fabric of our nation. **This is an outrage that demands immediate action.**

As Elon Musk courageously pointed out, Soros "fundamentally hates humanity" and has spent his fortune empowering extremist groups, undermining our democracy, and promoting a radical agenda that seeks to erase America's values and traditions. By exposing Soros's true intentions, Elon is doing what the fake news media and the DC swamp refuse to do: **[EXPOSING THE TRUTH.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zs84svrgtlujnjbfu4alek5bluu5vmbb0hbtfc38_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5c3h2bs "EXPOSING THE TRUTH.")**

By honoring George Soros with the Medal of Freedom, Biden is sending a chilling message: _if you hate America and want to destroy its foundations, you'll be rewarded with the highest honors._

We cannot let this stand. **At House Republican HQ, we are committed to fighting back against this betrayal and defending America's values with every ounce of strength we have. But we need your help to take on the Soros Machine.**

**Please stand up and say:

subject: I’m Trump’s guy in the FL-01 Special Election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:

| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5arbni96hcirdj2vkijle8bgq4ict1hl7u9l4ro_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zticm0sd8p2hojpb1rjr4do01d5m9764iqfcu4ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z429fj2sf7vs96f0pvptte6ieodmn6a540kmpf8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs "Jimmy Patronis + Donald Trump")
---
Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5u54o9t4gfan9a153cjujtfkb1ktjotb3tbj5u0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6coj5cph2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")

To victory,
_- Jimmy_

**JIMMY PATRONIS**
Trump-Endorsed Candidate, FL-01 Special Election

| | | [STOP THE SOROS MACHINE](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3v0tk4sghgbfvb8ta8tf72sh63vppie7413purg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg62p34c5h2bs "Generic Button")
---

In a despicable act of treachery, Joe Biden awarded the Medal of Freedom to **[George Soros](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z78kdip6i0op5r6gmtc4dm9h6sskctfi5k59ri4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg62p34c5h2bs "George Soros")** , a billionaire activist who has dedicated his life to destroying the very fabric of our nation. **This is an outrage that demands immediate action.**

As Elon Musk courageously pointed out, Soros "fundamentally hates humanity" and has spent his fortune empowering extremist groups, undermining our democracy, and promoting a radical agenda that seeks to erase America's values and traditions. By exposing Soros's true intentions, Elon is doing what the fake news media and the DC swamp refuse to do: **[EXPOSING THE TRUTH.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3p35mkgof0ui9o7eb6moknkdhlk92dvhrdijsq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg62p34c5h2bs "EXPOSING THE TRUTH.")**

Biden's actions are a stark reminder that the radical left will stop at nothing to impose their twisted ideology on our nation. By honoring George Soros with the Medal of Freedom, Biden is sending a chilling message: _if you hate America and want to destroy its foundations, you'll be rewarded with the highest honors._

We cannot let this stand. **At House Republican HQ, we are committed to fighting back against this betrayal and defending America's values with every ounce of strength we have. But we need your help to take on the Soros Machine.**

Friend >> Will you join thousands of American Heroes from across the country and help House Republicans fight back against George Soros and his BILLION dollar money machine?

**[$25, $50, or $100](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zine7b2ssl8pqgog2nsp4s4a552qundnvidbgedo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg62p34c5h2bs "$25, $50, or $100")** \- _whatever you can spare, the amount doesn't matter. What matters is that you're willing to take a stand against the radical left's destructive agenda and join the fight for America's future._
**Please stand up and say:
["YES, I, Friend, WILL STEP UP TO STOP THE SOROS MACHINE AND SAVE AMERICA!"](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbis5aue7dennh0m9v8k39ihr80e9tqtpumjct28_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg62p34c5h2bs "“YES, I, Friend, WILL STEP UP TO STOP THE SOROS MACHINE AND SAVE AMERICA!”")**

body:
On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office...

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z26gc6mmkkbg08ivb72p0gp8dit7q2osks04j57g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6ao30cdh2bs)
---
Friend, On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office... **_...and Friend, YOU could be there!_**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zshet5o263ooc88l20on4l6acv7lt155l4teiihg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg6ao30cdh2bs)
---
**Turning Point USA is offering one special supporter (and their guest) an ALL-EXPENSES-PAID trip for inauguration weekend** - a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME opportunity to be part of one of the most significant moments in modern American history. **[Friend, will you make a generous gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to support Turning Point USA before January 10th? Friend,

President Trump had some words of motivation for our new GOP Senate majority as they work to outsmart and outwork the Democrats to confirm President Trump's nominees:

_**["We have a Country to run and many big problems to solve, mostly created by Democrats. REPUBLICANS, BE SMART AND TOUGH!!!" - President Trump](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/r0u81MFajLEXCoL2hY1XfA~~/AAVLBgA~_GbiAZ-yQVgBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**_

Winning the election was the critical first step to Making America Great Again with President Trump and our new Senate majority. We must clean up all the messes made by Joe Biden's failed administration and lead America into a prosperous future.

Our new majority must END Democrat attacks on the American Dream by supporting President Trump's critical nominees who will fight with Senate Republicans to rebuild our country after Joe Biden's destructive term.

It is going to be a tough fight to confirm President Trump's nominees as Democrats smear strong nominees to slow down President Trump and Senate Republicans and stop us from achieving as much as possible with this majority.

_**[Pitch in now to support our fearless Republican Senators as they take on Democrats' smear campaign and push back on lies spread about President Trump's strong nominees.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/r0u81MFajLEXCoL2hY1XfA~~/AAVLBgA~_GbiAZ-yQVgBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**_

name: TRUMP SENTENCING UPDATE [From Team Scalise]
subject: If you voted for Donald J. Trump, you ought to hear this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The MOMENT the partisan judge said he’s plowing ahead with the sentencing, we called for the shameful Trump verdict to be vacated immediately. Unfortunately, the response we received was underwhelming – so now we’re trying again.

| |
---
| | | **TRUMP SENTENCING UPDATE**
_If you voted for Donald J. Trump, you ought to hear this:_

It wasn't enough to convict our future President on phony charges... Now they're racing to sentence him JUST TEN DAYS before he is sworn in as the 47th President of the United States.

The MOMENT the partisan judge said he's plowing ahead with the sentencing, we called for the shameful Trump verdict to be vacated immediately. _Unfortunately, the response we received was underwhelming - so now we're trying again._

**Now that President Trump has appealed to the Supreme Court, we're doubling down on our petition to vacate the verdict, cancel his sham sentencing, and toss out the case once and for all.**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zihnh8rnqmjrmd4eq2vl28oluf9daar0c4tdv5bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg66o76chh2bs "SIGN THE PETITION")
---

Listen:

There's no time to wait around for the next shoe to drop. Not with President Trump's term about to formally begin.

We're setting out to collect 250,000 more signatures before Inauguration Day. If we can hit that goal, it will send a powerful message to the Democrat Machine that will be IMPOSSIBLE to ignore.

We're counting on your signature to hit that goal.

Thank you,
Team Scalise

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

name: House GOP Chairwoman Lisa McClain
subject: This has to be a mistake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa McClain for Congress
body:
Maybe I expected too much

| |
---
| | | | | |
_**HOUSE GOP 2025 INAUGURAL SURVEY
DEADLINE: 11:59 PM**_
| | | Friend, this has to be a mistake.

I expected the response to my 2025 Inaugural Survey to break records, but sadly we're not even close.

We all made history during the 2024 election, and we have President Trump's landslide victory to show for it.

But now it's up to _YOU_ to decide what comes next for our country.

As your newly elected GOP Conference Chairwoman, it would be my honor to personally ask for your guidance and priorities in my brand-new 2025 Inaugural Survey.

_**So please, share your voice and let me know what matters to you- it 'll only take a couple minutes!**_
---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Waste. Fraud. Inefficiency.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Complete the DOGE survey today

|
---
| | | **Waste

Fraud

Inefficiency**

Friend, our House Majority was elected on the back of our beliefs in creating a small government that works for the people of this great country.

Cutting wasteful government spending and slimming down our bloated federal government is no small task, _but it 's what we were elected to do._

I need your help today, Friend. **[Will you take the House GOP Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) Survey and let me know what you want to see reformed?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4fapdgofo7tonhs62jan593nebnis9buck0kob0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg61or6c1h2bs "Will you take the House GOP Department of Government Efficiency \(DOGE\) Survey and let me know what you want to see reformed?")**

---
**DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY**
**Issued By House GOP HQ**

**PATRIOT: Friend

STATUS: [INCOMPLETE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi9o8ndureppjij7pdpbdiisf05h30jabr70he80_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg61or6c1h2bs "INCOMPLETE")**
---
| | [COMPLETE NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrfo8blr30g0fg64huijm084fqlpp2k7256kt8lg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg61or6c1h2bs "COMPLETE NOW")
---

The Democrats and their pals in the media are watching us closely, Friend.

_**They want to see us fail. **_

But we have a job to do, and I need your help to get it done. **[Can I count on you to complete your DOGE Survey by tonight?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpusfo3v0rcamebm3dicrfls0lj3m396sf36cvp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg61or6c1h2bs "Can I count on you to complete your DOGE Survey by tonight?")**

---

I can't wait to hear your thoughts.

America always,

Speaker Mike Johnson

name: TRUMP SENTENCING UPDATE [From Team Scalise]
subject: If you voted for Donald J. Trump, you ought to hear this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The MOMENT the partisan judge said he’s plowing ahead with the sentencing, we called for the shameful Trump verdict to be vacated immediately. Unfortunately, the response we received was underwhelming – so now we’re trying again.

| |
---
| | | **TRUMP SENTENCING UPDATE**
_If you voted for Donald J. Trump, you ought to hear this:_

It wasn't enough to convict our future President on phony charges... Now they're racing to sentence him JUST TEN DAYS before he is sworn in as the 47th President of the United States.

The MOMENT the partisan judge said he's plowing ahead with the sentencing, we called for the shameful Trump verdict to be vacated immediately. _Unfortunately, the response we received was underwhelming - so now we're trying again._

**Now that President Trump has appealed to the Supreme Court, we're doubling down on our petition to vacate the verdict, cancel his sham sentencing, and toss out the case once and for all.**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z08v7tq4ek0qb2654mbj1dktqtl04min0rq14340_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg61or6c5h2bs "SIGN THE PETITION")
---

Listen:

There's no time to wait around for the next shoe to drop. Not with President Trump's term about to formally begin.

We're setting out to collect 250,000 more signatures before Inauguration Day. If we can hit that goal, it will send a powerful message to the Democrat Machine that will be IMPOSSIBLE to ignore.
| [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0p1nt370beimpmpqngemv6fqme0es3nb1rsufb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg61or6c5h2bs "SIGN THE PETITION")
---

We're counting on your signature to hit that goal.

Thank you,
Team Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zuhgfh57di54vk5vgcu9mke0vcpucs05ufjr7oi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg61or6c5h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlft01cshghobdkp77reb60q62461mcr34lbkh18_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg61or6c5h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: 2026 Sneak Peek
subject: An early look at potentially vulnerable senators in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Find out which states we’re going to FLIP next year >>

**[An early look at potentially vulnerable senators in 2026](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4stkrej7oa5vv173cqjebq5us4t3fr1nbio6a00_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg69pb0cjh2bs)**

**["Republicans are likely to try to grow their majority in competitive states such as Michigan and Georgia -- both carried by Trump and where Democrats Gary Peters and Jon Ossoff are respectively up for reelection."](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd00gjbf5mnthl27c3d0ojlgmm0do9ljbugs1m7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg69pb0cjh2bs)**

_[via Roll Call]_
Friend,

Historically, midterm elections favor the party that's outside of power. We're trying to make sure 2026 looks different.

For the first two years of President Trump's second term, Republicans will hold a 53-47 Majority in the upper chamber. But with prime pickup opportunities in Georgia and Michigan on the horizon, there's no reason for us to settle.

President Trump enjoyed emphatic victories in Georgia and Michigan this past November. With early investments in the 2026 Senate races in both these states, we can knock off the Democrats' incumbents and expand our Majority to one of the largest in recent memory.

_**[Friend, grassroots patriots like you will make all the difference in these battleground states. Remember, the earlier you donate, the further your dollar goes towards defeating the Democrats and flipping these states red in 2026.>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zv78pojodi3kuurrnh2kd49u74m30mqkqor68gj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clg69pb0cjh2bs)**_

CNN legal analyst Elie Honig said Thursday that President-elect Donald Trump “actually gets a benefit” when he is sentenced by New York Judge Juan Merchan on Friday.
http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvdborr36itb8cfu5oms82vg2ug29hhbblf6juuo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr4cjkmkpj9ctn6ej3fddnkkor9d9lk2rr7d5n6mij1s3hmgqb7djlktob9td1e9qnbc3lkgr32tbk66or9td76konctd46mh3actl6cqb2td26jqq4d9kmerjb9jl6eonactm6kojf8h1k8gn48n24hjmcor5chg62pj2c8iv0

Elie Honig Explains Why Trump ‘Actually Gets A Benefit’ By Being
Sentenced

CNN legal analyst Elie Honig said Thursday that President-elect Donald

subject: I’m Trump’s guy in the FL-01 Special Election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:

| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zns9s57oo10gpoef2q2oioqh927gcj3c9fqbu7m8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli60ob6c9h2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zosoit4ag9i85914kgkjansmrj9p2b0nd9oqd3to_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli60ob6c9h2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkqdma0947lj79mh99vvsmccb4ak4km3og8ec79o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli60ob6c9h2bs "Jimmy Patronis + Donald Trump")
---
Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdvjl1bdu9chmo1ne5uth0iln5fs6461jg544f40_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli60ob6c9h2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

To victory,
_- Jimmy_

**JIMMY PATRONIS**
Trump-Endorsed Candidate, FL-01 Special Election

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt6nbrgb12hukjqfo30nutes9f153es6jeus4po0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli60ob6c9h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztj87t9bqja17e61em3hkt1purhcgic8l5hu86gg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli60ob6c9h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z86t409bc7d9o68rjnmnbugm89tk2i8ih5otgmk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli60ob6c9h2bs "RESPOND NOW")

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

name: 2026 Sneak Peek
subject: Republicans now have the Senate Majority. But we refuse to settle.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
There’s still so much work to be done

**[An early look at potentially vulnerable senators in 2026](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z089fb10q65kt55ivgkeih560n36jm0mv8dkgvso_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli68pj6chh2bs)**

**["Republicans are likely to try to grow their majority in competitive states such as Michigan and Georgia -- both carried by Trump and where Democrats Gary Peters and Jon Ossoff are respectively up for reelection."](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbj0ld9l6a9m2vm7ilmn3hg8gn7gujrb3grev2uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli68pj6chh2bs)**

_[via Roll Call]_
Friend,

Historically, midterm elections favor the party that's outside of power. We're trying to make sure 2026 looks different.

For the first two years of President Trump's second term, Republicans will hold a 53-47 Majority in the upper chamber. But with prime pickup opportunities in Georgia and Michigan on the horizon, there's no reason for us to settle.

President Trump enjoyed emphatic victories in Georgia and Michigan this past November. With early investments in the 2026 Senate races in both these states, we can knock off the Democrats' incumbents and expand our Majority to one of the largest in recent memory.

_**[Friend, grassroots patriots like you will make all the difference in these battleground states. subject: I’m Trump’s guy in the FL-01 Special Election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:

| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbuff5ufap76o9sf520ipnah78aac1k0i32ogj60_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli68pj6c1h2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd90c5q99rs4b0c1munavoo258tlan1o2hoqdeho_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli68pj6c1h2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm3dd9lvec4ue1a0tnir8lhsin5k4mvif50figrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli68pj6c1h2bs "Jimmy Patronis + Donald Trump")
---
Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zplaknvng9lsbkp4snlhf37fpjm2p0qbjksh7sdg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli68pj6c1h2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

To victory,
_- Jimmy_

**JIMMY PATRONIS**
Trump-Endorsed Candidate, FL-01 Special Election

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2s8p4s0oimva1fe9aqsiv6j81s353upn1o1322g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli68pj6c1h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zofopii68mhs4hl4qn9o0fepof58a1eblvdk0138_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli68pj6c1h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

| | | [STOP THE SOROS MACHINE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgnc3tmv9aet4r17ajrand74hagi59tgd7h5vld0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli64oj6cjh2bs "Generic Button")
---

In a despicable act of treachery, Joe Biden awarded the Medal of Freedom to **[George Soros](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z54ebpq6idkd71eu0t4n6v9t5kotjeb5hkjcukh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli64oj6cjh2bs "George Soros")** , a billionaire activist who has dedicated his life to destroying the very fabric of our nation. **This is an outrage that demands immediate action.**

As Elon Musk courageously pointed out, Soros "fundamentally hates humanity" and has spent his fortune empowering extremist groups, undermining our democracy, and promoting a radical agenda that seeks to erase America's values and traditions. By exposing Soros's true intentions, Elon is doing what the fake news media and the DC swamp refuse to do: **[EXPOSING THE TRUTH.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1pm3dvf7futn90suugpli3a6dvp9bkumvrnukao_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli64oj6cjh2bs "EXPOSING THE TRUTH.")**

Biden's actions are a stark reminder that the radical left will stop at nothing to impose their twisted ideology on our nation. By honoring George Soros with the Medal of Freedom, Biden is sending a chilling message: _if you hate America and want to destroy its foundations, you'll be rewarded with the highest honors._

We cannot let this stand. **At House Republican HQ, we are committed to fighting back against this betrayal and defending America's values with every ounce of strength we have. But we need your help to take on the Soros Machine.**

Friend >> Will you join thousands of American Heroes from across the country and help House Republicans fight back against George Soros and his BILLION dollar money machine?

**[$25, $50, or $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgqc8du534ki92j9cbc64ao248ul9adb8qca7ki0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli64oj6cjh2bs "$25, $50, or $100")** \- _whatever you can spare, the amount doesn't matter. What matters is that you're willing to take a stand against the radical left's destructive agenda and join the fight for America's future._
**Please stand up and say:
["YES, I, Friend, WILL STEP UP TO STOP THE SOROS MACHINE AND SAVE AMERICA!"](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcqat23mfjoiodbn42348lm29j1h9s5tn0r50sa0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cli64oj6cjh2bs "“YES, I, Friend, WILL STEP UP TO STOP THE SOROS MACHINE AND SAVE AMERICA!”")**

name: Firecracker Mini OTF
subject: Switchblade THAT attaches to your car keys (opening mail/packages easier too)
body:
Doesn't get in your way only brings value and handiness to your life...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19700/6374453/44e0481ae645e0ac5ad4b9a2f6717c648959e1df/38f9fff8632dcf1694b46913bd7300e5604b9136)
---
| | |
---
_January 10th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
This is one of my favorite knives to date.

I own a ton of expensive hunting knives and OTF blades, but truly nothing has been more convenient that this [car keys switchblade.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19700/6374453/44e0481ae645e0ac5ad4b9a2f6717c648959e1df/38f9fff8632dcf1694b46913bd7300e5604b9136)

It's always with me on the go, where my car keys are is where my concealed switch is too, this compact American designed knife, is called _**"The Firecracker" - and was initially launched for a 4th of July promotion.**_

Due to the growing response for this line of switchblades, they restocked and making them available again year-round.

These are going viral because there's nothing that [fits so flush on a keychain while having the OTF ejectable switch feature in a knife](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19700/6374453/44e0481ae645e0ac5ad4b9a2f6717c648959e1df/38f9fff8632dcf1694b46913bd7300e5604b9136) on the go.

This is mobile convenience of switchblade knife perfect for easy daily tasks like opening mail/packages.

I find my car keys are always on me more often than an edc knife, so combining all in one place just makes my life easier being able to carry this tool so easily.

Doesn't get in your way only brings value and handiness to your life.

Get the Compact switchblade safely sits your pocket along with your car or truck keys.

**[Claim Your Car Keys Firecracker Switchblades Here>>>](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19700/6374453/44e0481ae645e0ac5ad4b9a2f6717c648959e1df/38f9fff8632dcf1694b46913bd7300e5604b9136)**
