Trump’s Official Criminal Sentence in the SHAM New York Case https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f4f91379b9a76ae96ef03f843ffe615db58e17ff8f13432599c6857d7feb35d3d5a8fe271958afc8ad4a1a4ef50a4cf0bb2e9c2b1a2ff57fdda1e84bad235e41 VIEW IMMEDIATELY Peter, Just now, in a New York courtroom, Crooked Judge Juan Merchan took the FINAL step in making Donald J. Trump a convicted felon. Yes, you read that right… With only DAYS left until his Inauguration, our 45th and soon-to-be 47th President was just sentenced as a CONVICTED FELON! President Trump has faced legal warfare, baseless charges, and bogus cases. He was forced to take a mugshot like a common criminal, politically prosecuted in the most SHAM trial this country has ever seen, and found GUILTY. The odds were stacked against him from the start, yet he has never wavered in his fight to defend himself and our country from crazed political radicals. The liberal mob behind this witch hunt has not held anything back. They will stop at nothing to defeat Donald Trump. As a result, Donald J. Trump is set to become the first president of the United States with a criminal conviction and sentence on his record. This should concern EVERY freedom-loving conservative nationwide. If they can weaponize our justice system against a former and soon-to-be SITTING President, imagine what they can do to YOU. Despite the trials and tribulations he has been forced to face through the ENDLESS political witch hunt, President Trump has never given up his fight to protect us, our Constitution, and our country. And he isn’t giving up that fight now! Now, we need to fight for him! Donald Trump did NOTHING wrong. We know it, but we need to make sure the world knows it too by joining the call to CLEAR President Trump’s good name. name: MassGOP Alerts
subject: Reminder: “Like throwing a bucket of water onto a burning building” 🔥
body:
Gov. Healey wants to throw more $$ at the problem
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001znjiJ5QGy6l8imsSumzkrC34azpI1gJSXcsn__19kWrgwZkPTikklK99QLYj67D7Iu0pLdfgw2JJhwSjlJbPdkzxVcAoJVaFFMxSI5X04YbwqTsse6KvLIiFKaRPmTVfHynMZBq4NN1glUKRs59aHA==&c=N5On_s0LqFmSAzl2JINlgGYQhj6a0AUQcb41kNIGFi-JHULOPTsi8Q==&ch=mQjgaxwR60HxutEtBAQ_4g2noK9lD8croKApzpSIN2v1W42VpQVL9g==)

| Dear Friends,
To everyone's surprise, the Healey-Driscoll Administration finally broke their silence on the migrant crisis last night.
But, to no one's surprise, their solution is throwing an additional $425,000,000 at the problem.
Massachusetts Republicans stand strong in our call to amend the Right to Shelter Law residency requirements.
Throwing money at our problems is no solution at all.
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001znjiJ5QGy6l8imsSumzkrC34azpI1gJSXcsn__19kWrgwZkPTikklF4ScsB2E_gi0iBMIFg2wV3KV31jIfqGh5O5OKDo1_CJkf_bDfMSsEqaGcVfyQbmAP68Hc4I0LeOdiWFr3I9Ilqer0Gytm3hjcSDRT9RNVjjo25dBZKwsUl9X4nOYljP-w==&c=N5On_s0LqFmSAzl2JINlgGYQhj6a0AUQcb41kNIGFi-JHULOPTsi8Q==&ch=mQjgaxwR60HxutEtBAQ_4g2noK9lD8croKApzpSIN2v1W42VpQVL9g==)

The Democratic Supermajority needs to put partisanship aside and work with Republicans on finding real solutions.

HEALEY AMEND THE RIGHT TO SHELTER LAW?](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001znjiJ5QGy6l8imsSumzkrC34azpI1gJSXcsn__19kWrgwZkPTikklMJVHTHxRqXc0HKk-IPnEC3dD1W8XyD8PMc1oS-M33DNyGmX5Rw_G05Y1o5yYqANc85GWRLnSo0zmWinZMwhztONd3mK-joQQYy0adYGA8MKNvoEFuYFYNCW7aCCNfZDJ0xmgaGjS7Qb&c=N5On_s0LqFmSAzl2JINlgGYQhj6a0AUQcb41kNIGFi-JHULOPTsi8Q==&ch=mQjgaxwR60HxutEtBAQ_4g2noK9lD8croKApzpSIN2v1W42VpQVL9g==)

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b594e4cb89a477992e0d8757e342cb9&_e=rxbgtQRjQoEQAJzAZs77Z7aL9uyrYMAuGCAkARmfTq0GEhQfDVsFcNqNT0JlqGolRDxq9AfrAKADqUYsFi8FSoW0a_RFfsFqBCVwmKgYkUxDMKRbBkMkDswthAalkpqMlv6oiscOXANZqNuRzsu-s4RHQidHIRt0c3sqRSbCy8fXVGEawEw2PjpOcRaa8IHnCb60zkwy_RRUmn9Yv6hzsVzg0HYTprWK5AtaXbz0EhAftJ5CTiJTrpiOvsOSJDJhNbxUyl4__-1yCmbcx5x9KEDKsdi9LJtzi7a1knVp3XSV1y_CmV3aoFCBA9L6OTWYSQzBgllV-lDwBOikgg_6VneocIcWNRFfeX3NEPt95sUPXaiP20lRkm3t5LVcmpmioWKFVNVUcBELPbZAEl5em9x0NHDQd8xJ1MxJ2ctSSO0%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b594e4cb89a477992e0d8757e342cb9&_e=rxbgtQRjQoEQAJzAZs77Z7aL9uyrYMAuGCAkARmfTq0GEhQfDVsFcNqNT0JlqGolRDxq9AfrAKADqUYsFi8FSoW0a_RFfsFqBCVwmKgYkUxDMKRbBkMkDswthAalkpqMlv6oiscOXANZqNuRzsu-s4RHQidHIRt0c3sqRSbCy8fXVGEawEw2PjpOcRaa8IHnCb60zkwy_RRUmn9Yv6hzsVzg0HYTprWK5AtaXbz0EhAftJ5CTiJTrpiOvsOSJDJhh5y5joyAiFjlLeTeOCYmUssHcVqxeq5XwGO5GSi46hFp27huV1-5NnIKe-oUrAgMB0De1gNWUtfBALn_C8ZH6_2hkzxn2oWUNjn6Fiq1Y9ndBtVWnrWrK6uKLOyWZCc29jK-zdgpuowWl-y9oxKbhwCioLtSBTg0WSSlg_CeK0o%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b594e4cb89a477992e0d8757e342cb9&_e=rxbgtQRjQoEQAJzAZs77Z7aL9uyrYMAuGCAkARmfTq0GEhQfDVsFcNqNT0JlqGolRDxq9AfrAKADqUYsFi8FSoW0a_RFfsFqBCVwmKgYkUxDMKRbBkMkDswthAalkpqMlv6oiscOXANZqNuRzsu-s4RHQidHIRt0c3sqRSbCy8fXVGEawEw2PjpOcRaa8IHnCb60zkwy_RRUmn9Yv6hzsVzg0HYTprWK5AtaXbz0EhAftJ5CTiJTrpiOvsOSJDJhII1QgSKyDAY_e66xU3WowwEaA97Sa02e0p43Tu46c9HXj0t2KWVYrNufsa2O2eul_LeSkeOAyAiHFF-ZWhmLLrcv3tT2KNlY5b77K0IyOX-6diA5fvvDVg6q_mLcGai8P2sCkWlXQqg04dQXjdfYZ1CgXVPdPg2ZS5IuUh68Z6s%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b594e4cb89a477992e0d8757e342cb9&_e=rxbgtQRjQoEQAJzAZs77Z7aL9uyrYMAuGCAkARmfTq0GEhQfDVsFcNqNT0JlqGolRDxq9AfrAKADqUYsFi8FSoW0a_RFfsFqBCVwmKgYkUxDMKRbBkMkDswthAalkpqMlv6oiscOXANZqNuRzsu-s4RHQidHIRt0c3sqRSbCy8fXVGEawEw2PjpOcRaa8IHnCb60zkwy_RRUmn9Yv6hzsVzg0HYTprWK5AtaXbz0EhAftJ5CTiJTrpiOvsOSJDJhUS-xDiPCjF0P057RbRCysHtC9F4Y3OxW9l05vqgL4y1JrViyXsxt6V3ctlpyBqEap0as3sPqenMIsmfeZVRn6wYsaBmEYIaX5yua70-MSZ2ISeAYkkYGoO8YmnlAKyu8WFBavtJrAc8tHMXhUk0_aKuZRx337Ffh28mx-Xo79qE%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=4b594e4cb89a477992e0d8757e342cb9&_t=TPkbJ1xdWvsRx6vlrb2aGWcu9vLyU3jE-JHhbnys3YwGUsuKAy9x9cWvBT5FiSAfha726HU2SCywD4tjvUpKv1CD9-WudPSuHdZznFrp_oSjLF8ptHnEtykytWFHEWYSOuF1WWs_Icu7WPNG0CB1hcjtQlaw5FBgfzVicRrTaAc%3D)

Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country. To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including Imprimis , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty. Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions. Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding. So please complete your National Referendum on the Administrative State and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution. Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work. So please complete the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail. Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty. | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: No Dem Left Behind Executive Director, Hassan Martini
subject: Change is in the air, and it's not good.
body:
I am currently in D.C. and I can't remember it feeling like this before...
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w1acf-sewwkx-kyd76rh2/)
---
# **Change is in the air, and it's not good.**
---
| | | | Hey friend, I am in DC this week, meeting with colleagues, and it feels different here. It’s cold and gloomy, with slush on the ground. Of course, there’s the sadness hanging around President Carter’s funeral, but that’s not all. MAGA is taking their victory laps, and they are not being subtle. The Uber drivers and hotel staff tell me they have been exposed to some of the most hateful and outlandish rhetoric these past couple of weeks. Comments like “Have you packed your bags yet?” and others much worse that I don’t need to repeat. Normally, I like to walk past the White House or the Capitol at night after my meetings, just to reflect on why we do the work that we do. This time, I just stayed in my hotel room and counted down the hours until I could fly out. The Trump presidency is upon us—no denying it, and no taking it back. What we have to do now is come to terms with how we got here. This did not happen by accident, and it did not happen overnight. This is 10 years in the making. In 2015, Senator Sanders’ populist message was taking over not just the Democratic Party but the country as a whole, and corporate Democrats and corporate Republicans joined forces with the insurance industries, big pharma, and the military-industrial complex. They created a narrative around Medicare for All that it would destroy America as we know it. Every single time progressive ideas reach the main stage, we are villainized for it. An example is protesters begging for the U.S. to stop sending money to Israel and end the genocide being labeled as terrorist sympathizers. The irony does not go unnoticed. As Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind, my job now is to set a direction for not only our staff but our supporters, and I take this job very seriously. I respect the institution of our government, and I am heartbroken at the direction it has taken. I am receiving angry emails, texts, and messages. I have not replied to all of them, but I read every single one. We have to earn everyone’s trust back, and it starts with us understanding why we lost it in the first place. As a party, we welcomed in millions of dollars from oligarchs who wanted to defeat Black members of Congress who spoke up against genocide and our role in funding it. Those same people then went ahead and funded a massive operation to defeat VP Harris, Senator Brown, and many others. Elon Musk has vowed to pour millions more into Democratic primaries so that he can elect Republican-lite candidates he can control. That is not democracy—that is oligarchy. We are not going to solve our problems overnight, and we are not going to do it alone. We have to build the strongest populist movement this country has ever seen. As Democrats, we believe in a country that serves all of us, accepts all of us, and allows everyone an opportunity to thrive and be successful. The American Dream is lost for so many young Americans and people of color, but it doesn’t have to be this way. If we unify and stay true to ourselves, we can win. We will win. But first, we have a lot of work to do. Thank you for your continued support, Hassan Martini
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w1acf-sewwky-kyd76rh3/)
---
| [Contribute Monthly to No Dem Left Behind!](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w1acf-sewwkz-kyd76rh4/)
---
Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

Click here to modify your [preferences](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2w1acf--15aab-kyd76rh0&sl=4i6&t=1&ac=gpnv) or [unsubscribe](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2w1acf--15aab-kyd76rh0&sl=4i6&t=5&ac=gpnv).

body:

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! * On SUNDAY midday, join President Trump's pre-inauguration event,

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8b56e88bb9e45cfa13b92efb69afe73&_e=inMcllvLZJIwn5pD8z_qqKAaj60GuLIZwiWn8crcHKvcd6Wj6HnEGgVTXgbuUxKYrrJ6m8Yvgb2f5C1OJEVc5DMyxq5KcIG3QcdSgTvPw5kie2jMalsVDsxSAFUxE3V8Vr9G7UV_mEzhb1IcFgour3ujtk-_qAorZG2MliI3VE9PvTZ8dHVOPpVlMd-cWmRB0TgN6vO4iSN6q3PVH41ud3qe5Z77KdT0Iy-oENw3J2tLQaxxhxTpTiBzeodQoEPf2KEqVgmGwr9dTy7Jb2gg4MNTrQKgvdi-rL58nQkbhWGyzjTnh14jKe2mif2HbWw1lag-wOMvF4Z6xxPDzhk_9HQ53wvOQxlUQ4OgcRVm8rnOW82UkALLJ046U-GPzRAM77jEJPiDlBrpCFfF8YdeBMMtCh2OvRMAaAH6VlIuYyM%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8b56e88bb9e45cfa13b92efb69afe73&_e=inMcllvLZJIwn5pD8z_qqKAaj60GuLIZwiWn8crcHKvcd6Wj6HnEGgVTXgbuUxKYrrJ6m8Yvgb2f5C1OJEVc5DMyxq5KcIG3QcdSgTvPw5kie2jMalsVDsxSAFUxE3V8Vr9G7UV_mEzhb1IcFgour3ujtk-_qAorZG2MliI3VE9PvTZ8dHVOPpVlMd-cWmRB0TgN6vO4iSN6q3PVH41ud3qe5Z77KdT0Iy-oENw3J2tLQaxxhxTpTiBzeodQoEPfKkgnPJUCOdFI3INeEpVFOxXapRGla9XWWVQzpkpU1wcjdAxvy7MdRRERB8oSJCcKZII7iLfe_36bgEMC9xIaa_20FJhWQRdxqs2Icii-I_gptuTvGFkJhF8q3Ok_k9VGKemgdUYkeW-8gXbCFaegqp1vgNQnYIDrtzugiD2hxqY%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8b56e88bb9e45cfa13b92efb69afe73&_e=inMcllvLZJIwn5pD8z_qqKAaj60GuLIZwiWn8crcHKvcd6Wj6HnEGgVTXgbuUxKYrrJ6m8Yvgb2f5C1OJEVc5DMyxq5KcIG3QcdSgTvPw5kie2jMalsVDsxSAFUxE3V8Vr9G7UV_mEzhb1IcFgour3ujtk-_qAorZG2MliI3VE9PvTZ8dHVOPpVlMd-cWmRB0TgN6vO4iSN6q3PVH41ud3qe5Z77KdT0Iy-oENw3J2tLQaxxhxTpTiBzeodQoEPfUGw3Hbae6LAVmT1vBZlgVoUtPKy9mlf59v7wP80vQ3CxJuTA61v1TcVNUohflgdVgjBZAubpUTpSS83LViopXoykw1TUzDfuecx04nRPjevJ7vqRmDmXHX83ngGX9oMhVAe9MNclQn5lCodzuH5lKZAEiiD9A5TuI7vcylnan-8%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8b56e88bb9e45cfa13b92efb69afe73&_e=inMcllvLZJIwn5pD8z_qqKAaj60GuLIZwiWn8crcHKvcd6Wj6HnEGgVTXgbuUxKYrrJ6m8Yvgb2f5C1OJEVc5DMyxq5KcIG3QcdSgTvPw5kie2jMalsVDsxSAFUxE3V8Vr9G7UV_mEzhb1IcFgour3ujtk-_qAorZG2MliI3VE9PvTZ8dHVOPpVlMd-cWmRB0TgN6vO4iSN6q3PVH41ud3qe5Z77KdT0Iy-oENw3J2tLQaxxhxTpTiBzeodQoEPfZsrk5P_S8M7i83x-ya-GcqJ2Cj_mXD5yrGdsmsK43aVvEjpeVMVtvikyiq6Gs_2CNZZsD5S-SNAJVSaKK3kX8Rle2CUahp_DuvqDDdaka8H9KjRZLrF2fkzAU4U3IRV9z_zsdWeDrbNwA3v79S66uyYL1zsfEpafKVLSl3Q8Ip4%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=f8b56e88bb9e45cfa13b92efb69afe73&_t=89T_c84dyNc38g8r5DeKl34-JYK7thEqTx3HOVWVDy4pEXhMaG79_rRm6jMKqXuKhhs8HApkAcjAFd57dvdNEWL9ZnmPGAN287iIJGmkQNfF2IRjeQtQm7VvWlcJIYFyOln1V0jUkYd85gfvFofpRa3LDoSPME9BieWec25gjrw%3D)

body:

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d957e39426f41f48ddb357b3f343c59&_e=1hYt2O9Kz3pLMgZMNe0QUyBhoMa1OlMRvOAXV_GSO5zhhr2z8qdoSQtyqNKUrJzr8s1t3dys8DN39mwBsZ4gjbTsbcOzXX3yDDGtOrBb1k9kQkAkaivfO2RHXvLDY5cClHd-Cagm4nV_GuHMRqGHHpaeSo2Dz5muOEGarEfGoI_Y9F8g1TGfaWD2APAvzX2QUbyxD3h4vLZrFn0PLFQHAAj1s8rbdNM7xAQV891EKhkuN378GBm-fjy-AVMMgXN9fi53hAagIJnexS5EvbemcQ2onww_11wXi5tbw_75OxhTg2MV-LAOzb9bFgGCfbzgg_vK6LzTa3CBY0C6PF6UdO2-JBXF91oQLm4XwiWNMGrIOA81vdZ76ltgkOfjaGUPCMdrQOcfLsYBWbBqTPoVReVLFTGQTYF8vtrohaa_7V78GULM50GDhP9FZYuHuyb-BzNi0Q7wmHVOuCQ2P3nHFLCLMR6r1rivO-_w0yoAI5M%3D)

**_["TRUMP the SURVIVOR"](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d957e39426f41f48ddb357b3f343c59&_e=1hYt2O9Kz3pLMgZMNe0QUyBhoMa1OlMRvOAXV_GSO5zhhr2z8qdoSQtyqNKUrJzr8s1t3dys8DN39mwBsZ4gjbTsbcOzXX3yDDGtOrBb1k9kQkAkaivfO2RHXvLDY5cClHd-Cagm4nV_GuHMRqGHHpaeSo2Dz5muOEGarEfGoI_Y9F8g1TGfaWD2APAvzX2QUbyxD3h4vLZrFn0PLFQHAAj1s8rbdNM7xAQV891EKhkuN378GBm-fjy-AVMMgXN9fi53hAagIJnexS5EvbemcQ2onww_11wXi5tbw_75OxhTg2MV-LAOzb9bFgGCfbzgwerfnAdf0F_s1QMQO6jauCByt0h_LlUuyzXGTa0sEyYNWmWaRTSviBvk0mmWAvFGzYfjHXzGymJeagfge6UxCmfH8PBJYddBBqda3x72ZXFym3hERjy5ue9XtOGA48zO3wIBBwiPgeV7vqRx9UeYPwHq7EPWntQIF39SY00_Rd8%3D)_**

Dear Friend,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af2c9fe81b9f4075b7ff9d199e52b0e4&_e=rPH0AkqePYzSewLuqiNF7Liet6SmrJq0Di-6yztgF0hgc-t-gQGI2RSUQrzQhUdWyL0Rt41fVFmAOtr5i34hSb6fXnHGmdySSaDQ8TEGtFydcu0zcHPNpI9ZvKSPrwB3USR4KEE-1cy9ag94xa-w7DZEMDACXZ6Em0kv4CdMbUkZgaBabHMhBK101cw-qHv_Fo7bj3wGXrnkVDAMJXPli-B4nbI8sXs9BSCjnagbC8JoHXMg0W5ke3wYnWjGzGgnz9QbjixGKw-Mkh062Nkxe1pSjSR9NS2O6cIPqpQK8b-WJVzRbtKOQGHPRNXl-S0W4GMLd_KDYWrmuaAgpSCqh6sW9i3VXXw6BKEl578_AuLfZdJ4-a06n4nlkxBxPHSlmDHtR-YeHZ9wic_OxzXHAjOTRptBXIg9_XoCryc8ePk%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af2c9fe81b9f4075b7ff9d199e52b0e4&_e=rPH0AkqePYzSewLuqiNF7Liet6SmrJq0Di-6yztgF0hgc-t-gQGI2RSUQrzQhUdWyL0Rt41fVFmAOtr5i34hSb6fXnHGmdySSaDQ8TEGtFydcu0zcHPNpI9ZvKSPrwB3USR4KEE-1cy9ag94xa-w7DZEMDACXZ6Em0kv4CdMbUkZgaBabHMhBK101cw-qHv_Fo7bj3wGXrnkVDAMJXPli-B4nbI8sXs9BSCjnagbC8JoHXMg0W5ke3wYnWjGzGgnfNlNJ16y5hLPKfCvfECRo9grS-b0cPHlYJDuQ-CU71wFFxZ_hskRUJlP7n67hJC8rJvETElUmyrvGkT2dd4c3Q7R8NzUyJANBaCQheuB429vBwAhgylwGpHBiEcMS8nAkojxocL6InjYTMrt25TyqiqsvtUr9MhB6mVvsvjN0O4%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af2c9fe81b9f4075b7ff9d199e52b0e4&_e=rPH0AkqePYzSewLuqiNF7Liet6SmrJq0Di-6yztgF0hgc-t-gQGI2RSUQrzQhUdWyL0Rt41fVFmAOtr5i34hSb6fXnHGmdySSaDQ8TEGtFydcu0zcHPNpI9ZvKSPrwB3USR4KEE-1cy9ag94xa-w7DZEMDACXZ6Em0kv4CdMbUkZgaBabHMhBK101cw-qHv_Fo7bj3wGXrnkVDAMJXPli-B4nbI8sXs9BSCjnagbC8JoHXMg0W5ke3wYnWjGzGgncXAajYsMucmSbX5gQM-ctIV-ukZjI--hbaKOfUK1Bo7l75BBFMwBJ6udCvOJj8KUC5OM0jLtb7X1PR2MsA9ZWPmfCTRzAvuTajHzvgDaEcQlrxl-ngV11rrAbqMUBi9dH2adXBWNPcD84jwrHMbcUlce1EUEfT6FASfi_a2qMGw%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af2c9fe81b9f4075b7ff9d199e52b0e4&_e=rPH0AkqePYzSewLuqiNF7Liet6SmrJq0Di-6yztgF0hgc-t-gQGI2RSUQrzQhUdWyL0Rt41fVFmAOtr5i34hSb6fXnHGmdySSaDQ8TEGtFydcu0zcHPNpI9ZvKSPrwB3USR4KEE-1cy9ag94xa-w7DZEMDACXZ6Em0kv4CdMbUkZgaBabHMhBK101cw-qHv_Fo7bj3wGXrnkVDAMJXPli-B4nbI8sXs9BSCjnagbC8JoHXMg0W5ke3wYnWjGzGgnpQInRKgc6zj0mJNHi3p12ZLonk7E_-PywOfqpoSkX9ViP_Y3dfWQ9VVB9XXIqvMsNpihlx0utbuF92UpZ6YPgau_k6-LG9aIKxT9WTIWT3zQ8h2L-XPIauvBuJm8cx1Y_YnO2uatd1JnkA0-FeabLPOw20B8T0C9EX5ZSDDjmd4%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

clean_body: The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its . Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country. To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including Imprimis , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty. Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions. Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding. So please complete your National Referendum on the Administrative State and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution. Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work. So please complete the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail. Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty. | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:

---
| | | **TRUMP SENTENCING UPDATE**
_If you voted for Donald J. Trump, you ought to hear this:_

It wasn't enough to convict our future President on phony charges... Now they're racing to sentence him JUST TEN DAYS before he is sworn in as the 47th President of the United States.

The MOMENT the partisan judge said he's plowing ahead with the sentencing, we called for the shameful Trump verdict to be vacated immediately. _Unfortunately, the response we received was underwhelming - so now we're trying again._

**Now that President Trump has appealed to the Supreme Court, we're doubling down on our petition to vacate the verdict, cancel his sham sentencing, and toss out the case once and for all.**

Listen:

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

name: TRUMP SENTENCING UPDATE [From Team Scalise]
subject: If you voted for Donald J. Trump, you ought to hear this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The MOMENT the partisan judge said he’s plowing ahead with the sentencing, we called for the shameful Trump verdict to be vacated immediately. Unfortunately, the response we received was underwhelming – so now we’re trying again.

| |
---
| | | **TRUMP SENTENCING UPDATE**
_If you voted for Donald J. Trump, you ought to hear this:_

It wasn't enough to convict our future President on phony charges... Now they're racing to sentence him JUST TEN DAYS before he is sworn in as the 47th President of the United States.

body:
Are you with President Trump?

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NGT/?__vbtrk=MjY5MzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Every legal scholar, political analyst, media pundit, and American patriot knows:
**The prosecution of President Trump is a political witch hunt designed to derail President Trump’s victory.**
They couldn’t **impeach him** successfully.
They couldn’t **beat him** at the polls.
So now, they are trying to **criminally sentence**** __**President Trump while he is still a private citizen.
[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NGT/?__vbtrk=MjY5MzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
If you are reading this now **it still is not too late**** _._**
**__[But we need to act FAST](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NGT/?__vbtrk=MjY5MzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_!_**
We cannot allow this sentencing to go forward as President Trump would be wrapped up in some scam sentencing when he **_should_** be wrapped up in planning the first 100 days of his administration!
[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NGT/?__vbtrk=MjY5MzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The Democrats have proven that there is **nothing they will not do** to stop President Trump.
We don’t know what will happen if they are able to sentence President Trump for bogus false accusations before he officially becomes president...

So we need to be ready to fight back even harder!
**_[Will you stand with President Trump when he needs it most](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NGT/?__vbtrk=MjY5MzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)?_**
_With_ _Urgency_ _,_
House GOP

body:
The MOMENT the partisan judge said he’s plowing ahead with the sentencing, we called for the shameful Trump verdict to be vacated immediately. Unfortunately, the response we received was underwhelming – so now we’re trying again.

| |

_If you voted for Donald J. Trump, you ought to hear this:_

It wasn't enough to convict our future President on phony charges... Now they're racing to sentence him JUST TEN DAYS before he is sworn in as the 47th President of the United States.

The MOMENT the partisan judge said he's plowing ahead with the sentencing, we called for the shameful Trump verdict to be vacated immediately. _Unfortunately, the response we received was underwhelming - so now we're trying again._

**Now that President Trump has appealed to the Supreme Court, we're doubling down on our petition to vacate the verdict, cancel his sham sentencing, and toss out the case once and for all.**

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Winter Hits North Texas, Electrical Substation Fire, and the Gulf of Texas
body:
Up to five inches of snow, sleet, and freezing rain fell in parts of North Texas yesterday, with more expected overnight. The winter storm forced airlines to cancel nearly 2,000 flights and prompted school closures on Thursday and Friday.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFrwzAUBOBfI20x7z3JcjRoKBRvSQkNtJuRLMkWyHWwlTj598Xdux3c8cF9nbqTTTn9DGc7BVOece4IqD4AHhA6b1N-dZJ748Br5MFgI1QNxwZqPhqKRxfBRacDetDO2tCTJalc9Bp7yZPZMUAERIGAlXJKxigbYeWxJ62ZhOBTmZeqjKGEp11jfs2PsFT9PPFsxlJuKxNvjFpG7bZt1XA_hH6e9p5RS-JT1fVV7fFyEvp82ZeiXe8OmXi_frcffDH-tqWc06oaJmGYbMp_fPn378PQbwAAAP__mUJUzQ) | |
# Friday, January 10, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1901, the [Spindletop gusher](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71yhCAUQOGngW6dy5-yBUUau02b0kG56J0gOMKsu2-fSfq8wDnzfT2mh6dEef30O7r2imWSIM0NxE3AFDyl96R5cDOEu-DoxKB6A3YAwzeHRpi592DQw6IWa6y3GsAMdpkhBsXJ_cZACBBCCRBdP_c6Rj0or-0i73emAQO1cnZtw4YvX2N6lyee3VJ2ntzW2lGZ-mByZHK8rqtrdfMlJ8rYlXNlctx8DnMp30yOmNtJWJkc60E5JGzluBVKkTAFfrpwXJQS1X5gGtbdU_rbtH_dTyd_AgAA__8KZluB) came in at an oilfield south of Beaumont, spewing the black gold over 100 feet in the air until it was capped nine days later. The discovery attracted billions of dollars in search of oil in Texas, catapulting the state to a lasting position of prominence within the petroleum industry. You wouldn't know it by the weather in much of Texas, but La Niña has [officially started](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQRL_GdEa7xjZQuEhDd2lTogXbZys-QLA6uL-PLk2qdDMaafT0vm7jjXLJy_2THsHxFddRgTISUCKMnnJ5jbrybgLfYxUcto010LVgquR8wAYsYK9ptsZo07W2A9MojNZOU1tl9z4DREBsELC2k9Ux6rYh3c2q74WG4DOve80pcLjoiOW1PsNez-ujKi4xb4doPoQahBrO86y_L1re47sG4hT2vySnst6FGgrJJS8kEx1yjTHPmUp5yYNp5-DlmYhlom0LyyGXcLFQQ7U7v525lHzYVmi4PyiXXwj-18rTqZ8AAAD__4cxZM8), promising (generally) warmer and dryer winters in the southern U.S. Of course, the folks in North Texas might dispute that assessment after getting slammed with several inches of [snow and ice](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd1j8GdsFxW3c5bZbWhgOMRKGCJ8NyduvnGar7UYz0szo-7qtNxtTzPf_9gCDr1BWwcRAGaecrd7G9F5V583G_Mw7MHyUemDTyIZuN3LelADth00MapBy09xNYgYhg_XSQhfNVcY4Z5xLznivN61CUKO0anJinoli4COW2uMOCC97hvQuT6i9K0eXzI74OIn8R8RCxNJa6_PmfGhXfBlgcYf6q6grOYPDWDIRS4pPoN8PbxFO2mLG-qZHfNEzl0ZDqeDsiTSXijv9jBOxyFHqSc9ELF01_tFiSvHUI1HsftiYPr_wT1BPI34CAAD__2trbAM) yesterday. ## Winter Weather Hits North Texas
Up to five inches of snow, sleet, and freezing rain fell in [parts of North Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd1j8GdsFxW3c5bZbWhgOMRKGCJ8NyduvnGar7UYz0szo-7qtNxtTzPf_9gCDr1BWwcRAGaecrd7G9F5V583G_Mw7MHyUemDTyIZuN3LelADth00MapBy09xNYgYhg_XSQhfNVcY4Z5xLznivN61CUKO0anJinoli4COW2uMOCC97hvQuT6i9K0eXzI74OIn8R8RCxNJa6_PmfGhXfBlgcYf6q6grOYPDWDIRS4pPoN8PbxFO2mLG-qZHfNEzl0ZDqeDsiTSXijv9jBOxyFHqSc9ELF01_tFiSvHUI1HsftiYPr_wT1BPI34CAAD__2trbAM) yesterday, with more expected overnight. ## JCPenney Announces Merger
JCPenney is [merging with the parent company](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvpSAUhH8NdpjDEUELim3o3rZbmqOClw2KAd71-u83bv-amWYyM_n-fE1fFGI4tt-0O1M_Pk0I2HMQXMC0Uoj3JJvVzLCOonFG6E71MGjom5fRo5qR_KL02A3KS9Jd5xWOys9eL4NognnKQAgQohMgWjUr6b3UHclhwXFkEtwaasptfbnqPlR8vNPb5XZJexPNq9azsO4XQ8vQXtfVfheqaaX7CTC0paZ8M7R7Otzj2VUKkaF9hhlaEI-MDO3f5XTH4W5eTsoL33L6PrlP2b1d5ij47vLmMl-oUrxL5XOmYy0Mrda9HkAOAJqhbbJZzyvEGIrSTMK2U4j_39Yf8b0N_gsAAP__WMpvvA) of Brooks Brothers and Eddie Bauer to form Catalyst Brands. Marc Rosen, JCPenney’s CEO since 2021, will lead the new company, which will operate from the department store’s headquarters in Plano, with additional offices in New York, Los Angeles, and Seattle. Aéropostale, Lucky Brand, and Nautica are also [part of the merger](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7rAYjMEuKF6TLq_d0sIwxLPCYAGKk79fZfvtr67OOV_39W4pUnr8twea9gp5FVxMjAMDvnpL8b3K3puN-wV6NKBHNfFZ86nfzawgKAwOrQAnxzGg3cZJax_Coty09GQ-ZxyAA4zAYVCbkiFIPVo5O7EsneToqeUytB0bvmwN8Z2fWAaXjz6avbWzduO_Ttw6cbuua6D0xNryiZ7sZ9SJ27c7MSV8M5ePjRJWdlHbmcWSz1ybjcjylbAwSuzA8sDCcmCHjZF5Wz7ylc1awwKqL8afF8VIVelO8sdhKf6ytD_jPI34CQAA__9kmmle) between parent company Sparc Group and JCPenney. The newly formed Catalyst Brands has over $9 billion in annual revenue, 1,800 store locations, and 60,000 employees. JCPenney emerged from bankruptcy in late 2020 when it was acquired by mall operators Simon and Brookfield. Following Rosen’s hire as CEO, the company invested $1 billion in remodeling stores. However, [sales have slipped recently](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D9vgzAUBPBPY7aHbEPsMHhoBrZ07Yge-AGu_AcZJ4RvX6Wdu95JP53u6z7c0XkXl08MZMprToPk8gJcgOCDRefPoa2sGbntREVG6EZd-FXzS7UaLUbkgq6Sq2aUk1TTaAmJNFdkldaVM2-MC8GFaAQXtRpVO8-tbrC9TrLrWMvJupJyXVYq9MJ99md6Uq6nFCpv1lK2nTUfTPZM9sdx1GGP747JniI8dib7kCKdTPZTChtGR-_se9ooRjohUF5cXOBwZQWknLa0F_QEER_FTQhpo4wlZSgJ5pQDIEQ64A87YcSdLLgIm8eYmOwxw-0mMh4dVtnY7XDeu11p1vIloPO_w8u_Tz6N_AkAAP__-2t5AA), with year-over-year declines between 8% and 9% during each quarter in 2024. The partnership aims to leverage strong design capabilities, supplier relationships, and data-driven technologies. “ _Catalyst Brands brings together the rich heritage of six unique brands with modern energy and a new vision for success_ ,” [Rosen said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O4yAURp8Gd1hwjX8oKLKR2NVKWUU7RUoLh-sYCUMEJI7ffpSZevpP3zk6l9N4Ms67cPtnVlTlNccRGLSUccrZaI3z-ygqqyZmJa9Q8b7pWjb0rK0WxaTsLM68F5Ps0fRwnaRsbNNy4IMQUDn1PmOcM84bznjdTZ2YZ9E3RgxXkJIIhtaVmOqyYMGXybPf4xNTfY1r5dVSyj2T5kBAE9DbttXTI7uAOW8u4XtEQAfcMgG9xBUJ6G8iG6CBtpUENAYC-uN8-H-kv1N83Okfk-kJ0w0tvbiy0L_HM4aAOy2R6phWejTF-D0X-iuZYHOVlL1vznuXu54IdluN81-C5cdiTwWfAQAA___6Amty).
## Mayor Blasts Move to Limit Public Comment
Conroe Mayor Duke Coon [lashed out at city council members](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAUAL8GOsx7DxQtKK6x22uvNCzgSg7FILeuf3_Z66-eZCaZr9t0szHF7fFp12Dqa84TAbUCUCBM3sZ0TYp7cwc_IA8Gtexa6DW0fDG-81rNHlzrKdylIzUoZz1KGKhHbXk0bxkgAqJEwKa7d2qelZZW9Y6GgSkIPtZcmrqEGl72mNOVn6E0Lq88maXW_WDyg9HIaDzPs3FLydubMhr3nGKN7mA02lKjS4HR6PJWchCrvXIR_uc7CJfzJgiAJKi-2ZedF-P3M6YUj04zBY_VxvRXrP8ueBr6DQAA___JxV2o) on Tuesday during a discussion about limiting public comment at city council meetings, declaring that he wouldn’t abide by the new rules. "_So help me God, I won't enforce it, and you can fine me $1,500 every time I don't enforce it_ ,” he said. “ _We're going to straighten this mess up and straighten this city up._ ” In a 3-1 vote, the council approved rules that limit public comment to agenda items and prohibit more than three speakers from addressing the same item. Council members [can be fined $1,500](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuhDAURL_GdKDrF4bCRRq6TZsS-QVYMr7IeJfdv482kdKlnRmNjs7Xbb6ZmGJeP80edH0uODNgsgXaUpi9iek1i8ZrC36kTdBU8V7CoEA2m-YgBhkE9bIfFhhUzy21UjmjRmn9Ak3U7zOgFCjlFGjX214si1DciMGxcSQCgo8VS1e3UMPTnEt64SOUzuHeJL3VepyEfxA2ETZd19W98F4c5oIhh-t8zwibcojrZrFsiJ6w6bcnbDKlRpfCX9Qed5uiax3ue8i1NWvI3rQOMbcMgHKlRHdsR1O0P66YUjx7RQSsu4npB6n-6-ih2XcAAAD__w3nagc) if they respond to comments that don’t pertain to an agenda item. "_I refuse to stand by one more day and allow these types of things to continue. I'm calling for full transparency today. In fact, I'm not calling for it, I'm demanding it,_ ” Coon said.

The discovery attracted billions of dollars in search of oil in Texas, catapulting the state to a lasting position of prominence within the petroleum industry. JCPenney Announces Merger JCPenney is of Brooks Brothers and Eddie Bauer to form Catalyst Brands. Marc Rosen, JCPenney’s CEO since 2021, will lead the new company, which will operate from the department store’s headquarters in Plano, with additional offices in New York, Los Angeles, and Seattle. Aéropostale, Lucky Brand, and Nautica are also between parent company Sparc Group and JCPenney. The newly formed Catalyst Brands has over $9 billion in annual revenue, 1,800 store locations, and 60,000 employees. JCPenney emerged from bankruptcy in late 2020 when it was acquired by mall operators Simon and Brookfield. Following Rosen’s hire as CEO, the company invested $1 billion in remodeling stores. Mayor Blasts Move to Limit Public Comment Conroe Mayor Duke Coon on Tuesday during a discussion about limiting public comment at city council meetings, declaring that he wouldn’t abide by the new rules. "So help me God, I won't enforce it, and you can fine me $1,500 every time I don't enforce it ,” he said. “ We're going to straighten this mess up and straighten this city up. ” In a 3-1 vote, the council approved rules that limit public comment to agenda items and prohibit more than three speakers from addressing the same item. Council members if they respond to comments that don’t pertain to an agenda item. "I refuse to stand by one more day and allow these types of things to continue. Former President George W. ## Judge Blocks Biden's Title IX Rewrite
A federal judge in Kentucky struck down the Biden administration's wide-ranging [expansion of Title IX rules](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtu6zAQBb9G6mjs8iGRBYvbuPNtUwoUdylvQEuORNjx3wdOn_LgAIPBfFymS5Iq6_I_3Ti2sk0atFOACmGiJPU12Z5iYdZseo44msGB997314ieIGmr5zGZGTMXymHAkBNaxgyml_imASIgGmvtCYsfwozJuZkLmNRZYJK27afPTdZ25VJf24P3U95ufY3X1u5HZ_51-tzpc7qv_Dze13vsTXLlTp-btMpKvlVd5val2p7WY-GVeFezEK9qAMc0hqT1YEyxeQwIzodgyTM54n6PdH9KrXIMY2dhuSWpvwbtryKPqH8CAAD__zT9YZA) for LGBTQ+ students, finding that the Education Department overstepped its authority. U.S. District Judge Danny C. Reeves found the administration's [1,500-page document](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSozAQRL9GZFCjEUIiUHCJMl96ITWgka0rGblANsvfb7H5Jh11db96_27TjVJO6_0vPdnVWCYE1C3IVsIUKOVz6pvgIjOyathJowYN1lrbPNwyk51HO-pRDWaOSMOAinSQRmFUi2ySu9ZASpBS9X3fyWiHcZak9cwRFIkeOKRatu5_SWt9cMxn-fDWLeXZZPeo9bUL9UegF-iP4-jeO9US6LwKAv1ey3YK9Csfu0DP4b1QTWUV6K9ngR7kFaNAP6fAa1tTzdymr3Z7Z97bDy1UOQj0xmgLvQUAI9A3mwuvI-Wc9sGIHu5PSvmHqv5m6ePwOwAA__8x-WYm), which expanded the law's scope beyond biological sex, violated the Constitution and the First Amendment. The ruling effectively ends rules that had already been blocked in multiple states. The decision, which returns Title IX interpretation to its [previous status quo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQAL8Gd0SwBoMLite4y2uvtDCswybYjuxNcvn7U66_eqQZab7O4zlSpfXyPy4YeN5GUGCl0lKrMUeq79E0OcyIgG2DQbu2s8p775sSrIupMy732NsIPiftUvJz77OCPvqpofCxKa2V1q0x5qRn3_WTjtZOOKs2CqMwE2_76brRygXn-t6euJ_StjQ1FOb7Idp_AgYBAxcsVOuHCRjKtuCKr0PAcHBklK_IqQgYrHIOnJY3XPmRbm95feQLyv1R8ZATZVwlE1eU9C1gaPaQ7y-qlY7OCaMuS6TfRMN_7XgG-AkAAP__WVJiIA), was made in response to a lawsuit filed by Tennessee, Kentucky, Indiana, Ohio, Virginia, and West Virginia.
## LA Fires Kill Five, Force 180,000 to Flee
The iconic Hollywood sign gained a reprieve Thursday morning as firefighters successfully contained the Sunset Fire that erupted Wednesday evening in the Hollywood Hills, causing traffic chaos on Hollywood Boulevard. [See a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAUheGngW4M9wKKBcU2drPtlgblMjJBmSDRnbffuP10JznJl_w_9_HuYorb49utZGvIIwrUNwE3EKN3Mb1Hxb0NREiSk4VOtloYYwxfLLTey2AAoVeu68mT0L7XHqbQK4TAo700ASAApFKqgWDafgKn9URBSMeUIB9rLs0zx60uFNI7H1SaOa882aXW187kF8OB4XCeZzNN8_UxHDY6d4bDET3la8ymPAsc5RdV5sX61xlTinvbMSUeq4vp36yfGg-LfwEAAP__jKtStg). Five other wildfires continue to ravage Los Angeles for a third day. The fires have killed five people, destroyed at least 4,000 structures, and forced more than 180,000 people to evacuate, with officials expecting the death toll to rise. Follow [live updates here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL8Gb0R3GGM8MHTxlq4drUs4kquIsQyNlb-v0r3zk97T-zovZ5Is6-2THhxaKosBM2hAjbBEkvxabBdDYjbcdxxw7N0A3nvf3QMQToCQxgFhHK48OucRJ3TT5PliUyfhbQNEQOyttSdM3k0XpGG4cIKelAWO0sp--i6ytjun_CpP3k_X8uhyuLe2VdV_KDMrM9O28lHfSJk5y5OVmQ_JMcnOOpeqab1x5qo3ylIpctVMraz6Z4vUuHZ7iNshOUt1o7Jwe5Dkv1L77_wZzG8AAAD__-aiWz8). The largest blaze, the Palisades fire, has already consumed about 26.9 square miles along the coast. More than 425,000 people remain without power, and infrastructure is severely damaged, though calming winds may give firefighters a chance to contain the blazes. See [photos from social media](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL8GOkdrYwgULl5Dl9deiTbsOuydYSPblyh_f8r1V480Gs3HZbmgJDlu_3HnUKMuDlxvwBoLC6Gk1-JbCpHZcddysOdu6GEcx7HdgvdxnAg672HCAdm7M4EdnCMH05WmVsLbBtaCtZ33_mTjOExXi31_5QgdNh6YpGo-faocdeOYXvrgfFp1b1PYar2XpvvXuLlxs35XUs3lDRs3l03XLzlu5r5p1WLwIPMQYi0mZt3Nikmi5kPQPCVRlMzFxKRKpugqmMzOJNi4uc2B7k9JScpwbjzcdpT0m1D_WvII7icAAP__HRllFQ). Among those who lost their homes in the fires are [celebrities](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngS0W94IBDwxdvKVrRwvMJabCJrJRrPTpK3fvdqQjfdL_dZ_uPpe8PT79Sq6lOqHA_ibgBmKKPpf3pHh0iQhJcnJgpO6FtdbyxRmrdQ-D8oOORAajH6zEFIIha4UYeHaXJgAEgFRKdZCsHgL4vg-UhPRMCYq51b37rnlrC6Xyri_au7muvLiltefB5AfDkeF4nmcXwnx9DMeNzoPh6PeW50LXnPd1W_EBP0ZVvrv4PHMp-dCGKfFYfS5_avuv8uXwNwAA__8BSFMk) Paris Hilton, Billy Crystal, Adam Brody, and James Woods.

body:
The pieces are set for us to back MAGA into a corner and win.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hWlSvTPgKgsl8OH9-STu6vrcXgaykH82LZIyLD3ZISMXPuXbMHOEIOZibgR4ZoNKwdScpxfwoA3yePhjILDhTVxt_vAZ0iQVePK6RBAFZShtZZJJFoUt5ClkWgku-CWpNLgywWjoBcNukQk5j89_yy81x6eAxZWv-Q2F3RhRReGaJmMGIO0kD-0xg8WY3zNs8eus7lxoVQqgX_rgLrCUZPWumTjS4yCETYhyQRqErkA=&c=p_Hk1QKqtSS4NWwxdP6FTaMZTDAhEfzLxQ8le72oiepQRG_JE1LW6Q==&ch=z9aCBY9aVRRE6TzTfUNYdIbL1gbqe_64Zb-A_P_672s_e4P2YEKPtA==)

| | | | Team,
It's no secret: Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress have been scheming to dismantle our democracy piece by piece.
But their razor-thin majority in the House has left them in a precarious position--one wrong move, and their plans fall apart.
This is where you and I come in...
I'm Josh Weil, a public school teacher and Democrat running in the first special election of 2025. Together, we have the opportunity to deliver the ultimate checkmate to Trump and his GOP cronies by flipping Florida's 6th Congressional District blue.
With this victory, we can:

* Stop MAGA extremists from steamrolling Trump's Project 2025 agenda through Congress.
* Block efforts to ban books, defund public schools, and strip away reproductive rights.
* Prevent the razor-thin GOP majority from pushing their dangerous policies forward.

This isn't just about one election--it's about protecting the future of our democracy.
---
| | | | [But this fight is going to take all of us. Special elections like this are won by grassroots power--people like you stepping up when it matters most. That's why I'm asking: will you chip in $20, $50, or whatever you can spare to help us flip this seat and deliver the ultimate checkmate?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hWlSvTPgKgsl8OH9-STu6vrcXgaykH82LZIyLD3ZISMXPuXbMHOEIOZibgR4ZoNK-ewZ1MM8TnKx4wupobMz9bJX7rF-zQWtaxIRdtJGsWG95r1AzNTmJcR0qoCjs0Jet8eZLbrz2oTxrxYAQwzXf9hpg58xv_FM2BWX26ttViEPQJ6aGyTop1_12XsJIxRVgbhXcVKM1U5KVrvqE7zWbwBsIN43YFia&c=p_Hk1QKqtSS4NWwxdP6FTaMZTDAhEfzLxQ8le72oiepQRG_JE1LW6Q==&ch=z9aCBY9aVRRE6TzTfUNYdIbL1gbqe_64Zb-A_P_672s_e4P2YEKPtA==)

name: History Facts
subject: How cats helped win an ancient battle 🐈
body:
Even the most dedicated ailurophile will admit that felines can be vicious when tested, but cats didn’t help the Persians win an ancient battle because of their sharp claws. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cfuznhqdybzmxmev29au5u9s74yq2yg0i1q70ct47ypev4826dfvb4ygyk7dfhma759uc1vbb3u9eqk8dko07elhshwhql23oym4qdvp6ik7bj3av89bn69dwoq3fpzbi84wo0dhq45lx9y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spvg9l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Cats helped win an ancient battle.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spvg9l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spvg9l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spvg9l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| E ven the most dedicated ailurophile will admit that felines can be vicious when tested, but cats didn’t [help](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spvg9l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the Persians win an ancient battle because of their sharp claws. Rather, the Persians emerged victorious against Egypt in the 525 BCE Battle of Pelusium by using cats, ibises, and other animals the Egyptians considered sacred as hostages. According to the Greek historian Polyaenus, the Egyptians dared not fire their arrows when their Persian opponents held cats aloft in front of them, allowing the latter to take the city of Pelusium with relative ease. This decisive victory led the First Persian Empire (also known as the Achaemenid Empire) to take the pharaoh’s throne for Cambyses II, beginning the 27th Dynasty of Egypt under Achaemenid rule.
---
Cats are hardly the only animal to grace the battlefield with their presence throughout history. Elephants and horses are perhaps the beasts of burden most famous for their wartime contributions, but camels, dogs, pigeons, oxen, and even bears have seen combat, too. There are various monuments and memorials to their service across the world, as well as the Dickin Medal, an honor first bestowed by the People’s Dispensary for Sick Animals (PDSA) in 1943. Initially created for animals who served Britain in World War II, it has been given to 32 messenger pigeons, 38 dogs, four horses, and, yes, one very good cat.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spvg9l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spvg9l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Cats aren’t nocturnal.
Everyone with a cat knows that felines love running around at night, especially when their humans are trying to sleep. Despite that, cats aren’t actually nocturnal — they’re [crepuscular](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spvg9l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), meaning they’re most active during dusk and dawn. The reason they prefer these times of day has to do with their hunting instincts, as their eyes are well attuned to low-light conditions that allow them to see their prey while remaining hidden themselves. And because cats are descended from desert hunters, dusk and dawn are also favorable due to cooler temperatures. This doesn’t stop them from sleeping all day, of course, but they’re always ready to wake up in an instant — an adaptation that helps keep them safe from predators and alert to opportunities for tiny prey.

clean_body: Even the most dedicated ailurophile will admit that felines can be vicious when tested, but cats didn’t help the Persians win an ancient battle because of their sharp claws. | E ven the most dedicated ailurophile will admit that felines can be vicious when tested, but cats didn’t the Persians win an ancient battle because of their sharp claws. Rather, the Persians emerged victorious against Egypt in the 525 BCE Battle of Pelusium by using cats, ibises, and other animals the Egyptians considered sacred as hostages. According to the Greek historian Polyaenus, the Egyptians dared not fire their arrows when their Persian opponents held cats aloft in front of them, allowing the latter to take the city of Pelusium with relative ease. This decisive victory led the First Persian Empire (also known as the Achaemenid Empire) to take the pharaoh’s throne for Cambyses II, beginning the 27th Dynasty of Egypt under Achaemenid rule. Cats are hardly the only animal to grace the battlefield with their presence throughout history. Elephants and horses are perhaps the beasts of burden most famous for their wartime contributions, but camels, dogs, pigeons, oxen, and even bears have seen combat, too. There are various monuments and memorials to their service across the world, as well as the Dickin Medal, an honor first bestowed by the People’s Dispensary for Sick Animals (PDSA) in 1943. Initially created for animals who served Britain in World War II, it has been given to 32 messenger pigeons, 38 dogs, four horses, and, yes, one very good cat. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Length (in years) of the Achaemenid Empire’s reign 228 | | Pedigreed cat breeds recognized by the Cat Fanciers’ Association 45 | Pedigreed cat breeds recognized by the Cat Fanciers’ Association 45 | | Percentage of DNA shared by cats and tigers 95.6% | | Length (in years) of Pepi II’s reign, the longest of any pharaoh 94 | Length (in years) of Pepi II’s reign, the longest of any pharaoh 94 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Cats aren’t nocturnal. Everyone with a cat knows that felines love running around at night, especially when their humans are trying to sleep. Despite that, cats aren’t actually nocturnal — they’re , meaning they’re most active during dusk and dawn. The reason they prefer these times of day has to do with their hunting instincts, as their eyes are well attuned to low-light conditions that allow them to see their prey while remaining hidden themselves. And because cats are descended from desert hunters, dusk and dawn are also favorable due to cooler temperatures. This doesn’t stop them from sleeping all day, of course, but they’re always ready to wake up in an instant — an adaptation that helps keep them safe from predators and alert to opportunities for tiny prey. clean_body: Find out which states we’re going to FLIP next year >> [via Roll Call] Friend, Historically, midterm elections favor the party that's outside of power. We're trying to make sure 2026 looks different. For the first two years of President Trump's second term, Republicans will hold a 53-47 Majority in the upper chamber. But with prime pickup opportunities in Georgia and Michigan on the horizon, there's no reason for us to settle. President Trump enjoyed emphatic victories in Georgia and Michigan this past November. With early investments in the 2026 Senate races in both these states, we can knock off the Democrats' incumbents and expand our Majority to one of the largest in recent memory. body:
And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:

| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=63e748a2c3de4ff3a2fe250ed0d24522&_e=Xszlfa2lCBz58tCoeKrXq8acEeiGTbvnnDkG_VHbVm66dYtBabZv-N-mhMQZBSxgbJ8NwffUswmEjvy6lP6s-_RaOg9AOz7G2pyV3poufOLKA0RuRjZTyBNjNES4vsnwcdvBhsIA8xRs5wyB6643Sv-QzPVXvHRS-BGdYCHLfIFXz9go-ybudOYtJOlS2OSJftnDXnEuW2E_WGvCf-YMRk7dYlnZUD7RIfWYtMIrI8WND7OnkxHGig7X1Wre7vm1LtyZ7-LPIali6VEWg9RH6_Na911pjDE-sHI8KxX_rptK2Hb7mUg4Y5LKJ1Y0Xl05VDbUr2u-QvKkGhh7pbBAcrpcEfy5qQ-6jCNZbuFOJLDy9qBs8AJWnaV3IiHb6YoO4uxf42i8zhF6y_ux02byYg_JBo0jzOyD2LJ4LsO96jE9QBBSOcI2ISOJgz9b07lgF78U730VF5adwr3StbHtnA%3D%3D "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/01/democrat-state-rep-la-shawn-ford-files-bill-to-recall-chicago-mayor-in-special-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7fe4346318-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Ill. State Rep. La Shawn Ford (D-Chicago). (Fox 32 Chicago/video screenshot)
By Illinois Review

Illinois Democratic State Representative La Shawn Ford has once again filed legislation that creates an official mechanism to recall a Chicago Mayor – a measure that he has supported in previous legislative sessions dating back to Mayor Rahm Emanuel.

House Bill 1084 “establishes a procedure for a special recall election to recall the Mayor of Chicago and the election of a successor mayor at a special successor election or special runoff election.”

But the introduction of this legislation has a greater significance this year as Mayor Brandon Johnson’s approval rating sits at 15 percent – a historic low for any mayor since Chicago’s incorporation in 1833. The city’s crime problems, lack of police resources available to protect the community and the migrant crisis is turning residents and his own city council members against him.

Since his surprise election in the Spring of 2023, his administration has been mired in controversy, highlighting his inexperience and inability to manage a big city like Chicago.

subject: ❗A Word About 2025, A Spiritual Perspective❗
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/rachelhamm/a-word-about-2025-a-spiritual-perspective?e=5fa0631807)

** Keys for Success in 2025: A Call to Focus Fiercely and Overcome Fear
------------------------------------------------------------

**
As we've just entered 2025, I have a message about focusing our energy and overcoming the obstacles that might hold us back from living a life of significance.
------------------------------------------------------------

**
What Does God Want Us to Focus On in 2025?
Drawing inspiration from 1 Corinthians 9:24-27, we're called to run our race with purpose and discipline, like an Olympic boxer preparing for competition. This year brings a significant shift from previous years of spiritual battles to a season of focused productivity.

Three Key Areas of Focus:
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Becoming highly fruitful by increasing productivity
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Refusing to become afraid no matter what we see/hear
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Living a life of significance byway of being focused
------------------------------------------------------------

** How Can We Prepare Like a Spiritual Athlete?
------------------------------------------------------------

** Just as a boxer prepares for a match, we need to:
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Strengthen ourselves spiritually
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Know our opponent's tactics
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Practice discipline and self-control
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Stay focused on our specific calling
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Be courageous
------------------------------------------------------------

** What Challenges Should We Watch For?
------------------------------------------------------------

** Two main spiritual attacks to be aware of:
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Spirit of Death - Creating worry about mortality and loss
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Spirit of Fear - Generating anxiety and distraction from our purpose
------------------------------------------------------------

** These spirits work together to derail us from our God-given focus and productivity.
------------------------------------------------------------

** How Do We Overcome These Challenges?
------------------------------------------------------------

** To stay on track:
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** No matter what we see or hear, refuse to agree with spirits of fear and death
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Maintain focus on your specific calling
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Exercise spiritual disciplines
------------------------------------------------------------
*
** Remember your purpose & stay focused on it
------------------------------------------------------------

** Life Application
------------------------------------------------------------

** From Episode #47, take these practical steps:
Identify your specific field of calling - What has God uniquely equipped you to do? Evaluate your current activities - Are they aligned with your calling or are they just "busy work"? We can justify ourselves with our busyness, but it's important to evaluate whether or not our time is being spent wisely, or if it's just being spent. In 2025 we need to shift from merely filling our time, to making the most of it.

Practice refusing fear - When worried thoughts come, actively choose faith over fear. We can practice refocusing our thoughts and refusing to become fearful. In 2025 we're likely to see things that could create anxiety in us. Let's decide NOW that we won't give fear a place in our hearts and minds.

Questions to reflect on:
------------------------------------------------------------
1.
** What specific area has God called me to focus on this year?
------------------------------------------------------------
2.
** Am I spending my time on truly significant activities or just staying busy?
------------------------------------------------------------
3.
** How can I better steward the talents God has given me?
------------------------------------------------------------
4.
** What fears am I allowing to distract me from my purpose?
------------------------------------------------------------

** Remember, this is a year to move from mere activity to meaningful impact. Focus your energy on what truly matters and refuse to let fear derail your purpose.
------------------------------------------------------------
To watch Episode #47 of The Rachel Hamm Show where I discuss all this and more, click here:
https://youtu.be/ab4SbXOqCNk?si=576-4gqn7YFxEnsX
PLAY THIS EPISODE OF THE RACHEL HAMM SHOW (https://youtu.be/ab4SbXOqCNk?si=576-4gqn7YFxEnsX)
