clean_body: On April 1, we can stop Trump's MAGA agenda by winning back the House in this special election. | | | | | == | | | | Team, As of today, we have 81 days to defeat Donald Trump's handpicked MAGA puppet in this special election--a crucial test coming at the perfect time: during Trump's first 100 days in office. With this election, we have the chance to kneecap the Project 2025 agenda in Congress and place a sorely-needed check on the Trump White House. If we win, the House will flip to Democrats. That means we will retake the majority. Democrats will be able to launch investigations, create special committees, and subpoena documents. And we can fight for truth and accountability at the exact moment Trump and Elon Musk will be sharpening their knives to dismantle the federal government to enrich themselves. That is what is at stake, and it's why we need the biggest grassroots army we can muster to take on the entire MAGA universe. They know that failure here means disaster for Project 2025, so they won't be rolling over. But neither will we--not while we have anything to say about it. | | | | == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | | | == | | | | Thank you for being a part of this fight. Together, we can stop the MAGA agenda in its tracks and build a brighter, more inclusive future for all. With Gratitude, Josh Weil Democrat for Congress, FL-06 | | | | | == | | | | Josh Weil for Congress | 8381 Citrus Chase Drive | Orlando, FL 32836 US | |

name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: January Newsletter
body:
The unidentified drones over New Jersey captured
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
#### Teichert in the Trenches - January 2025
Welcome to the second installment of Teichert in the Trenches, a monthly newsletter highlighting a snippet of my attempts to maximize my impact on people and our great nation and to develop the leaders our nation needs! ** _Teichert in the News_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeFuBmP64SPACXkt7Xr7g/QUEOXelehz02)
---
| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG13EXv1dZJgdaBrW9hw/_sCN-8OJT4bp)
---
| | | The unidentified drones over New Jersey captured the attention of the news and the public for a big portion of December. I did interviews about this topic on Fox News, Newsmax, Todd Starnes, the Family Research Council, the Wilkow Majority, John Catsimatidis, 77 WABC Radio, Fox Baltimore, and KSQM. I was traveling during the height of the interest in the middle of December, and had some great friends host me in their homes to conduct some of these interviews. Please see a sampling of the discussions above.
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG7uggjyojTAjPUbUSIC/PYq9G6lJLm3U)
---
| | | The link above is to my YouTube Channel. It includes several speaking and media engagements over the years. Please subscribe to get notified of any new content. ** _Thoughts by Teichert_**
---
| | | | [ "On the Wings of Honor" Podcast](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGEm8pYvztcepEnLSksS/rQwJ240LTpuV "Apple podcast")
---
| | | I thoroughly enjoyed an engaging leadership and resilience discussion with Todd Blyleven on his amazing podcast – I'm Going In.
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGLdayNtB3m8v465R3Si/1XGalE420xzY)
---
It was a blessing to join Pastor Moore at Fountain City Baptist Church in Prattville, Alabama and Pastor Gilbert and Dr Green at Lakewood Baptist Church in Harrison, Tennessee to preach on the Sunday after Thanksgiving.
| | | | [ Snapping back our National Security Culture ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGSV37CqMDvd0tOpPM2y/ow5OqutlfICA)
---
| | | A return to American national security strength "starts with relentlessly focused leadership and a resurrected culture that emphasizes constitutionally grounded, mission-focused and merit-based institutions." It was great to get these thoughts published in _The Daily Caller_.
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGZMVG1nXO576ihZNedE/A9t6ZaxLQKGT)
---
| | | The Audiobook version of BOOM! is now uploaded and available at all the normal audiobook venues. You can find the exclusive site with two free chapters at the link above. ** _Teichert in the Trenches_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | **_Behind the Scenes_**
---
| | |
---
| | | As we end the Year of the Dragon later this month, I share with you the picture above that was the logo I intended to use during the last several months of my campaign for U.S. Senate. It combines the colors of the great state of Maryland, a pilot’s helmet with a tough-looking dragon image on the side (my fighter pilot callsign was Dragon), and the year of 2024. Based on the timing, I never rolled out this image to the public, but I still love it!
---
|
---
I created my audiobook at Capitol Hill Studios and with the help of the Capitol Hill School of Broadcasting. Here is a picture of me doing my best to stay on track during one of the long sessions of reading to myself and into the microphone. ** _My Bookshelf_**
| | | |
---
I deeply appreciated a year of morning devotions punctuated by an annual reading plan that took me from Genesis 1:1 to Revelation 22:21. Job 23:12 “Neither have I gone back from the commandment of his lips; I have esteemed the words of his mouth more than my necessary food.”
| | | |
---
“In an environment where senior military leaders seem more concerned with following political ideologies than maintaining military readiness, it has been left to others to take a stand in defense of our country and our Constitution. Individual service members, nonprofit organizations, lawyers, and now federal judges can clearly see what senior civilian and uniformed military leaders can apparently not see. Separating some of the most capable and conscientious service members in the face of growing international threats, with a concurrent and self-inflicted recruiting crisis, will have military readiness implications that could threaten the very existence of our nation. These leaders prioritized political ideologies and rigidly enforced a politically charged vaccine mandate that trampled the Constitutional rights of service members. These actions destroyed the trust of service members and broke faith with the American people. The subsequent recruiting crisis is the natural consequence of such actions and will not be reversed until the unlawfulness is stopped, politicized military leaders are removed, and trust with the American people is rebuilt.”
| | | |
---
| | | These two wonderful works about the power and truth of Christmas were a key part of the season for me this year. I strongly recommend you pick up copies of both to help celebrate in 2025. \- Chappell: “Of course, the reason we have these songs – and the holiday at all – is Jesus’ birth. Aside from the death and resurrection of Christ, nothing has inspired poets and songwriters like this amazing event. God came into our world. He took on our flesh, came as a tiny, helpless baby, and gave His life to redeem us. This is an incredible story – one truly worth singing about. And sing about it we do.” \- Mohler: “Christian, the Word indeed became flesh. Believe it and live like you believe it. Don’t let this season pass you by without letting the truth that God’s Son came into the world to save you fill you with an unconquerable joy. We celebrate Christmas because we believe in the truth of the gospel of Jesus Christ. We believe every single biblical claim of the Christmas story. All of it was a fulfillment of God’s promises, and everything recorded – all the supernatural beauty of God breaking into the world – should steady our minds and nourish our souls.”
---
|
---
“Hurry and love are incompatible. All my worst moments as a father, a husband, and a pastor, even as a human being, are when I’m in a hurry – late for an appointment, behind on my unrealistic to-do list, trying to cram too much into my day. I ooze anger, tension, a critical nagging – the antithesis of love.”
|
---
“Common Sense made public a persuasive and impassioned case for independence, which had not yet been given serious intellectual consideration. Paine connected independence with common dissenting Protestant beliefs as a means to present a distinctly American policy identity and structured Common Sense as if it were a sermon.” ** _PLUS Posts for the Month_**
|
---
| [ Modern Day Spiritual Revival (Dec 7th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGgDxOqkiYEbCY0JLxDU/f8F3ajR9x4jf)
---
| [ Sharing in the Hardships... (Dec 14th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGn5PXfhtiO5INJ3KFnk/ca-mYeDc2_zG)
---
| [ The Christmas Sprit Lives (Dec 21st)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGtwrgUf4sXZOCbnIYO0/9TFd_Wu7aN04)
---
| [ The Deciding Factor (Dec 28th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDhYHcZvsAP4JMNKzgWGO/dJd7hF9kBcLr)
---
| | | **_Blasts from the Past_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsE9szp0KEGKEZQCiofFyS/89NClMZaXtvY)
---
In early January 2019, we launched our ground-breaking innovation campaign at Edwards Air Force Base. This Innovation Manifesto video played a major role in our pace-setting cultural transformation that truly broke barriers, challenged convention, and ignited innovation.
| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsEcDi1QiaMFOpU26ddzgW/jPrDswsei2Bz)
---
I thoroughly enjoyed attending Wreaths Across America this past year in my hometown of Port Angeles, Washington. In 2023, I gave this keynote speech at the Crownsville Veterans Cemetery in Maryland.
| | | |
---
| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
| You've received it because you've subscribed to our newsletter.
---
| [View in browser](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/mr/sh/SMJz09SDriOHUOWhOt45QHGsupy4/37HJka68Uw-4)| [Unsubscribe](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/un/sh/SMJz09a0vkbXqU0NAdDsZ4A0AXaC/z7FiZ8N7xfqU)
---

name: Trump Watch (via DLCC.org)
subject: Are you ready to fight back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Trump and his administration are set on implementing Project 2025, silencing political opponents, and enriching their right-wing buddies while leaving working people in the dust. | | |
---
| |
---|---
[](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPfr0A4dBpd_CC4Uqnpn8KTZt7svu-Jol9bu9JpHJXHAhx3eDF_Lf16uyfveRy4HUox9BfczaZyXQl1PMzwv4rKEqo7bb_mbWLSIcdfn1NaB7LbxjZ87LiJrbhNkTDROo6rvTQJLJwPr-biF8BSnNA26ml2lJnxH9QCGqD6T7Y47aDCyO5sBrpjKMGF7GEFanbb-pPHBdkaW89B1hhXhLiAUzEjBNkTHkDP1dvPDYzCuhEWDBjMM3JYxTvUbXTumZQrokqdPzE24CmQIpsO6MHYvmJcpxakqF1249VRvrus4Z-11GTPkzfjWH_fGA8oGuyM6xnzghkRpnU7zJuQpXbuvmb1XmWZp1baCFL5XBP6A8k/4d1/PPuJPWGrQ9KBtQW5pdjMew/h0/h001.PGuQk2FZtZ-M4Fs7-4W6eDe-A1y57LyCMY-jtzjx86E) On January 20th, Donald Trump will be sworn in as the 47th President of the United States. Trump and his administration are set on implementing Project 2025, silencing political opponents, and enriching their right-wing buddies while leaving working people in the dust – _and with a Republican-controlled Congress, they will be able to wreak even more havoc._ **From rolling back health care protections to ignoring the looming climate crisis, they’ve made their priorities clear: Trump and his cronies will put corporate interests above creating economic opportunity for working people.** [But we can counter their efforts in statehouses nationwide. name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: New year, new Legislature in the Commonwealth
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter!New year, new Legislature in the Commonwealth.Republicans control the state Senate 27-22, the same balance the chamber had last session. Democrats maintained their one-seat state House majority in November.The new legislative session started Tuesday in Harrisburg, kicking off a two-year period that will likely feature debates over minimum wage, transit funding, the size of the budget, marijuana legalization, and more. Meanwhile, this November, voters in PA will have the power to elect judges or remove judges and justices for the bench in nonpartisan retention election voting. Three PA Supreme Court Justices will be on the ballot for retention voting this Fall. #CourtsMatter #WhenWeVoteWeWin
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
# Why Courts Matter 201
---
Thursday January 30th
6:30-8:00PM
Online via Zoom

We will be hosting our second virtual town hall alongside **_Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania_** , on the importance of our state and federal courts.
---
[ **RSVP here**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YhVueAlOBMb0se9nBbj0OBKxWIYHr3D3kJ-2BAjmyFPsLum57T2GzASBq6JjnSuuR564kCs8eq92anljVtxZcRNh7VWDjPjSpWYg9I7ne1ZzrEQcqHG0BFgMABqbjhPEg4U-2FUHzxQat5kqbIzsC-2BPeT6i3g-2FbICncyr3mGOoyYfc6ETxCk_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYeVLZpkZlO-2Fc1f-2BpM3f3I-2BMvzkaph6bJ2woXghBIFzaT9JF8g5Rronlcj4383rEEkayHGywawP2bM5YlvIgOfuvMN7F8I0vNkrNIX-2BMCINe4aagWBV52-2B5FrtoOswYdSq6rj6nGUnNEJ1NMnpp8thmvmKeXvibPqjGVlo7JpLFWkRHzaYyLvJ6yAiW0FOwV2b)

City & State Pennsylvania published its ranking of the _100 women who are powering change throughout the Commonwealth_.

Featured in the _CSPA 2024 Power of Diversity: Women 100_ article, by Hilary Danailova, are New Pennsylvania Project's board member and Speaker of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives, **Joanna McClinton** , as well as our founding CEO, **Kadida Kenner**.

clean_body: | | | | | Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter!New year, new Legislature in the Commonwealth.Republicans control the state Senate 27-22, the same balance the chamber had last session. Democrats maintained their one-seat state House majority in November.The new legislative session started Tuesday in Harrisburg, kicking off a two-year period that will likely feature debates over minimum wage, transit funding, the size of the budget, marijuana legalization, and more. Meanwhile, this November, voters in PA will have the power to elect judges or remove judges and justices for the bench in nonpartisan retention election voting. Three PA Supreme Court Justices will be on the ballot for retention voting this Fall. #CourtsMatter #WhenWeVoteWeWin | | | | | Why Courts Matter 201 Thursday January 30th 6:30-8:00PM Online via Zoom We will be hosting our second virtual town hall alongside Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania , on the importance of our state and federal courts. | | City & State Pennsylvania published its ranking of the 100 women who are powering change throughout the Commonwealth. Featured in the CSPA 2024 Power of Diversity: Women 100 article, by Hilary Danailova, are New Pennsylvania Project's board member and Speaker of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives, Joanna McClinton , as well as our founding CEO, Kadida Kenner. | | Every Pennsylvanian deserves reliable healthcare they can afford, no matter their job, income, or background. Programs like Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security, SNAP, and the Affordable Care Act help millions of families stay healthy, feed their children, and retire with dignity. Earlier this week, SEIU, Campaign for a Family Friendly Economy, New Pennsylvania Project, and Planned Parenthood joined outside Rep. Fitzpatrick’s district office to demand no cuts to Medicaid and other critical care programs. | | | | | | | "The federal judge who oversaw the classified documents case against President-elect Donald Trump temporarily blocked the release of special counsel Jack Smith’s report on his investigation Tuesday. The injunction lasts until three days after the 11th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals rules on a pending request to block the release of the report over a separate matter involving Trump co-defendants Walt Nauta and Carlos De Oliveira." Joe Biden vetoed a bipartisan bill that would add 63 new federal judges over the next decade, explaining that the bill “fails to resolve key questions” about the allocation of judges and senior status judges. "After a bruising Presidential election and a slew of fights over control of Congress and the state legislature, maybe you thought 2025 would at least be largely free of bitterly partisan election battles. Don’t get your hopes up. Pennsylvania voters will decide next year whether three sitting state Supreme Court justices should remain on the bench for another 10-year term. Those retention votes usually get little attention — but observers say they could become yet another partisan battleground." “The U.S. Justice Department wants a judge to declare that a Pennsylvania city’s method of electing council members citywide instead of by districts has illegally diluted the political power of its growing Hispanic population, arguing in a lawsuit that Hazleton is violating the federal Voting Rights Act. A complaint filed Tuesday in Scranton federal court claims the “at-large” system “results in Hispanic citizens not having an equal opportunity to participate in the political process and to elect candidates of their choice.”” “It’s unclear exactly how many Philadelphians might be directly affected by Trump’s tougher immigration policies. The Migration Policy Institute, a Washington, D.C. think tank, estimated in 2019 that the city was home to 47,000 undocumented immigrants.” “As President-elect Donald Trump takes direct aim at federal climate policy, states and their attorneys general are preparing to fight back. In California, the governor has asked legislators for $25 million to fight off any effort by Trump to upend the state’s climate friendly initiatives... But in Pennsylvania, one of the largest energy producers in the country where voters narrowly voted for Trump, it’s unclear just how stiff that resistance will be if the incoming president follows through with his vows to shred President Biden’s environmental agenda and cancel funds for clean energy projects.” | | | Last day to register to vote: Monday, May 5, 2025 Primary Election: Tuesday, May 20, 2025 Last day to register to vote for the General Election: Monday, October 20, 2025 Last day to request mail-in ballot: Tuesday, October 28, 2025 General Election: Tuesday, November 4, 2025 | Important Links: Voter Hotlines: Voter Protection Hotline: 1-866-OUR-VOTEDOS PA Voter Hotline: 1-877-VOTESPA Spanish/English Hotline: 1-866-VE-Y-VOTAAsian Languages Hotline: 1-888-API-VOTE Arabic/English Hotline: 1-844-YALLA-US | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 4126996771 | | | | | ---|---|---

* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**Dallas weather: Winter storm's snow, icy precipitation departing DFW,** " Dallas Morning News' **Lana Ferguson** , **Jamie Landers** and **Alex Nguyen** -- "Drivers in North Texas [were cautioned to be extremely careful](https://substack.com/redirect/18b1d293-e52c-4805-9293-27d6c50abe2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Friday after the region was [blasted with wintry precipitation](https://substack.com/redirect/d53fc4d3-a95f-4d57-b703-6e8a2edb55fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and below-freezing temperatures overnight, according to the National Weather Service.

Caution should also be maintained throughout the day, as the area could see black ice in the evening and into Saturday morning. Any remaining water on roadways could refreeze when overnight temperatures are forecast to drop into the teens, the weather service said.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/1b41f6f7-155b-4590-9efa-d278c12ea4c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/1b41f6f7-155b-4590-9efa-d278c12ea4c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The National Weather Service in Fort Worth reported "one last batch of light snow and freezing drizzle" was moving through the area about 7:15 a.m. Friday.
Several counties -- including Collin, Dallas, Denton, Kaufman and Tarrant -- are under a [winter storm advisory until midday Friday](https://substack.com/redirect/ef0ec9f3-5c33-401f-8ebc-c1667f4fb94b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when conditions are expected to improve and [the wintry precipitation is forecast](https://substack.com/redirect/b4d923d1-7684-4235-a068-3e8c3672c245?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to move out of the region. The areas were previously under a winter storm warning, but it was changed to an advisory to account for lingering precipitation this morning." [DMN](https://substack.com/redirect/9707bcf5-8300-407b-8d32-1f9a371e6919?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

"**550 flights through DFW, Love Field canceled Friday for winter storm,** " Dallas Morning News' **Sasha Richie** -- "More than 550 flights departing or heading for DFW International Airport and Dallas Love Field have been canceled as of 9:20 a.m. Friday, according to FlightAware. An additional 100+ are delayed.

The cancellations are the result of the winter storm that swept through North Texas Thursday, leaving snow and icy roads in its wake. More than [1,800 flights through D-FW's airports were canceled Thursday](https://substack.com/redirect/c14fea53-20ff-4b18-860f-e576bbdc8adb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while others were delayed or diverted.

Many of Thursday's stranded flyers were rebooked onto flights Friday or Saturday, as airlines scramble to rework flight schedules to accommodate them. [It was a quiet, but chaotic scene](https://substack.com/redirect/c14fea53-20ff-4b18-860f-e576bbdc8adb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at DFW and Love Field on Thursday.

More than 300 of the flights canceled Friday are carried by American Airlines; nearly 800 of Thursday's were as well. The Fort Worth-based airline [issued a travel notice earlier in the week](https://substack.com/redirect/cc8fb8a7-fb00-4728-9855-2fb920e434f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that goes through Sunday, allowing travelers to weigh their options, be it rescheduling or canceling their trips.

In a statement Thursday evening, a representative for the airline explained that, contrary to online rumors, the airline and DFW [had plenty of deicing materials](https://substack.com/redirect/ddbdc260-6767-4e41-a072-41dbef07a417?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). However, the solution American, and other airlines, uses to deice its planes is greatly reduced in effectiveness during freezing rain and sleet conditions, as were present Thursday. This left flights unable to depart from DFW.

However, crews at both DFW and Love Field worked overnight to continue treating runways and other airport property with deicer, according to representatives. A notice from the Federal Aviation Administration indicates that DFW is still deicing." Caution should also be maintained throughout the day, as the area could see black ice in the evening and into Saturday morning. Any remaining water on roadways could refreeze when overnight temperatures are forecast to drop into the teens, the weather service said. The National Weather Service in Fort Worth reported "one last batch of light snow and freezing drizzle" was moving through the area about 7:15 a.m. Friday. Several counties -- including Collin, Dallas, Denton, Kaufman and Tarrant -- are under a when conditions are expected to improve and to move out of the region. The areas were previously under a winter storm warning, but it was changed to an advisory to account for lingering precipitation this morning." An additional 100+ are delayed. The cancellations are the result of the winter storm that swept through North Texas Thursday, leaving snow and icy roads in its wake. This kind of LAWFARE poses a grave threat to our free Republic, Patriot.

_The Left couldn’t defeat President Trump at the ballot box, so corrupt radicals like Tish James are trying to stall his agenda by bleeding him dry._

name: PoliticsPA
subject: PA's uniting issue for Dems and GOP
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

This segment dives into public education funding and charter schools, PA House Republican Leader **Jesse Topper,** and Founder of the Education Reform Alliance, **Dawn Chavous** share insights you don’t want to miss.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **PA House Republican Leader Jesse Topper** called for structural changes in government and education funding, including "the merging and consolidating of school districts" to ensure equitable funding and opportunities for all students. [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=11dc0e84b9&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**Founder of the Education Reform Alliance Dawn Chavous** urged decision-makers to focus on parents' real-life concerns when reforming education, emphasizing that parents prioritize their children's safety and opportunities over political ideology. [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=50c47c0456&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _Public Policy_
* Governor Shapiro increased K-12 public education funding by **$1.11 billion** in the 2024-25 budget. [[dced.pa.gov](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f82bb5f7ab&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* An additional **$55 million** was allocated to EITC and OSTC voucher programs with no new reporting requirements. [[EducationVotersofPA](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3bbffeada8&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Voter Interests_
* PA Dept. of Education rescinded its CR-SE Framework Guidelines, which contained **nine controversial competencies** required for teacher professional development. [[Broad + L](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d31c4fc016&e=b7b3eddce2)[iberty](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=89b6bd6c4c&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Pennsylvania is **one of 25 states** allowing biological males to compete against girls in school sports. [[KeystoneToday](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9a31cc8dee&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Nearly **70,000 charter students** are enrolled statewide—comparable to the combined student population of three Pittsburgh school districts. [[L2Data](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=44b3deaa87&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Federal_
* Trump’s “Agenda47” calls for eliminating the U.S. Department of Education, which provides **$1.6 billion** annually to programs under PA Dept. of Education. [[WHYY](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4f819e2d2e&e=b7b3eddce2)]

---
|
* * *
---
| **Report Finds Partisan ID Doesn't Affect Voter Attitudes on School Funding**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2f5072790a&e=b7b3eddce2 ""This is a Rescue Mission," Education, & Early Voting Return Data | Voices of Reason Ep. 2")
---
|
* * *
---
| **In Case You Missed It...**
---
| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=aa162e6876&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d4950b49f1&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a335caddce&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e78595289b&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c8874d5c70&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4f4be4af54&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.
---
|
* * *
---
| **Get in Touch**
---
| We like smart ideas and want to hear from you.

Send feedback and inquire about appearing on _Voices of Reason_ , at [press@politicspa.com](mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry).
---
|
---

---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fb2ea016e4&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6e8eacf1ce&e=b7b3eddce2)

|

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&e=b7b3eddce2&c=b8be1dd662) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&t=b&e=b7b3eddce2&c=b8be1dd662).

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Dallas weather: Winter storm's snow, icy precipitation departing DFW,** " Dallas Morning News' **Lana Ferguson** , **Jamie Landers** and **Alex Nguyen** -- "Drivers in North Texas [were cautioned to be extremely careful](https://substack.com/redirect/96e94696-1d84-45be-a3a3-e86039fa63e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Friday after the region was [blasted with wintry precipitation](https://substack.com/redirect/0d27ec86-96f1-4380-a98e-e0d3f5ba429b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and below-freezing temperatures overnight, according to the National Weather Service.

Caution should also be maintained throughout the day, as the area could see black ice in the evening and into Saturday morning. Any remaining water on roadways could refreeze when overnight temperatures are forecast to drop into the teens, the weather service said.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/a3dd58c0-6945-471f-aebb-1339715c6105?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/a3dd58c0-6945-471f-aebb-1339715c6105?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

The National Weather Service in Fort Worth reported "one last batch of light snow and freezing drizzle" was moving through the area about 7:15 a.m. Friday.
Several counties -- including Collin, Dallas, Denton, Kaufman and Tarrant -- are under a [winter storm advisory until midday Friday](https://substack.com/redirect/3b4ab9e1-4dca-4e4a-8207-d812015b0509?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when conditions are expected to improve and [the wintry precipitation is forecast](https://substack.com/redirect/0d46598e-7d62-4237-8bc7-c1c768635486?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to move out of the region. The areas were previously under a winter storm warning, but it was changed to an advisory to account for lingering precipitation this morning." [DMN](https://substack.com/redirect/76b6567e-b10a-4590-92d8-2013af435e48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

"**550 flights through DFW, Love Field canceled Friday for winter storm,** " Dallas Morning News' **Sasha Richie** -- "More than 550 flights departing or heading for DFW International Airport and Dallas Love Field have been canceled as of 9:20 a.m. Friday, according to FlightAware. An additional 100+ are delayed.

The cancellations are the result of the winter storm that swept through North Texas Thursday, leaving snow and icy roads in its wake. More than [1,800 flights through D-FW's airports were canceled Thursday](https://substack.com/redirect/58cf9d0c-8557-47c5-b4c2-09d24def138f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while others were delayed or diverted.

Many of Thursday's stranded flyers were rebooked onto flights Friday or Saturday, as airlines scramble to rework flight schedules to accommodate them. [It was a quiet, but chaotic scene](https://substack.com/redirect/58cf9d0c-8557-47c5-b4c2-09d24def138f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at DFW and Love Field on Thursday.

More than 300 of the flights canceled Friday are carried by American Airlines; nearly 800 of Thursday's were as well. The Fort Worth-based airline [issued a travel notice earlier in the week](https://substack.com/redirect/f423a0be-c506-473c-8784-c56b8490bb02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that goes through Sunday, allowing travelers to weigh their options, be it rescheduling or canceling their trips.

In a statement Thursday evening, a representative for the airline explained that, contrary to online rumors, the airline and DFW [had plenty of deicing materials](https://substack.com/redirect/052f317c-6d47-4538-9ddf-a352b0f16518?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). However, the solution American, and other airlines, uses to deice its planes is greatly reduced in effectiveness during freezing rain and sleet conditions, as were present Thursday. This left flights unable to depart from DFW.

However, crews at both DFW and Love Field worked overnight to continue treating runways and other airport property with deicer, according to representatives. A notice from the Federal Aviation Administration indicates that DFW is still deicing." Caution should also be maintained throughout the day, as the area could see black ice in the evening and into Saturday morning. Any remaining water on roadways could refreeze when overnight temperatures are forecast to drop into the teens, the weather service said. The National Weather Service in Fort Worth reported "one last batch of light snow and freezing drizzle" was moving through the area about 7:15 a.m. Friday. Several counties -- including Collin, Dallas, Denton, Kaufman and Tarrant -- are under a when conditions are expected to improve and to move out of the region. The areas were previously under a winter storm warning, but it was changed to an advisory to account for lingering precipitation this morning." ($) "550 flights through DFW, Love Field canceled Friday for winter storm, " Dallas Morning News' Sasha Richie -- "More than 550 flights departing or heading for DFW International Airport and Dallas Love Field have been canceled as of 9:20 a.m. Friday, according to FlightAware. An additional 100+ are delayed. The cancellations are the result of the winter storm that swept through North Texas Thursday, leaving snow and icy roads in its wake. More than , while others were delayed or diverted. Many of Thursday's stranded flyers were rebooked onto flights Friday or Saturday, as airlines scramble to rework flight schedules to accommodate them. at DFW and Love Field on Thursday. More than 300 of the flights canceled Friday are carried by American Airlines; nearly 800 of Thursday's were as well. The Fort Worth-based airline that goes through Sunday, allowing travelers to weigh their options, be it rescheduling or canceling their trips. In a statement Thursday evening, a representative for the airline explained that, contrary to online rumors, the airline and DFW . However, the solution American, and other airlines, uses to deice its planes is greatly reduced in effectiveness during freezing rain and sleet conditions, as were present Thursday. This left flights unable to depart from DFW. However, crews at both DFW and Love Field worked overnight to continue treating runways and other airport property with deicer, according to representatives. A notice from the Federal Aviation Administration indicates that DFW is still deicing." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. “**550 flights through DFW, Love Field canceled Friday for winter storm,** ” Dallas Morning News' **Sasha Richie** — “More than 550 flights departing or heading for DFW International Airport and Dallas Love Field have been canceled as of 9:20 a.m. Friday, according to FlightAware. An additional 100+ are delayed.

The cancellations are the result of the winter storm that swept through North Texas Thursday, leaving snow and icy roads in its wake. More than [1,800 flights through D-FW’s airports were canceled Thursday](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eOQPXJLmqZGCIlkWp25_d_kXsgruR7aMn-iHdOayV8c3splGsV2OthcAL-lx8NAz-LmPDLxtxlCLSpZlAY9Fwc0kw0NkYJmH3Mr3_iwNDhlC4TPwtJ78wW2zpH3IvxMGPR47-UVsG-i2DzNsbAg9lzndI5v8sy4ISvC3-upPp_LfhWKfWMbmKzWYX4Tq3C5ISjmfqOc2IlmaPViSzCwHHG1yhTAYeBa6ImA4lYRgQvJs3SLNxsJy-YDdc2MlyqQq2B6DSc5nUHcxPGjHTtgCHpM-b6f1GhYKHQpzblzCMWo9rlg7Juq01sSu9W08hFalr36TQnD0z5M5tJI7MraAQi-x43g5dp4-jx5CAkNw9vYmfurXzzhsLrTHaTqT2qkUYyrWMOp2mcooh-Cz7Jl2H0z2OZY7JFAl44wvSjvYYM_Ad_JdxWW_ZPjAYJlbUfYPXoMp-_KMrumw-6eeGDylA6GrQWRJmeoSyUZEyA-iW3x3e7OXyl_ujNL5LrFRbTqa7ldpLJHjT8XvVZSbDyKqxC4c0H81LM5FF_yj0GtZcbpy/4d1/mpWYdY0LTkqpk3OGWgY3Ug/h22/h001.50ao3xi00FO9J6xKtiym8ztqGmrY4CtEAU_lFhq3HiU), while others were delayed or diverted.

Many of Thursday’s stranded flyers were rebooked onto flights Friday or Saturday, as airlines scramble to rework flight schedules to accommodate them. [It was a quiet, but chaotic scene](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eOQPXJLmqZGCIlkWp25_d_kXsgruR7aMn-iHdOayV8c3splGsV2OthcAL-lx8NAz-LmPDLxtxlCLSpZlAY9Fwc0kw0NkYJmH3Mr3_iwNDhlC4TPwtJ78wW2zpH3IvxMGPR47-UVsG-i2DzNsbAg9lzndI5v8sy4ISvC3-upPp_LfhWKfWMbmKzWYX4Tq3C5ISjmfqOc2IlmaPViSzCwHHG1yhTAYeBa6ImA4lYRgQvJs3SLNxsJy-YDdc2MlyqQq2B6DSc5nUHcxPGjHTtgCHpM-b6f1GhYKHQpzblzCMWo9rlg7Juq01sSu9W08hFalr36TQnD0z5M5tJI7MraAQi-x43g5dp4-jx5CAkNw9vYmfurXzzhsLrTHaTqT2qkUYyrWMOp2mcooh-Cz7Jl2H0z2OZY7JFAl44wvSjvYYM_Ad_JdxWW_ZPjAYJlbUfYPXoMp-_KMrumw-6eeGDylA6H9IUDYKWwMhT_yfm5JpiXw3TKCyL5nR3k7NMxJDtGym_P1te7Vhg82yLy9AxJQ-ph9dKLE8FdkC1-ukXA5dz1r/4d1/mpWYdY0LTkqpk3OGWgY3Ug/h23/h001.yJ66cUOZD8C2PVYWAA7da5Cng0JusymbO-QAPxcl4W8) at DFW and Love Field on Thursday.

More than 300 of the flights canceled Friday are carried by American Airlines; nearly 800 of Thursday’s were as well. The Fort Worth-based airline [issued a travel notice earlier in the week](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eLAdv0ZqvwokA42MNI8rsIycM5JY6rkNhZqWQkb3axj-OXsOjjriQPB01kQB7LPXH4Qm0LGFdcxkuHrAGaklXMjfHg15sW2ANebz4kp7olO9oLGA1NUMUdmeQOtvF2wpf2Rhk-kLY-kVpGJnQuNsjtCIgd6W-yCUUcLNFqat010Gt5ciA50sROdMltUBOTp7pjFCjKlDSM0fb9gP2zCx4V5Y0o5yx108I-Ayw1SiO6LzBEiTv-BhrP1-68rSqLFucp6eFCwTri9cWNRTXx4hJhU3h_CQwTC-ErDn7Vj4qEXrwzv2Q8vIHU_M9_tf1JWFo4olYN-P-qzNnZcQUFla6CxQs_sRhObT_9E0MINV9iLxuA0DilUMmARrQ-IsbH4U3OH3B-6N93J-G8PHHqdqvc3-ErJIwAzC_NRy-7rjqvhCHAZkesPAAr94OnSE9RSbTg/4d1/mpWYdY0LTkqpk3OGWgY3Ug/h24/h001.2oiYksNqE-AAvmHjl56AKMtwTFa5ROuD28lznE-a9g8) that goes through Sunday, allowing travelers to weigh their options, be it rescheduling or canceling their trips.

In a statement Thursday evening, a representative for the airline explained that, contrary to online rumors, the airline and DFW [had plenty of deicing materials](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eOQPXJLmqZGCIlkWp25_d_lEtQPc4m2J7qER2AIMiECr0mDR3cTX3Swse4DGXOjxT03pjPEoTAKYRA3lSarLq4PEp4EFPfkEvPDjo0ShtmaraUzUW02Ml6Nrw2hpuczi9KfxpnRf43_NOZJQhBe711Y6Upb_EM7Me1WZC4xHlh7VI0vtaSo3hZE4uwqHPO-GamD2Xt6tDEx0Yngq62Qm3FS6ur2aJdAuyi9vrSj4sD0GB6LQEDPWeQ4DDDVKWX5N2wGXu-_PxpOW6AHqQ1r9CD70mrwlmu_qMJ1a-Fqh5_86Kop23ObncoEKoAr34ae4KeWBQv5YZTTEHUnzVdcx5ZhKl-BUjKpf7bsFWPQL0WR41tsP-APHItaekLax6g-HfrHK4Ht6-CEPVK7-dmBrkz56SQLJOElUcMm4VmIZoWYcOFNnGTxCFjMpxoGeSXyKKej96UG-cHTXtVQkFCyg4qu91Ee3PlWqtN3IZSdvRFqj9SZigFtzmk8IIy1hqn_YGncHcsND3jwNAtmxxKfoThfCOVrBZ5tcliEhGPz5YBGriRItnxomL8lonnbjFkaF2w/4d1/mpWYdY0LTkqpk3OGWgY3Ug/h25/h001.Ru3Th6sLP5oQA9Lvo8mTHToJMFRvY_hdUCeRLgmfmuc). However, the solution American, and other airlines, uses to deice its planes is greatly reduced in effectiveness during freezing rain and sleet conditions, as were present Thursday. This left flights unable to depart from DFW.

However, crews at both DFW and Love Field worked overnight to continue treating runways and other airport property with deicer, according to representatives. A notice from the Federal Aviation Administration indicates that DFW is still deicing." (limited time) | TOP NEWS “Dallas weather: Winter storm 's snow, icy precipitation departing DFW,” Dallas Morning News' Lana Ferguson , Jamie Landers and Alex Nguyen — “Drivers in North Texas Friday after the region was and below-freezing temperatures overnight, according to the National Weather Service. Caution should also be maintained throughout the day, as the area could see black ice in the evening and into Saturday morning. Any remaining water on roadways could refreeze when overnight temperatures are forecast to drop into the teens, the weather service said. » The National Weather Service in Fort Worth reported “one last batch of light snow and freezing drizzle” was moving through the area about 7:15 a.m. Friday. » Several counties — including Collin, Dallas, Denton, Kaufman and Tarrant — are under a when conditions are expected to improve and to move out of the region. The areas were previously under a winter storm warning, but it was changed to an advisory to account for lingering precipitation this morning." ($) “550 flights through DFW, Love Field canceled Friday for winter storm, ” Dallas Morning News' Sasha Richie — “More than 550 flights departing or heading for DFW International Airport and Dallas Love Field have been canceled as of 9:20 a.m. Friday, according to FlightAware. An additional 100+ are delayed. The cancellations are the result of the winter storm that swept through North Texas Thursday, leaving snow and icy roads in its wake. More than , while others were delayed or diverted. Many of Thursday’s stranded flyers were rebooked onto flights Friday or Saturday, as airlines scramble to rework flight schedules to accommodate them. at DFW and Love Field on Thursday. More than 300 of the flights canceled Friday are carried by American Airlines; nearly 800 of Thursday’s were as well. The Fort Worth-based airline that goes through Sunday, allowing travelers to weigh their options, be it rescheduling or canceling their trips. In a statement Thursday evening, a representative for the airline explained that, contrary to online rumors, the airline and DFW . However, the solution American, and other airlines, uses to deice its planes is greatly reduced in effectiveness during freezing rain and sleet conditions, as were present Thursday. This left flights unable to depart from DFW. However, crews at both DFW and Love Field worked overnight to continue treating runways and other airport property with deicer, according to representatives. A notice from the Federal Aviation Administration indicates that DFW is still deicing." ($) | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. name: Team Crouch
subject: From the Desk of Suzanne Crouch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/crouchforindiana/ppp2gaxknr-12719367?e=8f9fef7158)
Looking Back at My Time as Lieutenant Governor...
Friends and Fellow Hoosiers,

As I close out my time as Lt. Governor, I wanted to thank you for your support over the last 8 years.

As Lt. Governor of Indiana, I served as President of the Senate and oversaw four state agencies.

I also am very proud to have chaired the Indiana Mental Health Roundtable and the Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities Task Force - both of which have a special place in my heart.

I'm grateful for all we have accomplished over the last 8 years on behalf of Hoosiers and communities across the state - especially House Bill 1384, which requires sixth graders to take a civics course, that derived from the Indiana Civic Education Task Force that I chaired in 2020.
It has been the honor of my life to serve Hoosiers at the Statehouse!
Suzanne Crouch
Mental Health

In 2021, I co-founded the Indiana Mental Health Roundtable to reduce the stigma, strengthen the delivery systems, and improve access and affordability.

In 2023, I testified in support of SEA 1 as the sitting Lt. Governor. This bill infused $100 million in new funding to lay the groundwork for expanding certified behavioral health centers in the state and the 9-8-8 National Suicide and Crisis Line across Indiana.

As Lt. Governor, I've hosted dozens of mental health discussions across communities throughout the state. The Indiana Mental Health Roundtable started hosting an annual summit in 2023 - bringing together leaders across the country to discuss various topics surrounding mental health.

And one of my favorite times of year has always been the State Fair. I've been thrilled to have the support to host the Mental Health Matters Day.
Learn more about Lt. Governor Crouch's legacy here (https://mentalhealthroundtable.org/suzanne-crouch-legacy/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1bc74e6a1f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-42261667)
Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities Task Force

The Task Force was established by HEA 1102 in the 2017 General Assembly. I have been honored to chair this Task Force and be a voice for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities - including autism, down syndrome, and cerebral palsy.

As I always say: Our friends with disabilities are really just friends with different abilities, and they have the same dreams of every Hoosier and every American, to have friends, to have a job, to love and be loved...to be successful.

As my time in office comes to a close, Arc of Indiana honored me with the Lifetime Achievement Award for my commitment to advocating for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities.
Agriculture

As Secretary of Agriculture, I've been proud of the strides we have made here in Indiana under my tenure.

Recent reports show agriculture contributes more than $31.2 billion to the Hoosier economy, making Indiana the 10^th largest agriculture state. More than 80 percent of Indiana’s land is devoted to farms and forests.

A (https://events.in.gov/event/indiana_remains_a_top_agricultural_state_according_to_new_census?utm_campaign=widget&utm_medium=widget&utm_source=State+of+Indiana&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1bc74e6a1f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-42261667) griculture production has grown 62% over the last 5 years, (https://events.in.gov/event/indiana_remains_a_top_agricultural_state_according_to_new_census?utm_campaign=widget&utm_medium=widget&utm_source=State+of+Indiana&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1bc74e6a1f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-42261667) and Indiana remains a leader in top producer in the country of popcorn, gourds, duck, soybeans, corn, hogs, and much more.

Special thanks to our Hoosier farmers who feed our country!
Rural Affairs and Broadband

One of the four agencies I oversaw as Lt. Governor was the Office of Community and Rural Affairs.

During my tenure, we advanced broadband and digital infrastructure, investing more than $273 million, connecting more than 70,000 homes and businesses.

Under my leadership, IN Main Street communities saw more than $493M in public investment and $1.6B in private investment. Additionally, 2,000 public improvement projects created more than 2,200 jobs.
Tourism and Housing

In 2018, we celebrated 40 years of the Indiana Housing and Community Development Authority in 2018. Under my leadership, IHCDA launched HONOR Our Vets homebuyer program, we have helped tens of thousands of Hoosiers become homeowners, and invested millions in downpayment assistance and other programs. Check out more IHCDA accomplishments here (https://www.in.gov/ihcda/newsroom/annual-reports/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1bc74e6a1f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-42261667) .

While overseeing the Indiana Destination Development Corporation, the IDDC received a nearly $20 million budget increase to invest in tourism efforts for the state.
As of the 2022 impact study (https://buildingindiana.com/stories/indiana-tourism-income-is-returning-to-vibrancy,2937?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1bc74e6a1f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-42261667) :
* Travel & Tourism sector accounted for 2.3% of Indiana’s Gross State Product. Tourism contributed $9.9 billion to Indiana’s economy.
* Tourism- generated tax revenues increased 15.8% to a total of $2.8 billion. State and local taxes increased 16% to $1.6 billion.

In The News
Indiana Senate begins with tribute to outgoing Lt. Gov. Suzanne Crouch (https://dailyjournal.net/2025/01/09/indiana-senate-begins-with-tribute-to-outgoing-lt-gov-suzanne-crouch/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1bc74e6a1f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-42261667)

Indiana’s 124th legislative session began with a heartwarming tribute to 52nd Lt. Gov. Suzanne Crouch. Senators passed a special resolution honoring her eight years of service as president of the Senate.

Twenty-five senators of both parties testified to Crouch’s dedication to improving mental health and developmental disabilities services, civic education, and personal relationships across the aisle.
Read More (https://dailyjournal.net/2025/01/09/indiana-senate-begins-with-tribute-to-outgoing-lt-gov-suzanne-crouch/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1bc74e6a1f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-42261667)

============================================================

name: Rep. Maxwell Frost
subject: sworn in… again ✅
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/HLUrfOg2LOqElYC4QzaMBw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpY9FnP0TMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI1MDExMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9zd2VhcmluZ2luX2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJyTVFMSnVVTUpGZWhQeUpuWGh0dkNXOW9EcSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yck1RTEp1VU1KRmVoUHlKblhodHZDVzlvRHEmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MnJNUUxKdVVNSkZlaFB5Sm5YaHR2Q1c5b0RxVwNzcGNCCmd_Z0yBZ-tTedFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)
---
**Y’all... It's official. A week ago today, I was sworn into the United States Congress for my second term!** As a working class, Afro-Latino member of Gen Z, I defied the odds (once again!) and was re-elected to an institution that is designed to keep people like me from having a seat at the table. And now that I’m starting my second term, it’s safe to say that we made it! I’m ready to represent FL-10 once again and continue fighting for transformational change. To be a leader that fights for Orlando, for working families, and for my generation – because our futures are at stake. **But I’m already facing attacks from GOP leaders and their billionaire friends who hate to see young, working class people having a voice in Congress. If I’m going to continue making real progress in Congress and STAY there, I need our team firing on all cylinders – that means I need YOU with me, Peter.** [**_I’m doing my part in Washington, but powering our fight from where you are is how you can do YOUR part – for ALL of us in this movement. clean_body: | Y’all... It's official. A week ago today, I was sworn into the United States Congress for my second term! As a working class, Afro-Latino member of Gen Z, I defied the odds (once again!) and was re-elected to an institution that is designed to keep people like me from having a seat at the table. And now that I’m starting my second term, it’s safe to say that we made it! I’m ready to represent FL-10 once again and continue fighting for transformational change. To be a leader that fights for Orlando, for working families, and for my generation – because our futures are at stake. But I’m already facing attacks from GOP leaders and their billionaire friends who hate to see young, working class people having a voice in Congress. If I’m going to continue making real progress in Congress and STAY there, I need our team firing on all cylinders – that means I need YOU with me, Peter. I’m going to keep fighting in Congress against the far-right’s continuous attacks on our freedoms, but we need to show them that our movement is NOT to be messed with. That means proving that our movement is only getting stronger by the day. But the only way we’ll prove that is if we still have dollars coming in the door. That’s how we got here, and that’s how we’ll stay here, so I need you with me all the way, Peter. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | ~~ | ~~ | ~ It’s time to get to work, Maxwell Frost | Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. body:
Congress needs to PASS the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act | [ ](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b0b21fedc4144d98aea1a2f7126ad10a&_e=espXldLuaoBlX4iQQp-qG6bk5DdCBA2NuRhc7jhir1I_44syVGA98OKthDmyXy2EuDoa-JykglA1BVTj51Fx_AXnWfFP7Ru9L5hu1BGKwhIz4KKMdcyzMD1pgAHXjeEIpXr10fwAVxdJb2CDDq8BtjbtWzGCuu5N6vbVQfFcFKLbXX0NEgBAJUgEVGifUXxRx-YkvXTJA4iQnvJTiVYNrC-IU0NFtTAzGMylyKm_27JvndJvIrFeAx5eTzYBmEItN1K77fpQC-EV3wmrjJ9GK543OPf5OrfAY1sviL8OPyvZHdvc4_JfxPJiUteIEXK-ecWfnd0EXur8bUPvmomxXqc87aUwUkubVNgxg05CUhGtXQLzEma2WYJYAGAOGh4ovsfQRD9w4LIeRSTO6_xHZv8y_wD1LSXd9IidudaQFWY%3D)
---

Peter,

**Congress MUST PASS my Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act! I'm utterly shocked and disappointed that we need Congressional action to protect women and girls in sports, but here's how we got here.**

_**[FIRST-](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b0b21fedc4144d98aea1a2f7126ad10a&_e=espXldLuaoBlX4iQQp-qG6bk5DdCBA2NuRhc7jhir1I_44syVGA98OKthDmyXy2EuDoa-JykglA1BVTj51Fx_AXnWfFP7Ru9L5hu1BGKwhIz4KKMdcyzMD1pgAHXjeEIpXr10fwAVxdJb2CDDq8BtjbtWzGCuu5N6vbVQfFcFKLbXX0NEgBAJUgEVGifUXxRx-YkvXTJA4iQnvJTiVYNrC-IU0NFtTAzGMylyKm_27IjBaHnWHAIUMmnjexb8Lpx22DYLobzJu1ZprJfsTNekJkMqdODztG3okYruSI6PcpKHbdw4GrLwQllOdpfu-QaT5JW1O6d-VstqMJmtQbf66qVJYr8HCUFzMG4j4r8GdR_oGoJkHY8Ccx8-2yfIVJ4thTfwjBijDtJJYhjIMueQQ%3D%3D)** Congress passed Title IX in 1972, which explicitly ensured that male and female students and athletes in educational settings were treated equally and fairly. This includes ensuring that males and females are treated equally and fairly in sports, from intramural sports to college athletics.

**[THEN-](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b0b21fedc4144d98aea1a2f7126ad10a&_e=espXldLuaoBlX4iQQp-qG6bk5DdCBA2NuRhc7jhir1I_44syVGA98OKthDmyXy2EuDoa-JykglA1BVTj51Fx_AXnWfFP7Ru9L5hu1BGKwhIz4KKMdcyzMD1pgAHXjeEIpXr10fwAVxdJb2CDDq8BtjbtWzGCuu5N6vbVQfFcFKLbXX0NEgBAJUgEVGifUXxRx-YkvXTJA4iQnvJTiVYNrC-IU0NFtTAzGMylyKm_27IjBaHnWHAIUMmnjexb8LpxPQwCQYROneMi219kT-g0Mqm8DA3JhbM_MXMbO-3G-QOWpXxC2NF1fcY5TdUqQZjA2r1CwyAu4j5rCTIAW7gHj6SSIb3rZkTolLgo4mmvi-nOj4TiTd4J0Lh0DOycV2H5UP7e2AxP7CwiRZPIfZk39A%3D%3D)** The Radical Left began demanding that biological men who identify as transgender women could compete in women's sports, threatening to withhold Title IX federal financial assistance for schools that would not comply. This led to biological men all over the country infiltrating women's sports and instantly becoming the top athletes, regardless of age or sport. Notably, female athletes like Riley Gaines were ROBBED of trophies and championships after training their whole lives.

**[NOW-](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b0b21fedc4144d98aea1a2f7126ad10a&_e=espXldLuaoBlX4iQQp-qG6bk5DdCBA2NuRhc7jhir1I_44syVGA98OKthDmyXy2EuDoa-JykglA1BVTj51Fx_AXnWfFP7Ru9L5hu1BGKwhIz4KKMdcyzMD1pgAHXjeEIpXr10fwAVxdJb2CDDq8BtjbtWzGCuu5N6vbVQfFcFKLbXX0NEgBAJUgEVGifUXxRx-YkvXTJA4iQnvJTiVYNrC-IU0NFtTAzGMylyKm_27IjBaHnWHAIUMmnjexb8Lpxe7nc4E2zSFwbmkFDsO_KuOk2U2v-p0q9XOqrYNjLogT2c4Z0Rn9wfiTqvPqKxVX0PF--_P9zrSqZETl2rwKg2PK214-koVeBp-wrNIhvOcxDcD-lSB7fOIAy8tN89jBPQI26ExtLM--RQPvQknrIhA%3D%3D)** I'm putting my foot down. I introduced the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act to clarify that including male athletes in women's sports IS a Title IX violation and clearly defines males and females as the biological sex assigned at birth. I need your help to make sure that our Senate Majority passes this bill._

**I need 50 Patriots to join my team before midnight so we can show Congress that this bill has grassroots support.[**Can you chip in just $10 to support me?**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b0b21fedc4144d98aea1a2f7126ad10a&_e=espXldLuaoBlX4iQQp-qG6bk5DdCBA2NuRhc7jhir1I_44syVGA98OKthDmyXy2EuDoa-JykglA1BVTj51Fx_AXnWfFP7Ru9L5hu1BGKwhIz4KKMdcyzMD1pgAHXjeEIpXr10fwAVxdJb2CDDq8BtjbtWzGCuu5N6vbVQfFcFKLbXX0NEgBAJUgEVGifUXxRx-YkvXTJA4iQnvJTiVYNrC-IU0NFtTAzGMylyKm_27JvndJvIrFeAx5eTzYBmEItN1K77fpQC-EV3wmrjJ9GKzVJzeZKRlIy5AZY3rH7Jqrw3UP1Mc0A-YawjOSTxAEh4wiKJ4DZeOloLOP5fjoxZ0T3swBly6NgSnCLk0emACdeLSBZuKw_kr8VNdhXgpr9oCK8U7-d9mOkCI-AeiIVJvb6AoL93uTwxgexth5G-8w%3D)**

| [ **PROTECT WOMEN'S SPORTS** ](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b0b21fedc4144d98aea1a2f7126ad10a&_e=espXldLuaoBlX4iQQp-qG6bk5DdCBA2NuRhc7jhir1I_44syVGA98OKthDmyXy2EuDoa-JykglA1BVTj51Fx_AXnWfFP7Ru9L5hu1BGKwhIz4KKMdcyzMD1pgAHXjeEIpXr10fwAVxdJb2CDDq8BtjbtWzGCuu5N6vbVQfFcFKLbXX0NEgBAJUgEVGifUXxRx-YkvXTJA4iQnvJTiVYNrC-IU0NFtTAzGMylyKm_27JvndJvIrFeAx5eTzYBmEItN1K77fpQC-EV3wmrjJ9GK7-YhX5vtm16jMBjQfpEJ-wBhF5bRxGxMV5XHaNGCHrT-DL1BJx03-6NZYcTY-OsLhBrmE9DMRI47nqf0QZ4s5hc43uFMU5mktqepj8-qPHwt9twQ1YeI3PdZY30oFCgEBa7S_0-AhUBja1I16OzdC8%3D)
---

It's time to BAN trans athletes from electing into women's sports. Allowing biological men to compete against biological women not only compromises the integrity of competition, it threatens the safety of women athletes.

[**Use this secure link if you support protecting women's sports.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b0b21fedc4144d98aea1a2f7126ad10a&_e=espXldLuaoBlX4iQQp-qG6bk5DdCBA2NuRhc7jhir1I_44syVGA98OKthDmyXy2EuDoa-JykglA1BVTj51Fx_AXnWfFP7Ru9L5hu1BGKwhIz4KKMdcyzMD1pgAHXjeEIpXr10fwAVxdJb2CDDq8BtjbtWzGCuu5N6vbVQfFcFKLbXX0NEgBAJUgEVGifUXxRx-YkvXTJA4iQnvJTiVYNrC-IU0NFtTAzGMylyKm_27JvndJvIrFeAx5eTzYBmEItN1K77fpQC-EV3wmrjJ9GKxcxibCsEkL71xxmEWFavxArdiZ6j9cQT9TOkXMGvL_zxdkdKmUjlT-UdiRBl_CQGs5fNM827ojBoIyDgBCwYb6mzbleZVmDFBlJGhQRh5BMAoJmxMyhl3LxPq6hnk9rMXn65Eqskp88nRG9yAfkfsg%3D)

Thank you,
Coach Tuberville

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b0b21fedc4144d98aea1a2f7126ad10a&_e=espXldLuaoBlX4iQQp-qG6bk5DdCBA2NuRhc7jhir1I_44syVGA98OKthDmyXy2EuDoa-JykglA1BVTj51Fx_AXnWfFP7Ru9L5hu1BGKwhIz4KKMdcyzMD1pgAHXjeEIpXr10fwAVxdJb2CDDq8BtjbtWzGCuu5N6vbVQfFcFKLbXX0NEgBAJUgEVGifUXxRx-YkvXTJA4iQnvJTiVYNrC-IU0NFtTAzGMylyKm_27JvndJvIrFeAx5eTzYBmEItN1K77fpQC-EV3wmrjJ9GK5EtQyhu7YmK4JLEy8s2tP0ap8SUajj2bz6__mDTzoRsr6Z5EjYpoE0c2XkqiSHxueiDTwH9_vZuFEpzKlVmBNN88yv4kTLBq4mw_0IezVIPl2qB8s_2UpaRFrKmNUOo2qT1jEUue49GBw4jr_oZuv8%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b0b21fedc4144d98aea1a2f7126ad10a&_e=espXldLuaoBlX4iQQp-qG6bk5DdCBA2NuRhc7jhir1I_44syVGA98OKthDmyXy2EuDoa-JykglA1BVTj51Fx_AXnWfFP7Ru9L5hu1BGKwhIz4KKMdcyzMD1pgAHXjeEIpXr10fwAVxdJb2CDDq8BtjbtWzGCuu5N6vbVQfFcFKLbXX0NEgBAJUgEVGifUXxRx-YkvXTJA4iQnvJTiVYNrC-IU0NFtTAzGMylyKm_27JvndJvIrFeAx5eTzYBmEItN1K77fpQC-EV3wmrjJ9GK5oqSLbl_pc9ZuaQaSMAmaxMcbHxYG54a7dudag8hc37nq4yvs8AT0Ur6apvBen7h5K_D75lmOi2cmsDVSx3Ll0lBcTLEbMgsMnC_tk0jI_qdZZooL0pRufhVeDPDoKE00IQDsdQlv-IEhf78wrpoWg%3D)

---

name: Letitia James
subject: I don't know how this happened ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
We may fall short of my public fundraising deadline.
| | |
---
Peter, I don't even know what happened here.
A few days ago, I reached out to this powerful community of supporters with an exciting update: **We were on our way to hitting my first $25,000 public filing fundraising goal!**
From the moment I announced this massive public deadline I was facing, grassroots supporters rushed to help my fight for justice and accountability. We were making up ground incredibly fast, and I was truly touched by the amount of people who were putting their hard-earned money toward my work.

**But then, ****out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to go from what was a strong position to now not even potentially hitting this goal.**
I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short, but I _refuse _to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the gap before my fundraising numbers lock at MIDNIGHT tomorrow.**
**Peter******,** I’m counting on **_you_ to be one of the grassroots donors I need, so please: [**Will you donate any amount before my fundraising numbers LOCK at 11:59 p.m. tomorrow? My fundraising will be made public, so we simply can't show any sign of weakness here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100185224/521969743/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1794-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGZjMDUwMi03M2NmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i_oDf9dp_Q5HFixEv0JryEiPVDWD_p1rNW3al6vVkE4=)

Letitia
| With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I need your eyes on this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I need your eyes on this:

Donald Trump just announced his first rally of the new year – all so he can rile up his base right before his inauguration.

Let me repeat that: The day before his inauguration, Trump plans to rile up his supporters and raise millions of dollars off of it.

That’s why I’m calling on 5,000 of my top supporters to help make Trump’s rally completely BACKFIRE. I know it’s a difficult moment, but it’s also a critical one. I need 5,000 grassroots donations before midnight to help turn this MAGA rally into a historic fundraising day for Democrats. Quickly, can I count on you to chip in $14 before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $100 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=100]
Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thank you for acting quickly,

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

subject: Trump WINS! Introducing The MAGA Victory AR-15
body:
This is a special opportunity for first 20 Trump supporters ONLY.
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19715/6374453/dcacc851828d135645f92ec3002bcd08f0f22e86/70b9733cd2757638d1b03c71868e370cef4553b7)

| | | | | | | Fellow Patriots,
History was made January 6, 2025.
They tried to stop him. Tried to jail him. Tried to KILL him. But he WON!
**As of Jan 6, Trump's victory is now CERTIFIED - and we're celebrating with something extraordinary...**
Introducing the [**__MAGA Victory AR-15__**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19715/6374453/56f9690bef3ec9af600d85e4cc2372f65db7cf42/70b9733cd2757638d1b03c71868e370cef4553b7) \- the ultimate commemorative rifle honoring our 47th President!

---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19715/6374453/56f9690bef3ec9af600d85e4cc2372f65db7cf42/70b9733cd2757638d1b03c71868e370cef4553b7)
---
| | | Our first Trump commemorative rifle (The MAGA Patriot AR-15) sold over 1,000 units before being discontinued on January 6...
Now, we're proud to reveal its successor - an even more exclusive collector's edition for 2025:

**✓ Hand-built tribute** to Trump's historic comeback victory!
**✓ One-of-one laser engravings and distressed Cerakote finish** celebrate Trump's story!

**✓ Full-auto-tested reliability** (backs your LIFETIME WARRANTY!)
**✓ Guaranteed sub-MOA “sniper rifle” accuracy** (backs your precision guarantee!)
**Plus:** You get a **FREE 2-Day LIVE Rifle Tactical Training Course**($1,500 value) and 5 MORE free bonuses!
Claim Your Piece of Presidential History:
**> > **[**_The MAGA Victory AR-15 Revealed!_**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19715/6374453/56f9690bef3ec9af600d85e4cc2372f65db7cf42/70b9733cd2757638d1b03c71868e370cef4553b7)
**WARNING****:** Only 20 rifles can be produced at a time. When they're gone, wait times extend to 100+ days.

~Gun News USA

P.S. Our previous 2024 Trump rifle became an instant collector's item when production stopped on J6. This all new for 2025 _MAGA Victory AR-15_ edition commemorates an even more historic moment in time. Don't miss out - check availability here: [_act fast to reserve your limited edition collector’s rifle now._](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19715/6374453/56f9690bef3ec9af600d85e4cc2372f65db7cf42/70b9733cd2757638d1b03c71868e370cef4553b7)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Sworn in
body:
Input needed before President Trump’s Inauguration...

Input needed before President Trump’s Inauguration...
| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Nm1/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend,
---
I’ve officially been sworn in to our new House majority.
---
That means YOUR House majority is ready to get to work _right now_ – weeks before President Donald J. Trump is inaugurated as our 47th President.
---
After four years of damage brought on by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, we’ve certainly got our work cut out for ourselves.
---
**_These next couple of weeks leading up to President Trump’s inauguration are mission critical for laying the groundwork to truly Make America Great Again._**
---
_But most importantly, citizens like YOU need to be front and center in our new government, which is why I’m asking you to set the 2025 Agenda now that I’ve been sworn in to our 119th House of Representatives._
---
[**Please take my People’s Agenda Survey so that we can get to work right away and pave the way for President Trump’s arrival to Washington.**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Nm1/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Nm1/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

The media has been saying that Republicans now have control of the “federal trifecta” – the House, the Senate, and the presidency.
---
But that somewhat misses the mark...
---
It’s not that _Republicans_ now have control of the federal government, it’s that the __PEOPLE__ are back in control.
---
As President Trump said back in 2017, his Inauguration was not about transferring power from one political party to another – but rather, from the ruling class to the _people_.
---
And that’s even truer today.
---
Unelected bureaucrats, D.C. special interests, Deep State warmongers, and every other bad actor in the Washington Swamp is now forced to surrender their power to the one group whose rights and interests have been neglected for far too long – the American People.
---
And now that our 119th Congress is officially in session, I’m asking the people of our country to help set _YOUR_ agenda so that we can truly make America great again for ALL Americans.
---
[**Please take my People’s Agenda Survey so that we can get to work right away and pave the way for President Trump’s arrival to Washington.**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Nm1/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Nm1/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Jim Jordan
---

---
Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC.

PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040
---
---
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=269075&trkid=582951401&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314
