subject: National Opinion Survey on the Marxist Hijacking of American Education
body:
My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I serve as president of Hillsdale College.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=5bb5ad17e7524f30889508599243b43c&_t=Jx3R4LZ-jO70A9_rVTIrx6AhBdQ2P-JrBTw1jjKh5sOSwDHo6cSYRqm8tH4l0t6QzlEd8CixGsV7Hn2mD74GTuFcnt2pOK8tVW9rZkrzABy-hFb6P2NEE7KFAtrRyJTF)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5bb5ad17e7524f30889508599243b43c&_e=F5cdx-UWAdaonpsbwwuuNxALjVYo1Vy_xpHZ7ypbN297F7qc6jPrxnYUXHx7i-Vh9AG5gNupnNax5VOOUhZFOJ78sdBREHY2sIgeeArKV1mUhEm2H-pHtr41ltQvfx5dubqHoe9MBZF7l7MxsDlZ2SJTmLdtOzKgpvJeQ30NYV-6aXLe6ymEzAUWk2D0ZU8QGUaMokU4wg2ko1bdn004c6E1FABh76CZ8YE5-tgvpeOZX5fHod7gKovuXIhypek8IjEF-qsw---sX_dSVPx78-pqkq-JizpooCUjrQTbmavdHkM0pmJXRVEMaBItYtAgNYC1hMvXElLHqhz88mGjuEeF5fYNJ1iRjmoexfTHrOCU2N4371448TsL8-0oOF6hLnSFahUfgadIyCv5OMgwEYiIqfFX4CdnxIr3ERRaSAW80YoPRSP-7Q4Y-ZapdY7Q)
| | Dear Fellow American,

My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I serve as president of Hillsdale College. I'm writing to you today because you're a concerned American who keeps up with current events.

That means you know something is seriously wrong in too many of our nation's schools.

You understand that a fierce ideological battle is raging in classrooms nationwide, and our children are at risk.

**This is no accident.**

The far-Left, guided by a Marxist vision of a radically transformed society, has strategically targeted education, including K-12 classrooms across America.

That's why I'm asking you to complete the [**NATIONAL OPINION SURVEY ON THE MARXIST HIJACKING OF AMERICAN EDUCATION**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5bb5ad17e7524f30889508599243b43c&_e=F5cdx-UWAdaonpsbwwuuNxALjVYo1Vy_xpHZ7ypbN297F7qc6jPrxnYUXHx7i-Vh9AG5gNupnNax5VOOUhZFOJ78sdBREHY2sIgeeArKV1mUhEm2H-pHtr41ltQvfx5dubqHoe9MBZF7l7MxsDlZ2SJTmLdtOzKgpvJeQ30NYV-6aXLe6ymEzAUWk2D0ZU8QGUaMokU4wg2ko1bdn004c6E1FABh76CZ8YE5-tgvpeOZX5fHod7gKovuXIhypek8IjEF-qsw---sX_dSVPx78ymTp1VeYHqnxSPFGckQHMjhQ74qEE3t7fXuwdwF4zbZA0QV0T7p5OlzHiAdFqhx2CuQ8xHNQdLcrSSAdyDD_Pcpt_i-1Hln9bOwfuKAXYiEAf4mWm-5ObphAr8liyNFZ8H_f3r_KFdgyjcS6Wu47ELyMQ45h2V0HlSOswnT3bV6).

You can complete your survey at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/marxist-hijacking-of-american-education-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5bb5ad17e7524f30889508599243b43c&_e=F5cdx-UWAdaonpsbwwuuNxALjVYo1Vy_xpHZ7ypbN297F7qc6jPrxnYUXHx7i-Vh9AG5gNupnNax5VOOUhZFOJ78sdBREHY2sIgeeArKV1mUhEm2H-pHtr41ltQvfx5dubqHoe9MBZF7l7MxsDlZ2SJTmLdtOzKgpvJeQ30NYV-6aXLe6ymEzAUWk2D0ZU8QGUaMokU4wg2ko1bdn004c6E1FABh76CZ8YE5-tgvpeOZX5fHod7gKovuXIhypek8IjEF-qsw---sX_dSVPx784ojPf0-n2iUOSVjqbLL9pfAM9yPMmyE1IffpIVv1fI053GGgnWmxrQR3WTwPR0O_p0YrIhB0tclNn06z9PNTrSxf7ggV4GYCWnSrOxRAciMuKp-EhPBVyiOpuSZCOnGb97aHDuTcYcFgLzXRcEuF9-EOKSF_ErhDfg-NjZH2Kry)

**Your participation right now could not be more urgent.**

Hearing directly from informed Americans like you will be a great help to us, as well as to policymakers and opinion leaders at all levels.

**You may be shocked by the extreme and false ideas being taught in far too many schools today, such as ...**
* _America was founded on slavery, not freedom, and is systematically racist to this day._

* _White supremacy was woven into America at its founding._

* _Capitalism and free enterprise are sources of poverty and injustice._

* _Americans are not equal citizens but instead belong to one of two groups: "oppressors" or "oppressed." _

* _There is a variety of genders, and gender is changeable._

* _Free speech is dangerous, and speech labeled as "misinformation" should be censored. _

These are radical and anti-American ideas. So, it comes as no surprise that recent surveys show that younger citizens are increasingly drawn to socialism, anarchy, transgenderism, and other destructive ideologies.

**You may think the situation is hopeless. But there is something we can do together to turn the tide.**

Hillsdale College is leading a bold teaching effort to confront these false ideas on the battlefield of education. Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings ... of civil and religious liberty."

We're committed to providing young Americans with a proper grounding in American civics through our **SAVE AMERICAN EDUCATION CAMPAIGN**.

Our **SAVE AMERICAN EDUCATION CAMPAIGN** features free online courses, opening and guiding K-12 classical schools, _Imprimis_ --our free digest of liberty--and other educational outreach programs. The goal is to counter the spread of radical and anti-American ideas in our education system.

To help us do this, we would like to know what you and other informed Americans think about the radical agenda of the far-Left, which is pushed in K-12 schools, colleges and universities, businesses, government, and even the U.S. military.

So please help us today by [taking your personalized survey--](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5bb5ad17e7524f30889508599243b43c&_e=F5cdx-UWAdaonpsbwwuuNxALjVYo1Vy_xpHZ7ypbN297F7qc6jPrxnYUXHx7i-Vh9AG5gNupnNax5VOOUhZFOJ78sdBREHY2sIgeeArKV1mUhEm2H-pHtr41ltQvfx5dubqHoe9MBZF7l7MxsDlZ2SJTmLdtOzKgpvJeQ30NYV-6aXLe6ymEzAUWk2D0ZU8QGUaMokU4wg2ko1bdn004c6E1FABh76CZ8YE5-tgvpeOZX5fHod7gKovuXIhypek8IjEF-qsw---sX_dSVPx78zaChkfrCYor7gyhyYLY47L9zRBsct6Rfb7vVQohEFYkb7EAobZyAAXn8_aPKTlZoJljQeUX_EkMk_m0Xb3PKkDi-eSNkUZchyhARmDzxqRVJwkiaevYJFQy-2lXZ2iHOzTpdWQBli3PbOi-nTESEFEFXK69ug7YLDDSHgjsx1vp)your answers will help to guide our **SAVE AMERICAN EDUCATION CAMPAIGN** , which promotes informed patriotism by educating young Americans.

I firmly believe, and I hope you agree, that a proper education--the kind of education that Hillsdale provides--is the key to preserving American liberty for our children and grandchildren.

At a time when the far-Left explicitly rejects the principles of America's founding--and seeks to expel those principles from our civic life and our major institutions--there is only one way to save America: EDUCATION.

Together, we can fight back with the truth.

Thank you for your time, and thank you in advance for your survey responses.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. We need to hear from informed patriots like you about the state of American education. Hillsdale College is leading a bold teaching effort to confront the false ideas of critical race theory, transgenderism, and socialism on the battlefield of education with our **SAVE AMERICAN EDUCATION CAMPAIGN**. But today, we need your help!

Will you let us know what you think by taking our **National Opinion Survey on the Marxist Hijacking of American Education**? The survey will take only a few minutes of your time and will help us to defend liberty against radical ideologies.

**You can take your survey at the secure link below:**

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/marxist-hijacking-of-american-education-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5bb5ad17e7524f30889508599243b43c&_e=F5cdx-UWAdaonpsbwwuuNxALjVYo1Vy_xpHZ7ypbN297F7qc6jPrxnYUXHx7i-Vh9AG5gNupnNax5VOOUhZFOJ78sdBREHY2sIgeeArKV1mUhEm2H-pHtr41ltQvfx5dubqHoe9MBZF7l7MxsDlZ2SJTmLdtOzKgpvJeQ30NYV-6aXLe6ymEzAUWk2D0ZU8QGUaMokU4wg2ko1bdn004c6E1FABh76CZ8YE5-tgvpeOZX5fHod7gKovuXIhypek8IjEF-qsw---sX_dSVPx783_bH2TQ7IROZU_-hM1gejktXafiDcO6uAyMjI6f12nJy3gUf2x4EltzBhpLONAVWUddijE4uXHvQ3Q3ilvT1lUGFm6zNZygsWuR19VIvMog45QDMdZFT5OKedIfqIT-b4DFuiObujpAaCR06yIfYoeRfmWnhQpiwPXrhFGbpIpr)
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=5bb5ad17e7524f30889508599243b43c&_t=Jx3R4LZ-jO70A9_rVTIrx6AhBdQ2P-JrBTw1jjKh5sOSwDHo6cSYRqm8tH4l0t6QzlEd8CixGsV7Hn2mD74GTuQkiZ1KBNAi1E7TfnDJC0t6pAu7YOU3xzqMC5zutvjsIjKeLWtUepy2A-FeCeTox0mXihfGoNj_nCGupSfO0Zs%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=5bb5ad17e7524f30889508599243b43c&_t=Jx3R4LZ-jO70A9_rVTIrx6AhBdQ2P-JrBTw1jjKh5sOSwDHo6cSYRqm8tH4l0t6QzlEd8CixGsV7Hn2mD74GTuFcnt2pOK8tVW9rZkrzABy-hFb6P2NEE7KFAtrRyJTF).

body:
Meta is sunsetting their fact-checking program. Here’s what that means for the truth.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100188755/521975734/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUzNTJjNDItNzVjZi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=laeqnsvMTxhlSRpIbbjfout-9MjQYF7vQcuTH9DrSyg=&emci=0038f13b-75cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=0e352c42-75cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
Meta just announced it’s ending its fact-checking program. The timing isn’t a coincidence—it’s another capitulation to the incoming Trump administration.
Mark Zuckerberg claims this decision is about “free expression.” But here’s the reality:
* Reports indicate that Meta executives consulted with Trump officials before making the announcement.
* Meta elevated Dana White, a Trump loyalist, to its board last week.
* Zuckerberg himself dined with Trump at Mar-a-Lago and pledged $1 million to Trump’s inauguration fund.
* Zuckerberg even announced Meta’s changes on _Fox and Friends_.

Trump won 2024 voters who “don’t follow politics closely” by a large margin, many of whom rely on Facebook and YouTube for news. Without fact-checking, Meta’s platforms—Facebook and Instagram—are now wide open to a flood of far-right misinformation from Trump allies.
[**Can you chip in $25 to support COURIER’s mission? Our factual reporting, delivered directly on Facebook and other social media platforms where people actually get their news, has never been more critical. Your donation helps us reach the voters most vulnerable to far-right disinformation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100188760/521975735/-593472309?refcode=20250110-EM-ZuckFactCheck&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUzNTJjNDItNzVjZi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=laeqnsvMTxhlSRpIbbjfout-9MjQYF7vQcuTH9DrSyg=)
Your $25 today will help us:
* Expose Trump’s lies and counter the flood of MAGA propaganda that is thriving on platforms like X and Meta.
* Deliver fact-based reporting directly to millions of Americans, especially those most vulnerable to far-right disinformation.
* Build a progressive media network strong enough to rival the right’s dominance and defend democracy.

Trump’s second term begins in days, and thanks to Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg, the floodgates of disinformation are unchecked, unfettered, and ready to spread across Facebook and X.
[**The good news is that, with your help, COURIER can hold them accountable. Mark Zuckerberg claims this decision is about “free expression.” But here’s the reality: Reports indicate that Meta executives consulted with Trump officials before making the announcement. Meta elevated Dana White, a Trump loyalist, to its board last week. Zuckerberg himself dined with Trump at Mar-a-Lago and pledged $1 million to Trump’s inauguration fund. Zuckerberg even announced Meta’s changes on Fox and Friends. Trump won 2024 voters who “don’t follow politics closely” by a large margin, many of whom rely on Facebook and YouTube for news. Without fact-checking, Meta’s platforms—Facebook and Instagram—are now wide open to a flood of far-right misinformation from Trump allies. = Your $25 today will help us: Expose Trump’s lies and counter the flood of MAGA propaganda that is thriving on platforms like X and Meta. Deliver fact-based reporting directly to millions of Americans, especially those most vulnerable to far-right disinformation. Build a progressive media network strong enough to rival the right’s dominance and defend democracy. Trump’s second term begins in days, and thanks to Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg, the floodgates of disinformation are unchecked, unfettered, and ready to spread across Facebook and X. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you for standing with us, COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Tim Scott
subject: How I plan to strengthen our majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We are on defense this cycle because we have the majority, and more Republican Senators are up for re-election than Democrats. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ef9ef2d7dbcf403bae6a88de8eaf2aa6&_e=hDQbRgJd0pZJxXTh5PDuwIOjqhBm_Db-PV7N26dmJMuBwxasiw3zs33obJTNqZKbpy89QK5VBjsgh7Ze8wXIzWLm9-TsQU8HsTbtuoIrRHEp0sRv553P7a8YGOIe8a7SjBL5Wgn-G6XiofiQuw7YLfWUF8rXWZX1rYc-V-VvFxwGK8Dv11AcE1wlwjkP2j0CzrWyMNlZ9sp0mHZQKIWuN5SVnl2w2SfSIZGt3IVqPgPASHlbehrhnvfffJPW44qf5CO8HskL9yoz_50yp-gcFFQ_Yey9_gpdM-1PmXswpYyZJTTCP9Zw7S091JefoTnQ27zdNl0DTvomANCTJ2tYrqNOFt27zVy49bc_z3TA4ePTEFhiCkEf-8rYg-6DL8NIfO1ZUMyK8kkPnoWDku3On3mpkna9eWV7f82pjs4nQtGk3p2x00pXp6BLIaudCCGQloAnW064eiBiTHi6kcPWqw%3D%3D)

Hello fellow American, my name is Tim Scott.

I am a Republican United States Senator from South Carolina and the recently elected Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee.

Before I move forward, thank you for all your hard work this past election cycle. Former Chairman Daines devised an expert strategy to take back the Senate, and we have him to thank for our new Republican Majority.

Senate Republicans could not have regained the majority without your generous donations and steadfast support of Chairman Daines' plans.

_Fellow American, thank you for standing with Republican Senators and President Trump to Make America Great Again in 2024._

**But the fight for the American Dream and our bright future is far from won.** Radical liberals still threaten our way of life every single day with their dangerous ideas and destructive policies.

Thanks to your efforts, our Republican majority can stand for our liberties and defend the American Dream against destructive liberal policies.

Senate Republicans are enthusiastic and motivated to get to work for the American people. I look forward to working with President Trump to support Americans in achieving their unique versions of the American Dream.

We can stop radical Democrats from destroying the American Dream and dooming this great country we love dearly, [**_but only if we work together to win FIVE competitive U.S. Senate races in 2026._**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ef9ef2d7dbcf403bae6a88de8eaf2aa6&_e=hDQbRgJd0pZJxXTh5PDuwIOjqhBm_Db-PV7N26dmJMuBwxasiw3zs33obJTNqZKbpy89QK5VBjsgh7Ze8wXIzWLm9-TsQU8HsTbtuoIrRHEp0sRv553P7a8YGOIe8a7SjBL5Wgn-G6XiofiQuw7YLfWUF8rXWZX1rYc-V-VvFxwGK8Dv11AcE1wlwjkP2j0CzrWyMNlZ9sp0mHZQKIWuN5SVnl2w2SfSIZGt3IVqPgPASHlbehrhnvfffJPW44qf5CO8HskL9yoz_50yp-gcFFQ_Yey9_gpdM-1PmXswpYyZJTTCP9Zw7S091JefoTnQfpA7_ImuTsfg9zQ24nmS72-b4IemJSAjNkyikySMvXnuSPUKJgitzuA6T0SBXIFnizSqAwate7ly_6iAaMY4JG4fULVvTEObDO_mDIt9J-uSgihuSazUrnk5wR1PDznV8GsjwuhWInMYLEneYdhTPg%3D%3D)

**Lean -Democrat:**
**Minnesota**

**Toss-Ups:**
**Michigan**
**Georgia**
**Maine**
**North Carolina**
We must help Republican incumbents defend their seats in competitive races in Maine and North Carolina and support our GOP challengers in Minnesota, Michigan, and Georgia to pick up three more seats and strengthen our Senate majority.

**These seats are CRITICAL as we are on defense this election with 20 GOP Senators defending seats while only 13 Democrats are defending seats.**

We are more than capable of defending and EXPANDING our majority, but only if we hit the ground running and continue to progress in closing the Democrats' fundraising advantage.

We could lose our Senate majority if Democrats build on their fundraising advantage - it's up to us to stand up to their dangerous ideas and failed agenda. Generations of Americans yet to come are counting on us to step up now.

[**Please pitch in as much as you can today to support our NRSC campaign to expand our GOP majority by winning these competitive races.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ef9ef2d7dbcf403bae6a88de8eaf2aa6&_e=hDQbRgJd0pZJxXTh5PDuwIOjqhBm_Db-PV7N26dmJMuBwxasiw3zs33obJTNqZKbpy89QK5VBjsgh7Ze8wXIzWLm9-TsQU8HsTbtuoIrRHEp0sRv553P7a8YGOIe8a7SjBL5Wgn-G6XiofiQuw7YLfWUF8rXWZX1rYc-V-VvFxwGK8Dv11AcE1wlwjkP2j0CzrWyMNlZ9sp0mHZQKIWuN5SVnl2w2SfSIZGt3IVqPgPASHlbehrhnvfffJPW44qf5CO8HskL9yoz_50yp-gcFFQ_Yey9_gpdM-1PmXswpYyZJTTCP9Zw7S091JefoTnQ27ZHqJBkl2lqmvcbrI9yEPta2j12djMbyrQC_Au1fYn8qGiBeMYBv9T_sp44cQzOYMl7omJ3NNadWcRKU87csaSG2yp6h86YN7Ta7ALGNwkSPAZ-UqnAdhZfbJtJY71S6KfIe-zsbdc0209l7snHfw%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Senator Tim Scott

Chairman, National Republican Senatorial Committee

[**EXPAND OUR SENATE MAJORITY »**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ef9ef2d7dbcf403bae6a88de8eaf2aa6&_e=hDQbRgJd0pZJxXTh5PDuwIOjqhBm_Db-PV7N26dmJMuBwxasiw3zs33obJTNqZKbpy89QK5VBjsgh7Ze8wXIzWLm9-TsQU8HsTbtuoIrRHEp0sRv553P7a8YGOIe8a7SjBL5Wgn-G6XiofiQuw7YLfWUF8rXWZX1rYc-V-VvFxwGK8Dv11AcE1wlwjkP2j0CzrWyMNlZ9sp0mHZQKIWuN5SVnl2w2SfSIZGt3IVqPgPASHlbehrhnvfffJPW44qf5CO8HskL9yoz_50yp-gcFFQ_Yey9_gpdM-1PmXswpYyZJTTCP9Zw7S091JefoTnQt6_dtoTICzCi92fFssHH6BWg44IdcrpzChO5uWU2z48ZL4RfRTIs_lFvvocjJzVNVPXey9C_9DDcrdGe-96L0u5PTPeK72gqpjGv2xAn3324fQPW_T4qSJlRKfhSvmd271kmrb9BCx5kDBQcH8aZww%3D%3D)

Here in PA, 2025 is going to be one of the most important election years for our future. Our state Supreme, Superior, and Commonwealth Courts all have candidates on the ballot for retention. **This is our chance to put up another roadblock to MAGA extremism in our state.**

From now until November 4th, we need your help to put in the work and elect Democratic Justices and judges to these seats. We can’t do it without you. name: DNC HQ
subject: BREAKING: DNC goes to court to ensure North Carolinians’ voices are heard
body:
Here’s what’s happening in North Carolina:
---
Derek, North Carolina Republicans are attempting to overthrow an election decided by voters more than two months ago. Despite multiple recounts confirming that Justice Allison Riggs won her November election to the North Carolina Supreme Court, her Republican opponent and state and national Republicans have filed repeated, baseless legal actions in an attempt to throw out 60,000 lawfully cast ballots and overthrow a free and fair election. **Today, the Democratic National Committee announced legal action to block this attempt. The DNC is intervening to protect the rights of North Carolina voters and ensure that they — not right-wing courts — get to decide who their elected officials are.** [**Please, rush a donation to the DNC today to help us continue to build a strong Democratic Party that can protect voters, fight back against dangerous Republican plans, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight for our democracy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250110_2538_fr&refcode2=2538_22930333_jMl6Hz&akid=2538%2E22930333%2EjMl6Hz) As we enter this second Trump era, it’s more important than ever to have a strong DNC with the resources to fight for voters. _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250110_2538_fr&refcode2=2538_22930333_jMl6Hz&akid=2538%2E22930333%2EjMl6Hz)**

body:

I’ve never been more clear-eyed about the challenges we face, yet optimistic about the fights ahead. This Congress will be complicated, to say the least. **I’ll explain what I mean in just a moment, but if you’re in a hurry and don’t have time to read this whole email,[please feel free to make a quick grassroots donation before closing out!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100194554/521982601/-211837729?refcode=EM_BS_MCG_250110_FR_SophomoreTerm_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjNkNWNmZi03OWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6jSod7bwzRwdytyKbcIwLP9MojwafTPMcGFBXP6YBQ=)** | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100194555/521982602/-211837729?refcode=EM_BS_MCG_250110_FR_SophomoreTerm_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjNkNWNmZi03OWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6jSod7bwzRwdytyKbcIwLP9MojwafTPMcGFBXP6YBQ=)
---
The 2024 election cycle was absolutely brutal, there’s no denying that.
Donald Trump and the GOP are going to have a full governing trifecta, and they’ve already told us what they want to do:
**Restrict and ban abortion access, pass another massive tax break for big corporations, and... rename the Gulf of Mexico??_(I mean, I don’t care what it’s called but how about we focus on the farm bill, the budget, and actually helping people?)_**
The GOP won’t govern with working families in mind, but here’s why I remain hopeful:
_House Republicans have the slimmest majority in nearly 100 years. That means we can still assert ourselves on critical policy decisions that will impact Americans, their families, and their pocketbooks._
It’s not what we were hoping for prior to last November, but I’ve seen what we’re capable of when we work together and look out for one another.
After all, that’s why I ran for Congress in the first place.
**I could really use your back-up during my sophomore term, which is why I’m asking for your support today:[Will you pitch in $10 or $25 to help us fight for our rights and hold the House GOP accountable at every turn?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100194556/521982603/-211837729?refcode=EM_BS_MCG_250110_FR_SophomoreTerm_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjNkNWNmZi03OWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6jSod7bwzRwdytyKbcIwLP9MojwafTPMcGFBXP6YBQ=)**

clean_body: | | | = Peter, I’m one week into my 2nd term in Congress. I’ve never been more clear-eyed about the challenges we face, yet optimistic about the fights ahead. This Congress will be complicated, to say the least. I’ll explain what I mean in just a moment, but if you’re in a hurry and don’t have time to read this whole email,= | | | = The 2024 election cycle was absolutely brutal, there’s no denying that. Donald Trump and the GOP are going to have a full governing trifecta, and they’ve already told us what they want to do: Restrict and ban abortion access, pass another massive tax break for big corporations, and... rename the Gulf of Mexico??(I mean, I don’t care what it’s called but how about we focus on the farm bill, the budget, and actually helping people?) The GOP won’t govern with working families in mind, but here’s why I remain hopeful: House Republicans have the slimmest majority in nearly 100 years. That means we can still assert ourselves on critical policy decisions that will impact Americans, their families, and their pocketbooks. It’s not what we were hoping for prior to last November, but I’ve seen what we’re capable of when we work together and look out for one another. After all, that’s why I ran for Congress in the first place. I could really use your back-up during my sophomore term, which is why I’m asking for your support today:= | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I’m looking forward to embarking on this journey with you, Peter, and every other member of this grassroots team. Thanks, Morgan McGarvey | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by McGarvey for Congress Morgan McGarvey for Congress PO Box 5324 Louisville, KY 40255 United States

| | The 119th Congress has officially been sworn in, ushering in a new era of Black political leadership. From Oregon’s first-ever Black representative, **Janelle Bynum** , to the first-ever Black doctor to be a voting member of Congress, South Jersey’s **Herb Conaway** , we’re witnessing history being made.

These trailblazing firsts are more than milestones to celebrate — they’re a testament to the power of representation and the progress we’re making toward a more equitable and inclusive future where everyone’s voice is heard.

**_But we cannot afford to stop now._**

For the first time in history, two Black women will serve together in the U.S. Senate: **Lisa Blunt Rochester** , the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware, and **Angela Alsobrooks** , Maryland’s first Black senator.

In the House of Representatives, these breakthroughs continue — for the first time, two Black representatives from Alabama will serve together: **Rep. Terri Sewell** and **Rep. Shomari Figures.**

These victories were made possible through the dedication of grassroots supporters like you who understand that representation isn’t just symbolic; it’s transformative.

Now is the time to double down on this progress, championing candidates who reflect the diversity of our nation and push for policies that move us all forward. **[Will you chip in $10 today to invest in the next wave of Black political leadership?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs-99CoksmbxgeVZko3i52ddfPMw3ZFsNRU7GwSAIQeMN45pc57N0KGdXF-tOBBS9J7EjcHMaCMrzxtdEvFLWdK7YHLQZvT3JGWkToTlWXd0TSfGEvISGwf4SSfTVj0mlou_fVCF6Ctvr6XsGmhKDgZ7_Js8KTNmnU_lmikq6asUx4e3XE-JF1tyFv2zlkIihsNiI4qWTxszmmmOg9KBEd6XhhZnTu-2RWUC6dUr-xZfKf_oCF0tOTR_gzxBwztmiBsYeXd__R_b8sH3ZrZ9o7w2iHnieXAF78jmJfafE9O5FB2Al7pUWg_AWupCGtWT7YrR7xC3R1dH9JwKrIHLxvM149hpTVOlmZ6iCBxb-Gt4T1yc0zSmYf7hSLGF-3Ggxtv6_XkXyVQjScVkGmsJwUM9iYlc6z6MX89iema9qxWJg/4d1/CoMxC60iR3CwZ4VNei8iiA/h8/h001.Zutdiqkg1GxTexi9nw6VQtSq1nLIvilxmG0iR24OqHo)**

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | The 119th Congress has officially been sworn in, ushering in a new era of Black political leadership. From Oregon’s first-ever Black representative, Janelle Bynum , to the first-ever Black doctor to be a voting member of Congress, South Jersey’s Herb Conaway , we’re witnessing history being made. These trailblazing firsts are more than milestones to celebrate — they’re a testament to the power of representation and the progress we’re making toward a more equitable and inclusive future where everyone’s voice is heard. But we cannot afford to stop now. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | For the first time in history, two Black women will serve together in the U.S. Senate: Lisa Blunt Rochester , the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware, and Angela Alsobrooks , Maryland’s first Black senator. In the House of Representatives, these breakthroughs continue — for the first time, two Black representatives from Alabama will serve together: Rep. Terri Sewell and Rep. Shomari Figures. These victories were made possible through the dedication of grassroots supporters like you who understand that representation isn’t just symbolic; it’s transformative. Now is the time to double down on this progress, championing candidates who reflect the diversity of our nation and push for policies that move us all forward. | Together, we’re not just making history — we’re shaping the future. — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Dr. Asif Mahmood
subject: Fire Victims Need Our Help!
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us14.campaign-archive.com/?e=7b1b739a89&u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=33efad8069)
---
| | | | |
# Supporting our Friends and Neighbors in Need.
---
| Dear Friends,
First and foremost, I want to extend my heartfelt gratitude to all of you—both near and far—for your generous and encouraging messages. Your willingness to help means the world to us during this difficult time. I am thankful that while the Eaton fire got dangerously close to my neighborhood, we were spared. However, many of my friends and colleagues have lost everything. I kindly ask that those who believe in the power of prayer send an extra thought for everyone in harm's way in Southern California and beyond. Your positive vibes are greatly appreciated.I also want to take a moment to express my profound gratitude to the firefighters and first responders who are working tirelessly around the clock to save lives and protect property. Their bravery and dedication are truly inspiring.As we navigate these challenging circumstances, I would like to bring a few important safety tips to your attention:
1\. Water Safety: Please avoid drinking tap water. Opt for bottled or boiled water instead to ensure your safety.2\. Stay Warm Safely: Instead of using gas stoves or wood-burning methods to heat your home, please use extra blankets to stay warm.3\. Car Safety: Do not run your car in a garage or enclosed space, even for charging devices. This poses serious safety risks.4\. Security First: Keep your doors closed and locked. Only listen to verified information from family, friends, and officials with proper identification. Scammers may try to take advantage of the situation.5\. Protect the Vulnerable: Prioritize the safety of children and the elderly, as they are the most vulnerable during emergencies.6\. Medical Assistance: If you need help but it’s not a life-threatening emergency, please visit urgent care or the ER instead of calling 911, as they are currently overwhelmed.7\. Air Quality Precautions: As a pulmonologist, I want to emphasize that the air quality is poor and expected to worsen over the next few days. Those with respiratory conditions (Asthma, COPD, Emphysema, etc.) should take extra precautions, wear masks outdoors, and keep inhalers and nebulizers readily available. Ensure access to power for those who require CPAP or BiPAP machines at night.8\. Emergency Preparedness: Have an emergency kit packed in your car, and make sure your exit routes are clear. Familiarize yourself with how to manually open garage doors in case of power loss.9\. Identification and Contact Information: Always carry your ID and a close contact number with you when leaving home, even if you’re traveling with someone else.10\. Support Those in Need: Many individuals have lost everything or have very little to begin with. I encourage you to consider supporting the Mission of Hope, the largest homeless shelter in our area. We are working to provide basic necessities to those who are not currently in their shelter. [**Hope The Mission**](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=c808d729d6&e=7b1b739a89).
Thank you for your support, compassion, and understanding during this challenging time. Together, we can make a difference.
In Solidarity,
Asif
---

body:
We have big plans for the new year. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100198185/521987579/-507358213?refcode=EM_F_250111swing_N_TN_90DO_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjMWFiMGM5LTdjY2YtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IJsHoYckeRpDl0y23czlBO1T6VFSgnP31hv1ogh2lbc=)
---
| | Friend,

We hope you had a happy holiday season! Thanks to your support, we are ready to hit the ground running this month, and we have BIG plans to continue our mission to move Pennsylvania forward.

**Here is a look at our goals for the new year:**

✅ **Continue to assist eligible Pennsylvanians in registering to vote and provide civic education on the issues that matter.** Since 2021, NPPEF, alongside the affiliated New Pennsylvania Project, assisted 48,000 Pennsylvanians in registering to vote and worked to mobilize voters to ensure their voices were heard. With what’s at stake this year, we cannot afford to lose momentum. We will continue to conduct year-round voter engagement efforts across the Commonwealth, centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth.

✅ **Engage and mobilize voters in local, municipal, and judicial elections.** This year, voters will be tasked with electing local, municipal and judicial positions, including judges in partisan elections and participating in nonpartisan judicial retention elections. This includes three PA Supreme Court seats, one on the Commonwealth Court and one on the Superior Court.

✅ **Prepare to defend against attacks on voting rights.** Attacks on voters will only continue in 2025. We must be prepared to go on the offensive and defend voting rights by pushing for a PA Voting Rights Act (VRA). A state VRA would ensure protections for historically disenfranchised communities who have been underrepresented and underserved in the Commonwealth throughout history.

[**As we enter another critical election year in PA, we must continue to engage and mobilize voters to turn out and lift up the power of their voices. There will be a lot of obstacles ahead, but together, we can continue to move the Commonwealth forward. Will you help us fund our 2025 field programs by pitching in $25 or more today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100198186/521987580/-507358213?refcode=EM_F_250111swing_N_TN_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjMWFiMGM5LTdjY2YtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IJsHoYckeRpDl0y23czlBO1T6VFSgnP31hv1ogh2lbc=)

clean_body: We have big plans for the new year. | | | = | | Friend, We hope you had a happy holiday season! Thanks to your support, we are ready to hit the ground running this month, and we have BIG plans to continue our mission to move Pennsylvania forward. Here is a look at our goals for the new year: ✅ Continue to assist eligible Pennsylvanians in registering to vote and provide civic education on the issues that matter. Since 2021, NPPEF, alongside the affiliated New Pennsylvania Project, assisted 48,000 Pennsylvanians in registering to vote and worked to mobilize voters to ensure their voices were heard. With what’s at stake this year, we cannot afford to lose momentum. We will continue to conduct year-round voter engagement efforts across the Commonwealth, centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth. ✅ Engage and mobilize voters in local, municipal, and judicial elections. This year, voters will be tasked with electing local, municipal and judicial positions, including judges in partisan elections and participating in nonpartisan judicial retention elections. This includes three PA Supreme Court seats, one on the Commonwealth Court and one on the Superior Court. ✅ Prepare to defend against attacks on voting rights. Attacks on voters will only continue in 2025. We must be prepared to go on the offensive and defend voting rights by pushing for a PA Voting Rights Act (VRA). A state VRA would ensure protections for historically disenfranchised communities who have been underrepresented and underserved in the Commonwealth throughout history. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = As we get back into the swing of it, we are thankful to have you by our side. In this together, Team NPPEF | | The New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) is a non-partisan organization led by community leaders across the Commonwealth dedicated to centering underrepresented and underserved communities to embrace their power. NPPEF ensures full participation in the democratic process through civic education and year-round engagement by centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth - with intention - as they are the least represented and most impacted by decisions our government is making. body:
House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities in history — which means we can stop bad bills by putting the pressure on a handful of lawmakers.

MAGA Republican Mike Johnson was officially — but narrowly — elected Speaker of the House for the 119th Congress. **On the campaign trail, Speaker Johnson promised “massive reform” to our healthcare system, including “No Obamacare.”** Now, the Trump administration and Speaker Johnson want to extend tax breaks for the wealthy, and they are eying cuts to Obamacare, aka the Affordable Care Act, to help pay for it. This is exactly the kind of attack on working people that Emily Randall ran against. We need policies that lower healthcare costs, not jack them up! **House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities in history — which means we can stop bad bills by putting the pressure on a handful of lawmakers. ** [_**Let’s make our voices heard! clean_body: House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities in history — which means we can stop bad bills by putting the pressure on a handful of lawmakers. | If you no longer wish to hear from Emily Randall for Congress, you can sign up for or at any time. MAGA Republican Mike Johnson was officially — but narrowly — elected Speaker of the House for the 119th Congress. On the campaign trail, Speaker Johnson promised “massive reform” to our healthcare system, including “No Obamacare.” Now, the Trump administration and Speaker Johnson want to extend tax breaks for the wealthy, and they are eying cuts to Obamacare, aka the Affordable Care Act, to help pay for it. This is exactly the kind of attack on working people that Emily Randall ran against. We need policies that lower healthcare costs, not jack them up! House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities in history — which means we can stop bad bills by putting the pressure on a handful of lawmakers. Thank you so much 💙 — Emily Randall for Congress = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. body:

Hi Peter, With the 2025 legislative session starting soon, there’s no easier way to let our lawmakers know what you want to see addressed in a safe, clean, fair, and accountable transportation measure than by writing a letter to the editor (LTE). That’s why OLCV, with the Move Oregon Forward campaign, invites you to a virtual interactive training on writing a successful letter to the editor! **WHAT: Move Oregon Forward Campaign Training: Letters to the Editor****WHEN: Thursday, January 30th at 6:00 pm PT****
****WHERE: via Zoom**
---
[**Register here and mention OLCV sent you!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100201007/521992037/394927315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxY2IzZGUxLTdlY2YtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=txvEdWR2qYG0E0X7n8KtxOvUIxlzuHsBuHU03l7N1yA=&emci=fd6d6e38-c0ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=41cb3de1-7ecf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230#/registration)

name: The Only 47th President
subject: Trump WINS! Introducing The MAGA Victory AR-15
body:
With President Trump taking office..
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19717/6374453/c2c6b0bdd077b1adb3f1057d2f8f71ac8db31479/4f6e70d076a2adc7dda7b794258d8d47e6a362e0)
---
|
---
| | | | | Fellow Patriots,
History was made January 6, 2025.
They tried to stop him. Tried to jail him. Tried to KILL him. But he WON!
**As of Jan 6, Trump's victory is now CERTIFIED - and we're celebrating with something extraordinary...**
Introducing the [**__MAGA Victory AR-15__**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19717/6374453/f10a66a915781fbfd54a8a43e3b7e3ef1f8c37d0/4f6e70d076a2adc7dda7b794258d8d47e6a362e0) \- the ultimate commemorative rifle honoring our 47th President!

---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19717/6374453/f10a66a915781fbfd54a8a43e3b7e3ef1f8c37d0/4f6e70d076a2adc7dda7b794258d8d47e6a362e0)
---
| | | Our first Trump commemorative rifle (The MAGA Patriot AR-15) sold over 1,000 units before being discontinued on January 6...
Now, we're proud to reveal its successor - an even more exclusive collector's edition for 2025:

**✓ Hand-built tribute** to Trump's historic comeback victory!
**✓ One-of-one laser engravings and distressed Cerakote finish** celebrate Trump's story!

**✓ Full-auto-tested reliability** (backs your LIFETIME WARRANTY!)
**✓ Guaranteed sub-MOA “sniper rifle” accuracy** (backs your precision guarantee!)
**Plus:** You get a **FREE 2-Day LIVE Rifle Tactical Training Course**($1,500 value) and 5 MORE free bonuses!
Claim Your Piece of Presidential History:
**> > **[**_The MAGA Victory AR-15 Revealed!_**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19717/6374453/f10a66a915781fbfd54a8a43e3b7e3ef1f8c37d0/4f6e70d076a2adc7dda7b794258d8d47e6a362e0)
**WARNING****:** Only 20 rifles can be produced at a time. When they're gone, wait times extend to 100+ days.

P.S. Our previous 2024 Trump rifle became an instant collector's item when production stopped on J6. This all new for 2025 _MAGA Victory AR-15_ edition commemorates an even more historic moment in time. Don't miss out - check availability here: [_act fast to reserve your limited edition collector’s rifle now._](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19717/6374453/f10a66a915781fbfd54a8a43e3b7e3ef1f8c37d0/4f6e70d076a2adc7dda7b794258d8d47e6a362e0)

body:
Join us in Washington D.C. on January 20th to witness history as Donald J. Trump becomes the 47th President of the United States. | Hey Peter,

The countdown is on - President Donald J. Trump is headed back to the White House, and I want **YOU** to be there to celebrate this monumental moment alongside me and other Republican leaders.

We're giving away [**_two name: NextGen PAC
subject: our system is broken. here’s how we fix it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; [http://nextgenpac
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100202678/521993746/-1995327540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTY4NWRkMy04MGNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GiZrFnGwAD5PpNrMTIchdUrNooSgBJi38WEZt2gXOIo=&emci=48ac67ed-fdcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=aa685dd3-80cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)
---
Our system is broken, team.
In Washington, elected officials on both sides of the aisle have continuously sold out their constituents to benefit wealthy donors.
Corruption, corporate interests, and partisan interest groups have all drowned out our voices.
_We’re not going to let that slide._
If we’re going to fix our broken system, we have to start tackling the issues that matter most to young Americans. That means fixing our broken economy, finding solutions to the housing crisis, putting an end to political corruption, and so much more.
And since we’re all in this together, we’re doing the work to fight against corruption and work toward economic freedom.
**Will you help fund the fight?**
[Our system might be broken, but we’re not backing down. clean_body: | Our system is broken, team. In Washington, elected officials on both sides of the aisle have continuously sold out their constituents to benefit wealthy donors. Corruption, corporate interests, and partisan interest groups have all drowned out our voices. We’re not going to let that slide. If we’re going to fix our broken system, we have to start tackling the issues that matter most to young Americans. That means fixing our broken economy, finding solutions to the housing crisis, putting an end to political corruption, and so much more. And since we’re all in this together, we’re doing the work to fight against corruption and work toward economic freedom. Will you help fund the fight? | | | | | | With gratitude, NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

name: Patty Murray
subject: need your input, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
Peter, with less than two weeks until Trump is sworn in for his second term, we can’t waste a single second. So I’ll keep this quick:
* As you read this, Donald Trump is getting ready to announce more dangerously unprepared and inexperienced cabinet nominees like Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for Health and Human Services.

* I worked with Senate Democrats to confirm as many of President Biden’s remaining judicial nominees to make sure our federal bench is filled with qualified judges who will protect people’s rights and uphold the law.

* **And as we get ready for the next four years, I need to hear from Democrats like you, Peter.**

I need your input on the issues that matter most to you, so **[will you please take just two minutes to complete your strategy survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100202827/521994471/-1972881487?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk418-su-nd&recurring=0&refcode=jtk418-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzU3MmVmNS04MGNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_BnW3fToQO2UgOE9B-mikjZzThEJbDZWICXG5SReyNg=&emci=f0b4cd08-58c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=87572ef5-80cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=13116610)**

Thanks in advance for your response,
Patty Murray

We can’t let our democracy fall by the wayside, Peter. We have to do everything we can to defend our freedom. [So before midnight, we have to ask: will you support the No Kings Act by adding your name here?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T239e6aaf-141c-4fd5-81d7-f9f1b7dc130c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f1b8019-9114-47a3-a038-ea48708ae33a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | BREAKING NEWS: CONVICTED FELON PRESIDENT-ELECT TRUMP WILL FACE NO JAIL TIME! Peter, we just found out that Donald Trump will NOT go to prison after being found GUILTY on 34 felony charges. This clown should not be above the law, which is why we need folks like you to support the No Kings Act - the bill that would hold Trump accountable ONCE AND FOR ALL. We can’t let our democracy fall by the wayside, Peter. We have to do everything we can to defend our freedom. | | | The No Kings Act is one of our last chances to safeguard our democracy before Trump gets inaugurated. Since Donald Trump won the presidential election, President Biden and Senate Democrats have been working hard to end Trump’s immunity and limit the Supreme Court’s power. Just read the fine print right here: | | | And if the No Kings Act got passed and signed into law? Well... FIRST: Trump would be held accountable for his many crimes – including the 34 felony convictions on his record. THEN: The Supreme Court, controlled by a 6-3 conservative majority, would stop any corruption that they’ve been a part of! NEXT: Trump would not be in office. EVER AGAIN. | | | | | | | | It’s on us to stop Trump once and for all! Blue Amp Action HQ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. name: Tina Smith
subject: Zombie laws 🧟
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team — Donald Trump has more than proven himself to be an opponent of reproductive freedoms and women’s rights. **That’s why I’m taking action — calling on the Senate to take up and vote on my bill, the _Stop Comstock Act_. [Add your name to join me in demanding a vote on this legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100203305/521995949/-1422968329?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmEyNTFkMC04MWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NGm9IIYVJ3W0Fa4hn3pjAsWRToR6jhlKNo8WOvri0aI=&emci=35a251d0-81cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4ba251d0-81cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6227932)** | [PROTECT ABORTION ACCESS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100203306/521995950/-1422968329?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmEyNTFkMC04MWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NGm9IIYVJ3W0Fa4hn3pjAsWRToR6jhlKNo8WOvri0aI=&emci=35a251d0-81cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4ba251d0-81cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6227932)
---
As I told _Vanity Fair_ last month, Democrats are supporting this bill “in order to draw attention to this old zombie law that we knew had the potential, in a Trump administration, of being the tool that they would use to deny people’s access to abortion care, even without any action from Congress.”
That’s the unfortunate reality: **With the stroke of a pen, Trump can use provisions from the _Comstock Act_ , a law from the 1800s, to ban abortion pills and restrict abortion access. **
While Trump might _say_ that he won’t act on medication abortion, I’m focused on what he _does_. If we’ve learned anything about Trump, it’s that his actions speak much louder than his ridiculous, meandering words.
If we can stop the _Comstock Act_ , we can make sure women across the country can access medication abortion. As the only senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, reproductive healthcare access is incredibly important to me.
**[Please join me in calling on the Senate to take a vote on the _Comstock Act_ with haste. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100203307/521995951/-1422968329?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmEyNTFkMC04MWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NGm9IIYVJ3W0Fa4hn3pjAsWRToR6jhlKNo8WOvri0aI=&emci=35a251d0-81cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4ba251d0-81cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6227932)**
[PROTECT ABORTION ACCESS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100203308/521995952/-1422968329?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmEyNTFkMC04MWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NGm9IIYVJ3W0Fa4hn3pjAsWRToR6jhlKNo8WOvri0aI=&emci=35a251d0-81cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4ba251d0-81cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6227932)
---
Thank you,
Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

United States

subject: Meet IndyCar Star Ed Carpenter at Hoosier Heritage Family Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=eedb8c73f93842cfbfea3912cb99b28b&_e=hIceI2dgrN6JWE3Wg8Y460jmZOAWW7r2XqOsmThh0dTh3eIcZTcDBPJ2Km-sDQcUd-mvsw4KhvlkFPqRlVV92RJZylL8gMq8eNyZs0kB6-yPIDHrbFp7m80ee2lQjyZvghtKyIoldf6svii7p7h-8avt88x-e5jghWBgU0g5y-iSyO8PJfPzUEGZGP0Zg2F4TgdRXDKsVvqk_AvuPn5vhtHKhsMLeuaKRBjgw4Lqh8L3I_lZ48qlgOQwIsvWxslp1463jem48iWv-Qm7EwbIlQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend, Big news for IndyCar fans! **Ed Carpenter** , one of Indiana’s own racing legends, is joining us for Hoosier Heritage Family Day during Inauguration Weekend!

This is your chance to **meet Ed Carpenter in person** —he’ll be signing autographs and taking photos with fans. _**Details:**_ 📅 Date: Sunday, January 12, 2025
⏰ Time: 1:00 PM – 4:00 PM
📍 Location: 650 W Washington St., Indianapolis, IN 46204
🎟️ Admission: Free for everyone!
You can also look forward to fun giveaways, photos with Governor-Elect Mike Braun, Storytime with First Lady Designate Maureen Braun, snacks and treats, and activities for the whole family! We’d love to have you there to celebrate Indiana and make unforgettable memories with friends, family, and neighbors. 👉 **[RSVP Here](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=eedb8c73f93842cfbfea3912cb99b28b&_e=hIceI2dgrN6JWE3Wg8Y460jmZOAWW7r2XqOsmThh0dTh3eIcZTcDBPJ2Km-sDQcUd-mvsw4KhvlkFPqRlVV92RJZylL8gMq8eNyZs0kB6-yPIDHrbFp7m80ee2lQjyZvrGXRCfWvW3AKoQMslMaD-xdqyCcWH7VkYda41I3POvdDtzH7bW4gy0VVmFs2k1ZgVP6LynLNqeZp3iOONUq0QDTf4Ua-HIapAKb9YNF5y50YDKygyjkcWIiJ7fAnD69uvIrDL__JDWbTXlA1xDG_Nw%3D%3D)** **Don’t miss this exciting opportunity to meet Ed Carpenter and join the fun!**
P.S. Share this with a fellow IndyCar fan—they won’t want to miss it!
---

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Before they're gone

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=20ed875b48544de1b39836f1ed7cf0b1&_e=RJVczWvFV_IdQo1R7qXIKCTKJFcw6wxp9cvlm0jZml7SE0_3gs6vGj9nKkaiJaRrqCKHyGYBpuvkSlxpkfa7jLPESg5w8dYhF9q5u_sAMoB2S9aQ8Fd4j9OoTvh9zjhcdWFVXsLRppZiFzDjt31Hh0MyxaqP7JLAlO9J8sPRYF5wS5XIgsjcgJ99JLNG7rl_zXfvpFonov8qXYSzgmttqzB8eRH5lGrr_AkDtw6j0x041VIXxcjQxGcqnTaWKvM02a4L7_SYw_jgoxSRAfKPE0GgYyYeExakE4EqJ5mGKitnZqR1Isfdg6k8N_zpfnHPgBgXijGNNPj2VMW6imlZyHIXizREBlLRuHdfPNEuCbktKlFpSoqhTsuDzFJvRSNIWAq5IQOSdK66eP1MKjug1x6Mf_BZZBcX08eaZeFXFbgFhqRrLlRb_Hx416Gc5r_M)

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=20ed875b48544de1b39836f1ed7cf0b1&_e=RJVczWvFV_IdQo1R7qXIKCTKJFcw6wxp9cvlm0jZml7SE0_3gs6vGj9nKkaiJaRrqCKHyGYBpuvkSlxpkfa7jLPESg5w8dYhF9q5u_sAMoB2S9aQ8Fd4j9OoTvh9zjhcdWFVXsLRppZiFzDjt31Hh0MyxaqP7JLAlO9J8sPRYF5wS5XIgsjcgJ99JLNG7rl_zXfvpFonov8qXYSzgmttqzB8eRH5lGrr_AkDtw6j0x041VIXxcjQxGcqnTaWKvM02a4L7_SYw_jgoxSRAfKPEwhylAqRHDiY8HZiXCxecVI7UwUrDtRgU3saIuX-JaolFBzRqwAsCZTy5PW5bte47MCUMxFrBGbo1JGwm6IKGMOzx7eNkdokCgDDF4QyxJDblfv69-pP5Em4pXgu6fXERMOOF5GixHLrBQjsnsHaUFmXzioyklnIT7w0Pso841_W)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=20ed875b48544de1b39836f1ed7cf0b1&_e=RJVczWvFV_IdQo1R7qXIKCTKJFcw6wxp9cvlm0jZml7SE0_3gs6vGj9nKkaiJaRrqCKHyGYBpuvkSlxpkfa7jLPESg5w8dYhF9q5u_sAMoB2S9aQ8Fd4j9OoTvh9zjhcdWFVXsLRppZiFzDjt31Hh0MyxaqP7JLAlO9J8sPRYF5wS5XIgsjcgJ99JLNG7rl_zXfvpFonov8qXYSzgmttqzB8eRH5lGrr_AkDtw6j0x041VIXxcjQxGcqnTaWKvM02a4L7_SYw_jgoxSRAfKPE_v4Xijp4oqDmbcHYXbKnd9A60_mjrbjggQKgtjM-tRKMbUYbgv_O60LifdhhQCWxaG_0_N4sXa8GJ27SLtHEF4gGUDVO-wyierRcTqIq12lV8G2KbnXlAVYTFeiXINKT8GGNUzsdFyOIPL7TZwHqxuSnXICzf1Mkc36aunJ8yJW) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Joseph Bentivegna from Dr. Joe Bentivegna's Views
subject: We Do Not Need Tolls on I-95 to Counter Congestion Pricing in Manhattan
body:
This is a silly idea.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..J15BPkSN8lVL-sbNCFP-TtSmLmSjj20LhsVMUuto9IE?) for more
---
# [We Do Not Need Tolls on I-95 to Counter Congestion Pricing in Manhattan](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=154556563&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NTU2NTYzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzY1MzUyNjAsImV4cCI6MTczOTEyNzI2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.sMzFOjtwajaSOePNVHLPaSE6ibXZPTFUbsv1ILluDOY)
### This is a silly idea.
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| Jan 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=154556563&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NTU2NTYzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNjUzNTI2MCwiZXhwIjoxNzM5MTI3MjYwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzY1MjAxIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.XPpbsg_ptge2qFPO9urWOAQbDwrmKhonxSAml4RUxQE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=154556563&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NTU2NTYzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzY1MzUyNjAsImV4cCI6MTczOTEyNzI2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.sMzFOjtwajaSOePNVHLPaSE6ibXZPTFUbsv1ILluDOY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=154556563&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NTU2NTYzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzY1MzUyNjAsImV4cCI6MTczOTEyNzI2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.sMzFOjtwajaSOePNVHLPaSE6ibXZPTFUbsv1ILluDOY)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/we-do-not-need-tolls-on-i-95-to-counter?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

January 10, 2025
Mr. Jim Cameron's [columns on transportation](https://substack.com/redirect/43d94e01-4b3a-4b67-a8ff-572752a51cdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) issues in the CTMirror are lucid and informative, but [his recent article](https://substack.com/redirect/2d6f4ff5-a4d0-4e81-8de9-620e1cc7e30e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) advocating tolls on Connecticut's I-95 as an addition to the recent [congestion pricing implemented in Manhattan ](https://substack.com/redirect/cfb26c61-c063-44de-9328-74d502c0d215?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)is off base. Just because New York Governor Hochul has added another toll to drive into Manhattan does not mean we should be paying one in Connecticut.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6b4f69fd-0059-4592-80f7-4c2f17f28461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Midtown Manhattan Traffic
Anyone who has lived in Manhattan and owned a car, as I did for three years (and I parked on the street), knows that driving and parking is a nightmare. Thus, to decrease traffic, Governor Hochul decreed that those driving into parts of Manhattan, especially during rush hour, must pay another toll.
But this does not mean that forcing the citizens of Connecticut to pay a toll on I-95 is the logical next step. By Mr. Cameron's [own admission, only 11% ](https://substack.com/redirect/2d6f4ff5-a4d0-4e81-8de9-620e1cc7e30e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)of Connecticut residents who commute to Manhattan chose to drive. So why should those driving to Westchester, NJ, Long Island or to Fairfield County have to pay more.
If anything, the congestion toll in Manhattan will decrease traffic on I-95, not increase it. The idea that Connecticut residents should pay a toll to relieve congestion in Manhattan is silly.
Besides, if you put tolls on I-95, drivers will use the Post Road, the Merritt Parkway and the Wilbur Cross Parkway to avoid them.
Mr. Cameron also asserts:
_But that choice has huge implications on others when your car adds to the 700,000 vehicles in midtown Manhattan each weekday. Now you will pay more for the privilege. Yes, privilege, as you have no constitutional right to drive there._
This makes absolutely no sense. Of course you have a constitutional right to drive into Manhattan. The Commerce Clause of the Constitution prevents states from interfering with interstate commerce.
He further states:
_Driving to Manhattan already costs you in terms of gasoline, wear and tear, tolls on bridges and, most of all, your time. In weekday rush hours driving from Bridgeport to midtown takes about two hours, barring serious delays. By train the same journey takes about an hour and a half. But on the train you can work, read or take a nap._
_Mind you, the train could be faster._
All true. But what Mr. Cameron neglects to mention is that the train is simply part of the entire commute. One must drive to the train and pay a monthly fee to park. In Fairfield, this is $420 annually. And the train tickets are not cheap. In Fairfield, a monthly ticket is $407.75. And the train arrives at Grand Central Station. There is still a commute to one's work. Getting downtown to the Wall Street area can be another 45 minutes to an hour each way by taxi or subway. The roundtrip subway price is $5.50 and a roundtrip taxi is around $80.
Thus, commuting by train from Fairfield to Wall Street and back can easily take five to six hours each day and cost $7,000 annually by subway or $26,000 by taxi.
A much better solution is to allow developers to build spacious condos near the train stations along with more housing developments in the surrounding areas by decreasing the endless permit and zoning requirements. This will make the commutes to Manhattan more tolerable for condo buyers while encouraging more Manhattan businesses to relocate or set up satellite offices in Fairfield County.
But Mr. Cameron's heart is in the right place. After keeping a car in Manhattan for three years, you cannot get me to drive there now. Even at gunpoint. The drive is hideous and many of the drivers are lunatics. The Cross Bronx Expressway and FDR are zoos. And good luck parking without having to take out a home equity loan.

clean_body: = The House’s GOP leadership has already laid out their agenda – slashing Medicare and Medicaid, banning abortion nationwide, attacking IVF and contraception, and dismantling our education system. With Donald Trump heading into office and a Republican majority in Congress, we have a tough road ahead. But we know that if we stand together, we can protect American families from their dangerous agenda. Now more than ever, we need to rally as a community and show Washington Republicans exactly what we stand for – lowering costs, expanding opportunities for hardworking families, and making healthcare and education accessible to all. Andrea has helped lead the fight to protect abortion rights, raise the minimum wage, expand paid family leave, and lower prescription drug prices in Oregon. But we know these will all be long battles. We’ll have to fight hard for every inch of progress — but delivering the results the American people deserve is more than worth the effort. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Team Salinas | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. ## Tonight on The Sean Spicer Show...
What do lawmakers KNOW about the drones and UAPs and UFOs? What is Trump going to make public? All broken down on tonight's show at 6 pm ET.
Next week we've got Josh Hammer from Article III Project to give an update on the confirmations of Trump's cabinet, what you need to know on the TikTok ban, a great panel and more.
[Subscribe now!](https://substack.com/redirect/665fa7cf-5501-4ea4-a9e2-bb3ce1ad527e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Send me your new guest ideas..
Text "SPICER" to (833) 455-4513 to join my text list and then send me your ideas. Would love to hear from you.
## **Where to get Inauguration tickets ...**
I have been getting lots of questions about tickets to the events surrounding the Inauguration. There are two ways. Your members of Congress has a limited number that you can request. Additionally, the Inaugural Committee sells packages. Download the packet here for information on each package and the checkout link is below.

on the evening of Saturday, January 18, 2025. Please accept or decline the invitation below no later than Monday, January 13, 2025. More info - [here.](https://substack.com/redirect/bc1c1a49-f5f0-4d6a-852d-2c88b64670e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

PEACHTREE BALL -Saturday Jan. 18 Black Tie, Union Station "Every four years, Georgians gather in Washington, D.C. to celebrate the presidential inauguration with a ball hosted by the Georgia State Society. Inaugural balls are a fixture of Washington's celebratory inaugural activities, with the first ball dating back to James Madison's inauguration in 1809. The Georgia State Society will celebrate the occasion with members of our state's congressional delegation and statewide elected officials, complete with live entertainment, dancing, drinks and southern bite [Click here.](https://substack.com/redirect/3d2104dd-6686-41e5-94e3-dc5170797f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[Turf war breaks out over DC fighter jet squadron- RFK stadium deal ](https://substack.com/redirect/5bab1b75-564a-472c-9391-38a4a98a64e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-- via Politico
[The astonding absence and silence of the LA mayor as her city burns ](https://substack.com/redirect/ea902c98-6421-46af-91a6-72cbb26fe7e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-- via The Spectator
[Exclusive: Mike Waltz to Clean Out Deep Staters from National Security Council: 'We're taking Resignations at 12:01 on January 20' ](https://substack.com/redirect/aa183cb3-e286-4267-9fa2-13eea7752c2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-- via Breitbart
[Outgoing ICE director says Biden 'absolutely' should have acted sooner to tighten the border ](https://substack.com/redirect/858d9bc8-4093-4dae-bb19-f78f306e4207?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-- via NBC News
## It's Going to be Very Different
I'm just going to say it:
I'm jealous.
It was a honor of a lifetime to serve in the first Trump Administration. I never in my wildest dreams thought it was possible to serve as White House press secretary and definitely not for such a historic figure during one of the most consequential periods in modern history.
That being said, and trust me I'm very happy hosting my show, it would be amazing to be on the inside of the second Trump White House.
Simply put, it is going to be very different - and I think MUCH MUCH MUCH more effective and consequential.
Let me explain...

Below is a list of Balls and Celebrations compiled by my friend Jamie Burke ALL AMERICAN INAUGURAL BALL (I am MC'ing this one) Saturday, January 18, 6:00pm-Midnight Details NORTH CAROLINA SOCIETY INAUGURAL BALL Presented by the NC Society Saturday, January 18. 8:00pm-Midnight Details LEGACY OF FREEDOM BALL Presented By Black Conservative Federation Sunday, January 19, 7:00-10:00pm Details LATINO INAUGURAL BALL Presented By Hispanic 100 Sunday, January 19, 8:00-11:00pm Details PALMETTO PRESIDENTIAL INAUGURAL BALL Presented by the South Carolina State Society Sunday, January 19. 7:00pm- Midnight Details GW INAUGURAL BALL Presented by George Washington University Sunday, January 19, 8:00 pm-Midnight Details BLACK TIE & BOOTS BALL Presented by the Texas State Society Sunday, January 19 Details RALLY4VETS INAUGURAL BALL Presented By Disabled Veteran Empowerment Network (DVEN) Monday, January 20, 6:00-11:30pm Details STATE SOCIETY OF MICHIGAN: 2025 Bipartisan Inaugural Celebration on the evening of Saturday, January 18, 2025. Please accept or decline the invitation below no later than Monday, January 13, 2025. Ticket prices increase beginning December 18, take advantage of discounted pricing now. More info - For questions regarding your attendance, please email PEACHTREE BALL -Saturday Jan. 18 Black Tie, Union Station "Every four years, Georgians gather in Washington, D.C. to celebrate the presidential inauguration with a ball hosted by the Georgia State Society. Inaugural balls are a fixture of Washington's celebratory inaugural activities, with the first ball dating back to James Madison's inauguration in 1809. The Georgia State Society will celebrate the occasion with members of our state's congressional delegation and statewide elected officials, complete with live entertainment, dancing, drinks and southern bite HISPANIC INAUGURAL BALL: Give the gift of VIP subscription There is a lot of great info, behind the scenes pics, and unfiltered insight in each newsletter below the paywall for my VIPs -- so please subscribe or consider giving someone the gift of a subscription. Sean Spicer is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Stories I'm Reading... -- via Politico -- via The Spectator -- via Breitbart -- via NBC News It's Going to be Very Different I'm just going to say it: I'm jealous. It was a honor of a lifetime to serve in the first Trump Administration. I never in my wildest dreams thought it was possible to serve as White House press secretary and definitely not for such a historic figure during one of the most consequential periods in modern history. That being said, and trust me I'm very happy hosting my show, it would be amazing to be on the inside of the second Trump White House. Simply put, it is going to be very different - and I think MUCH MUCH MUCH more effective and consequential. Let me explain... Subscribe to Sean Spicer to unlock the rest. body:
Republicans have been laying the groundwork to call a constitutional convention, and if they gain complete control of just six more state legislatures, they could propose new amendments. | | |
---
| |
---|---
| **Trump and his MAGA allies want to _literally_ rewrite the U.S. Constitution – and there's one little-known way that they could do it.**
---
**Republicans have been laying the groundwork to call a constitutional convention, and if they gain complete control of just six more state legislatures, they could propose new amendments to our nation’s founding document.**
That’s why it’s critical we make sure state Democrats have the resources they need to hold our ground in state legislatures and fend off a right-wing takeover.

clean_body: Republicans have been laying the groundwork to call a constitutional convention, and if they gain complete control of just six more state legislatures, they could propose new amendments. | | | | | ---|--- | Trump and his MAGA allies want to literally rewrite the U.S. Constitution – and there's one little-known way that they could do it. Republicans have been laying the groundwork to call a constitutional convention, and if they gain complete control of just six more state legislatures, they could propose new amendments to our nation’s founding document. That’s why it’s critical we make sure state Democrats have the resources they need to hold our ground in state legislatures and fend off a right-wing takeover. body:
The images of Los Angeles engulfed in flames are hard to stomach, but what makes this wildfire crisis even harder to comprehend is the revelation that firefighters are running out of water at critical moments. It’s a scene straight out of a dystopian novel: blazing fires consuming homes while hydrants run dry, leaving firefighters powerless [...] | [](http://trk.libertyledger._Z_R-VJxT2g)
