Friends,
The State Freedom Caucus Network has grown rapidly over the last three years, so we thought it would be a good idea to introduce ourselves to all the new supporters and followers. If you missed our last three emails, we did a short Q&A with the [Network's President, Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/4af21666-ef9f-4648-b42b-0a46d170cbf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Senior Vice President Justin Ouimette](https://substack.com/redirect/edc7c113-1e52-4586-9ef4-cad4b351a53c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [our VP of Development Dana Craycroft and Sr. Development Director Sara Prinzi](https://substack.com/redirect/75da68a1-f8ac-4eab-8a4a-46323ea05904?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
This week is our latest hire, Cesar Ybarra, a seasoned conservative strategist who came to us from the House Freedom Caucus. So he's already part of the family. Enjoy!
* * *
**What is your role at SFCN?**__ I serve as the Vice President of Government Affairs. I facilitate the Network's operations in Arizona, Idaho, Montana, South Dakota, and Wyoming. Andy Roth likes to call me the "King of the West!"
**Where are you from originally? Where do you live now?**__ I am Mexican by birth, American by choice. I'm originally from Tijuana, Mexico, but grew up in San Diego, California (America's Finest City). I currently live in Arlington, Virginia.
**Tell us about your family! And pets!** I was raised in a tight-knit family. My amazing mother passed away in 2019 from ALS; her courage battling this devastating disease taught me a million different things that have shaped who I am today. No pets!
**What's the best part of your job?** The best part of the job is being in the arena. It's a special and unique opportunity to work alongside courageous, conservative legislators who understand what time it is in America.
**How did you come to SFCN? What did you do before?**__ I've spent most of my time over the last decade working for House Freedom Caucus members and mission-aligned organizations. Prior to joining SFCN, I was Policy Director for the House Freedom Caucus. While serving in this role, I attended the State Freedom Caucus Foundation's first annual summit in Dallas, TX. It was an incredible event where I got to meet State Freedom Caucus legislators, staff, and supporters. It told me everything I needed to know about the organization; and made it easy for me to say "yes" when I received the job offer from the Network last month.
**Who or what most shaped your political philosophy/ideology?** My conservative foundation comes from my Catholic upbringing. My disdain for taxes is what originally drew me to the Republican Party, but I think it was a mixture of listening to El Rushbo's Institute for Advanced Conservative Studies, and working for Arizona Congressmen Matt Salmon and Andy Biggs, that really got me fired up about conservatism. My political philosophy is simple: limit the relationship between the individual and the state.
**Pick One To Answer: Favorite food? Favorite place to vacation? Favorite Book? Favorite Quote?**__ Beach vacations are nice, but the best vacation is the one where you can simply put down the phone, turn off the social media apps and notifications, and enjoy the world free from the screen!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c76c7a36-61e5-42ae-98f0-3ca66f1cb4cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/5c4540e9-fd5d-46ee-911f-2f714f57f0e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

_Andrew Roth
President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider [a contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/5c4540e9-fd5d-46ee-911f-2f714f57f0e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
You're currently a free subscriber to [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.com/redirect/0c09f7dc-d6e4-41cb-a63c-8d1b9e505842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.eMqA-JndFE9GztFvxDtb7i2j0EuD_0ynZxUN0XdafGg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.eMqA-JndFE9GztFvxDtb7i2j0EuD_0ynZxUN0XdafGg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: take our survey!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Team,

As a leader and a problem solver, I know how important it is to listen to the people around me. That’s why our campaign is built one voice at a time from grassroots supporters like YOU. We want to make sure your voice is heard.

From getting costs down, to creating jobs, to protecting Jersey Values, I’m running for Governor to deliver meaningful change for the people of our state. But first, I need to hear from you. Can you take a moment to fill out our survey about how to solve the critical issues facing people in Jersey? [https://go.josh4jersey.com/a/prisv-2501]

SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS >> [https://go.josh4jersey.com/a/prisv-2501]

The best ideas on how to solve problems come from those who are facing them head-on. That’s why I want to hear from you. So please, take a moment to fill out this survey and let me know how I can help! [https://go.josh4jersey.com/a/prisv-2501]

Thank you,

Josh
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. Georgia and other states have an expansive legal statute that permits any voter to challenge the right to vote of any other voter in that county or municipality. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Cori is right
disclaimer_text: paid for by billionaire donors and corporate interests who will always
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

The priorities of our country’s leaders are completely out of
whack, Peter, and every day,
working-class people are paying the price.

The United States saw an 18.1% increase in homelessness last year, with
more than 770,000 people across the nation considered homeless.

Former Justice Democrats’ Rep. Cori Bush rightly pointed out the hypocrisy
of our government constantly claiming we lack the resources to ensure
every person has food on the table and a roof over their head, yet we
somehow always have enough money for the military, including billions of
dollars in aid and arms sales for Israel to carry out genocide.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250110?refcode=em20250110-36306&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36306_1203867_jZ1_hb&akid=36306%2E1203867%2EjZ1_hb ]Tweet from Cori Bush: Our government will always find more money for
endless war, while year after year the number of people experiencing
homelessness in the United States is skyrocketing. Don’t tell me we don’t
have the resources to end the unhoused crisis.

This is what happens when the majority of our elected officials are bought
and paid for by billionaire donors and corporate interests who will always
put war and profits over people.

Democrats must set their priorities straight. It’s time for the Party to
separate itself from the billionaire class and re-align with working
people, and that means sending more working-class candidates to represent
us in Congress.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250110?refcode=em20250110-36306&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36306_1203867_jZ1_hb&akid=36306%2E1203867%2EjZ1_hb ]Help us find and support progressive candidates from working-class
backgrounds to challenge out-of-touch, establishment Democrats in the 2026
midterm elections: pitch in any amount you can afford today.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250110?refcode=em20250110-36306&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36306_1203867_jZ1_hb&akid=36306%2E1203867%2EjZ1_hb ]Contribute $5

While most Democrats and Republicans take massive checks from billionaires
and corporate PACs, we rely on grassroots donations from regular people
like you.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250110-36306-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36306_1203867_jZ1_hb&akid=36306%2E1203867%2EjZ1_hb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36306%2E1203867%2EjZ1_hb

[ ]Contribute $5 While most Democrats and Republicans take massive checks from billionaires and corporate PACs, we rely on grassroots donations from regular people like you. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: John Fetterman
subject: Rebuilding from the ground up 👷
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
When you elected me, I made a promise to fight every day to get real results for people in all 67 PA counties.
#
Derek, it’s John Fetterman. When you elected me, I made a promise to fight every day to get real results for people in all 67 PA counties.
**So today, I’m *very* proud to say that we just secured $52 million in federal funding for infrastructure projects across PA:**
🛣️ Fixing up crumbling rural roads + bridges
⚡ Expanding our EV charging network
🏞️ Creating parks to promote tourism + investment
👷 Strengthening local economies + creating jobs
This is what it looks like when we rebuild from the ground up and refuse to leave anyone behind. **We’re investing in people first, no matter their zip code.**
I’ve said it before, I’ll say it again: I’ll *never* stop fighting for working people in PA + across the country. [**If you’re with me, will you kick in $5 to keep me going?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250110?refcode=em20250110-9779&refcode2=9779_434096_muiIHt&akid=9779%2E434096%2EmuiIHt)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250110?amount=5&refcode=em20250110-9779&refcode2=9779_434096_muiIHt&akid=9779%2E434096%2EmuiIHt)**
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250110-9779-footer&t=1&refcode2=9779_434096_muiIHt&akid=9779%2E434096%2EmuiIHt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9779%2E434096%2EmuiIHt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9779%2E434096%2EmuiIHt)

_**[Sign Up NOW For Our National Kickoff to Save Our Health Care:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100206327/522006525/542109402?refcode=20250110_em_ex_b1_np4c_main_grassroots_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTY1ZWJhNy04YWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3sm68vU9npUviVCdWJTRiLrDB5OCkX-RZXqNP_I9DhY=&emci=db4c74f4-7ecf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b165eba7-8acf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=16320219)**_
Sunday, January 12, at 7pm ET / 4pm PT
Health care is a universal need and for many of us – it is the cause of our lives and the fight for life itself. People know what access to health care – and the lack of it – means to them and to their family.
The Affordable Care Act provides essential protections and access to vital health care, ensuring health and financial security for millions of vulnerable Americans.
As we all saw this week with the devastating California wildfires, all of us are just one diagnosis, one accident, one tragedy, one phone call away from needing health care and the preexisting condition protections guaranteed by the Affordable Care Act. We must come together and fight to ensure it is here to stay despite MAGA Republican plans to take it away to give more tax cuts to their billionaire donors.
Sign up NOW to join me, our special guests and thousands of patient advocates and Volunteers in Politics like you this Sunday, January 12th, at 7pm ET / 4pm PT for our national kickoff event to Save Our Health Care! >> _**[https://saveourhealthcare.info/kickoff](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100206328/522006526/542109402?refcode=20250110_em_ex_b1_np4c_main_grassroots_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTY1ZWJhNy04YWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3sm68vU9npUviVCdWJTRiLrDB5OCkX-RZXqNP_I9DhY=&emci=db4c74f4-7ecf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b165eba7-8acf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=16320219)**_
We must act together NOW to protect our health care! That starts with a clear-eyed assessment of the MAGA Project 2025 threat to our health care and our urgent mobilization to STOP Republicans’ plans to end the ACA and make harmful cuts to Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security Disability Insurance and other vital, lifesaving programs for the American people.
Thank you for being indispensable partners in our grassroots coalition that was critical to getting the Affordable Care Act done in the first place and to saving it in the first Trump term. Your commitment and outside mobilization NOW will Save Our Health Care again!
NANCY
**[SIGN UP NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100206329/522006527/542109402?refcode=20250110_em_ex_b1_np4c_main_grassroots_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTY1ZWJhNy04YWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3sm68vU9npUviVCdWJTRiLrDB5OCkX-RZXqNP_I9DhY=&emci=db4c74f4-7ecf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b165eba7-8acf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=16320219)**

clean_body: | | | Sunday, January 12, at 7pm ET / 4pm PT Health care is a universal need and for many of us – it is the cause of our lives and the fight for life itself. People know what access to health care – and the lack of it – means to them and to their family. The Affordable Care Act provides essential protections and access to vital health care, ensuring health and financial security for millions of vulnerable Americans. As we all saw this week with the devastating California wildfires, all of us are just one diagnosis, one accident, one tragedy, one phone call away from needing health care and the preexisting condition protections guaranteed by the Affordable Care Act. We must come together and fight to ensure it is here to stay despite MAGA Republican plans to take it away to give more tax cuts to their billionaire donors. Sign up NOW to join me, our special guests and thousands of patient advocates and Volunteers in Politics like you this Sunday, January 12th, at 7pm ET / 4pm PT for our national kickoff event to Save Our Health Care! >> We must act together NOW to protect our health care! That starts with a clear-eyed assessment of the MAGA Project 2025 threat to our health care and our urgent mobilization to STOP Republicans’ plans to end the ACA and make harmful cuts to Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security Disability Insurance and other vital, lifesaving programs for the American people. Thank you for being indispensable partners in our grassroots coalition that was critical to getting the Affordable Care Act done in the first place and to saving it in the first Trump term. Your commitment and outside mobilization NOW will Save Our Health Care again! NANCY Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. = Nancy Pelosi is counting on you. If you want to stay updated but , let us know If you would like to completely from future emails, you can do so _ | Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States | | Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

body:
#

Team —
It’s thanks to you that Mark Kelly is serving in the United States Senate.
And with everything coming our way this year, we’re lucky to have him there. So — really — thank you.
The team we’ve built together is incredibly important to us, and to Mark. And as Mark gets ready for a new session in Congress, he’s hoping to hear from you. We ask you to fill out these issue surveys from time to time because they help us improve as a team, and they help Mark understand what is most important to his top supporters.
[**If you’ve got a few minutes, could you please fill our Mark’s first Official Issue Survey of the new year?**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-jan25-issue-survey_em?source=em250110-1-90&akid=5943%2E6688874%2EUdYAAj)
**[FILL OUT THE SURVEY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-jan25-issue-survey_em?source=em250110-1-90&akid=5943%2E6688874%2EUdYAAj)**
There’s a lot of serious work ahead, and it’s okay to be anxious. But more than anything, it is incredibly important that this team stays together. Because together, we can accomplish great things.
Thank you,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5943%2E6688874%2EUdYAAj).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: Growing our movement
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=Z8JHuIJCRd3NZItEOXgrLEYGWuwN9E%2FxSpZm3Xr29BjbzGQG6NsNpNSOGK27TNNsnYmuQ7jS6YvVlH6NyhQX08JEh0EmY%2BS62codm0eXVmIDE3bImK%2Bn7wBULXKc4EPMAK%2FoUp9vHnP10Q7zIvWGsVxwNLvbJI%2BwJExg6ukp56Q3%2BgqYTZ3UFyjU83i9yuV2u5RuewOmaiG89YD0R%2Bh43XHR1P7%2BHAK6SEJZHhs0bT8uypW84hKOMHQ0o6CbbNZcleqE0MVgkkW8%2B%2BlT2sxtbCC%2FFd3Cug7ypbDKEoB%2BZTo1Rxxykz01MidaF9wijwTTCEUQTsWAJar1jhV0F2vLWs74CEMWgiQjgvqFUEy35ga0HnEBr0ILvORWdXLf0%2FHiIC60JB%2BN9JMTX8GgKjBjzdasEWAngU0OfKph%2FJSNzYo%3D]

# [#]
Hi Peter,

In 2024, 2,419 of you donated to our efforts. Those donations helped support our canvassing efforts and get-out-the-vote campaigns boosting Texas progressives up and down the ballot.

Like so many, we felt the weight of this past presidential election in our state. If there’s one thing we’ve learned from 2024, it’s that progress is neither linear nor quick—it’s a marathon, not a sprint.

So in 2025 and beyond, we’re not stopping. We’ll keep building power to help elect progressives who will protect reproductive freedom, fight for immigrants’ rights, and advance the priorities of our most vulnerable communities.

But it’s going to take a strong coalition of grassroots donors to help elect those progressives, and building that coalition starts today.

So Peter, if you want to be a part of the change to make Texas a better place for all of us regardless of race, income, gender, preferred language, or ZIP Code, will you become a 2025 Founding Donor today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25]

Become a founding donor » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25]

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Hi Peter, In 2024, 2,419 of you donated to our efforts. Those donations helped support our canvassing efforts and get-out-the-vote campaigns boosting Texas progressives up and down the ballot. Like so many, we felt the weight of this past presidential election in our state. If there’s one thing we’ve learned from 2024, it’s that progress is neither linear nor quick—it’s a marathon, not a sprint. So in 2025 and beyond, we’re not stopping. We’ll keep building power to help elect progressives who will protect reproductive freedom, fight for immigrants’ rights, and advance the priorities of our most vulnerable communities. But it’s going to take a strong coalition of grassroots donors to help elect those progressives, and building that coalition starts today. So Peter, if you want to be a part of the change to make Texas a better place for all of us regardless of race, income, gender, preferred language, or ZIP Code, will you become a 2025 Founding Donor today? body:
Be the reason someone says, "Yes, I’ll run."
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100207237/522009805/915086918?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Recruit_250110_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjgyMGIwYy04ZmNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXWf4DKs5QiJR2ZdU4vHLEcoyVb1R4d99Po8pAQogxU=) Team,

Ohio needs Democrats stepping up to lead at the local level – people ready to fight for affordable healthcare, strengthen our public schools, and stand up to Republican obstruction. **But we don’t just find these leaders – we help build them.**

[_**Your $5 will help us recruit and train the next Democratic candidate in your neighborhood that will fight for everyday Ohioans. **TO: Leader Jeffries
FROM: A Grateful Democrat**
**I wanted to thank you for committing to defending Social Security from Republican cuts.**

Hearing that Trump’s plan could leave Social Security bankrupt within six years was so worrying, so I’m very grateful that you’re stepping up to make sure our seniors are protected!

**If we’re facing another two years of Republican chaos in the House, I rest a little easier knowing you’re fighting back for us.**

**[That’s why I’m signing this letter to thank you and adding a donation to New Dems to make sure we elect more pragmatic leaders to join you in delivering for working families »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100207597/522010827/-1930966278?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=NDCAF_20250110_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTgwMTg1OC05MGNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZljdmEU06Vvf8l4D0rSy-tP1Ke5z64Eqc-mUxGKpPNs=)**

Folks, As we continue fighting for a better Arizona, we’re looking to the future we’re building together. A future that includes a working-class economy, reproductive freedom, and a state that works for everyone — but we can’t get there without you. We’re finalizing our plans for 2025, and gathering your input is critical to ensuring that every Arizonan is represented in our strategy to move our state forward. **That’s why we’re asking you to fill out our first priorities survey of the new year:** **[Do you have a minute to take our 2025 Priorities Survey and let us know what’s on your mind?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100207657/522011022/1098005679?contactdata=CQcvC/TndRPD7728W6plWEjaehF7FnJphCITVO3nwkaHNssPBccayRVxaJjRO8bQGfBAwkcKyQjYuZ6Qyd9SXJ5KM6ckR4A+p/f99wVzd0tHPHOl6esqVE/xZRf6s8aCMbNFRE1lqjSY9YkW9u4CvQ==&refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjdjMDE2YTItOTBjZi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n-JCKJGqG43ClTkFsv-zFdSbLRv2tVV1lRL80cLDkuA=&emci=61c016a2-90cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=67c016a2-90cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9307116)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100207658/522011023/1098005679?contactdata=CQcvC/TndRPD7728W6plWEjaehF7FnJphCITVO3nwkaHNssPBccayRVxaJjRO8bQGfBAwkcKyQjYuZ6Qyd9SXJ5KM6ckR4A+p/f99wVzd0tHPHOl6esqVE/xZRf6s8aCMbNFRE1lqjSY9YkW9u4CvQ==&refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjdjMDE2YTItOTBjZi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n-JCKJGqG43ClTkFsv-zFdSbLRv2tVV1lRL80cLDkuA=&emci=61c016a2-90cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=67c016a2-90cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9307116)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Building progressive power in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila recently sat down with The 19th News to reflect on her term as chair of the Progressive Caucus, and here’s what she had to say:
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250110-4660-footer&t=1&akid=4660%2E420207%2EE_e2DL)
Peter, as Donald Trump prepares to head back to the White House, one way we’re preparing to fight back is by building our bench and elevating new leaders at the Congressional Progressive Caucus.
Pramila recently sat down with _The 19th News_ to reflect on her term as chair of the caucus, and here’s what she had to say:
_“**My biggest pride is building the CPC into a real force** that was able to accomplish things for real people. I feel very good about having done that._ _There would have been no Inflation Reduction Act without Build Back Better, and**there would have been no Build Back Better without the CPC.** ”_
---
[**Will you pitch in $3 to help Pramila continue fighting for a bold, populist, working class agenda in Congress?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250110?refcode=em20250110-4660&amount=3&refcode2=4660_420207_E_e2DL&akid=4660%2E420207%2EE_e2DL)
Pramila is right — we scored some major wins in the Inflation Reduction Act that would not have happened without progressives fighting for them:
* We made the **single largest investment in fighting climate change** in US history

* We **capped insulin costs for Medicare patients** and **allowed Medicare to negotiate drug prices**

* We **taxed big corporations** and invested in the IRS to **go after corporate tax evaders**

All of these are wins worth celebrating. But we know it’s not enough — there is still so much more to do to lift up working families across the country, and that’s why it’s critical that we keep working to build progressive power in Congress.
**Despite taking a step back as Chair, Pramila is still firmly committed to this work. But since she doesn’t take corporate PAC donations, she’s counting on this people-powered movement to help her keep fighting.**
[**So Peter, with just over a week to go until Donald Trump re-enters the White House, can we count on you to pitch in $3 or whatever makes sense for you to help us keep up the fight for our progressive values?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250110?refcode=em20250110-4660&amount=3&refcode2=4660_420207_E_e2DL&akid=4660%2E420207%2EE_e2DL)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250110?amount=3&refcode=em20250110-4660&refcode2=4660_420207_E_e2DL&akid=4660%2E420207%2EE_e2DL)**
Together,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250110-4660-footer&t=2&refcode2=4660_420207_E_e2DL&akid=4660%2E420207%2EE_e2DL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4660%2E420207%2EE_e2DL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4660%2E420207%2EE_e2DL)

subject: This is not an off-year.

body:
The fight for justice, accountability, and democracy is never over. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100207915/522011818/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDljMzhiZi05MWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gkuw30-KyHZw0OwjDwdq2doDa4kHiobtdUcfHOngBD4=)

Peter, Wiley is heading into 2025 with one clear message: **there are no off-years in the fight for justice and accountability.** As the new year begins, he’s doubling down on his commitment to hold Donald Trump and his allies accountable for their actions. This isn’t just about elections — it’s about ensuring that our democracy remains strong and our leaders are held to the highest standard. Wiley is leading that charge, but he can’t do it alone. He needs allies in this fight, people like you who are willing to stand up for what’s right no matter the year, no matter the timeline. Whether there’s a big election around the corner or not, this fight doesn’t stop. [**Will you add your name and pledge to stay in this fight alongside Wiley? Together, we can secure a future of justice and accountability.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100207917/522011823/-747815789?contactdata=1QWo6RK0fEahzATMgGWiV2ykT6dsvLPcqz0NdKtzUo36mOj2AGgGTlDiXLB1yNem85jYO5hUb11kYvkoBsbXUuO8IVvoD6Q9h0rpHQMcKhaU6aZl1avBZUQujQ8Yf6Tv&refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDljMzhiZi05MWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gkuw30-KyHZw0OwjDwdq2doDa4kHiobtdUcfHOngBD4=&emci=8a2d39b9-91cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=fd9c38bf-91cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=28008880) | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100207919/522011825/-747815789?contactdata=1QWo6RK0fEahzATMgGWiV2ykT6dsvLPcqz0NdKtzUo36mOj2AGgGTlDiXLB1yNem85jYO5hUb11kYvkoBsbXUuO8IVvoD6Q9h0rpHQMcKhaU6aZl1avBZUQujQ8Yf6Tv&refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDljMzhiZi05MWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gkuw30-KyHZw0OwjDwdq2doDa4kHiobtdUcfHOngBD4=&emci=8a2d39b9-91cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=fd9c38bf-91cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=28008880)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Here’s how to support our brave firefighters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39385%2E3422442%2EbiyM1y)
Derek,
These LA wildfires are devastating, and my thoughts and prayers are with the many Californians affected.
[_For information about wildfire safety, please click here._](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21280?t=2&akid=39385%2E3422442%2EbiyM1y)
I’m so thankful for the firefighters who are bravely working around the clock to contain the fires and evacuate residents. If you’re safe from the fires and able to make a donation, **[consider supporting LA firefighters and our community by donating to the California Fire Foundation.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250110-wildfires?refcode=em20250110-39385&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39385_3422442_biyM1y&akid=39385%2E3422442%2EbiyM1y)**
**For firefighters:** The foundation supports families of firefighters who are killed or injured in the line of duty, and helps incoming firefighters who need assistance affording the exams they’re required to take before joining the fire service.
**For the community:** The foundation helps people in need of immediate assistance by distributing $250 gift cards to eligible survivors who need help getting things like food and clothing.
**[Will you join me in making a donation to the California Fire Foundation? Every donation made adds up to make a real difference for people in need.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250110-wildfires?refcode=em20250110-39385&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39385_3422442_biyM1y&akid=39385%2E3422442%2EbiyM1y)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250110-wildfires?refcode=em20250110-39385&refcode2=39385_3422442_biyM1y&akid=39385%2E3422442%2EbiyM1y)
I am praying for my neighbors in Los Angeles and so grateful for all of the hard work of the first responders who are on the frontlines.
With gratitude,
Katie Porter

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people.
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39385%2E3422442%2EbiyM1y).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: It could potentially overturn the results of a free and fair election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
The actions of the North Carolina Supreme Court are alarming.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100208371/522012951/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4MWI0ZGIwLTkzY2YtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VO5rhrnAcUUFY2lAV-FGJdzOAK4GMKeTdRjGiFgcXVs=&emci=4d9d1e71-76cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=781b4db0-93cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8431045)
---

Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr. responds to the North Carolina Supreme Court issuing a stay blocking the certification of Democratic Justice Allison Riggs’s re-election: PeterThe actions of the North Carolina Supreme Court are alarming. Any judge that operates in an independent and fair manner would maximize the chance that all of North Carolinians’ ballots are counted and ensure that the electoral result reflects the decision of the citizens of the state. The vote is the voice and the power of the people. It is not for a court to decide the outcome of an election. In a functioning democracy the will of the people — as expressed in an election — prevails. **Should the North Carolina Supreme Court throw out lawful ballots, it could potentially overturn the results of a free and fair election —** achieving the same goal as those who perpetuated a violent coup attempt on our nation’s capitol just four years ago. This must not be tolerated. **I am concerned that the very recent actions of the Court presage a continued diminution of a democracy already under attack in North Carolina. The arrogant, anti-democracy move to stop the certification of a free and fair election while this court considers whether or not to throw out 60,000 lawfully-cast ballots underscores that.** More soon. — Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States
Chairman of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100208372/522012952/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGHolderNCStatement_email_20250110-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderNCStatement_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250110-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderNCStatement_&utm_campaign=AGHolderNCStatement&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4MWI0ZGIwLTkzY2YtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VO5rhrnAcUUFY2lAV-FGJdzOAK4GMKeTdRjGiFgcXVs=)

Hey Peter, it’s Ritchie.

I recently sent over a poll on the No Kings Act to gauge where voters (like you!) stand — **and I’m still waiting on your response.**

We have limited time to act on the No Kings Act and stop Presidents from becoming above the law — but we need massive public support: [**If you could take 1 minute to complete this poll, I would really appreciate it! »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100208532/522013432/-517489226?refcode=RTFC_20250110_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWFkNDczNi05NWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsLLC2QL3QG7kC6N0zfKc_FSqbjQTg_ELEIYb6V6iQo=&emci=8f17ddd4-6fcf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b1ad4736-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=34594689) | [CLICK HERE TO TAKE THE NO KINGS ACT POLL »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100208533/522013433/-517489226?refcode=RTFC_20250110_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWFkNDczNi05NWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsLLC2QL3QG7kC6N0zfKc_FSqbjQTg_ELEIYb6V6iQo=&emci=8f17ddd4-6fcf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b1ad4736-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=34594689)

Thank you so much,
_Ritchie_

(You can read my original message below.)
**Peter, in July, the Supreme Court ruled in _Trump vs. the United States_ that Presidents and Vice Presidents, from here on out, will have unlimited authority and immunity from prosecution.** _I don’t have to tell you how dangerous this could be, Peter!_

**In September, Senator Chuck Schumer introduced the _No Kings Act_ in response** to ensure that no President is above the law, because no one — much less the President of the United States — should be free from accountability or consequences.

**But in November, Trump won the presidency...** and with it, immunity and unchecked authority.

Now, we have limited time to act on the No Kings Act and stop Presidents from becoming above the law — but we need massive public support:
[**That’s why I need to know, Peter: Do you support the No Kings Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100208534/522013434/-517489226?refcode=RTFC_20250110_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWFkNDczNi05NWNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsLLC2QL3QG7kC6N0zfKc_FSqbjQTg_ELEIYb6V6iQo=&emci=8f17ddd4-6fcf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b1ad4736-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=34594689)

name: The Feel Good Flyover
subject: Bummed Out Bobcats, 1 Million Pushups, and a Zoo’s Festive Feast
body:
Two Kansas linemen braved subzero wind chills to rescue a mother bobcat and her kitten that were frozen to a power pole during Sunday's severe winter storm.

## Teens Save Couple From New Year’s Fire
Three Maine teens driving home in the early hours of New Year's Day discovered a burning farmhouse and rushed inside to save a sleeping couple. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL1uhTAUg58mbEEnJz-UIUMXttu1I8oNJ5Aql6CQQnn7ij5AF8uypU-WPx_jw8UU1_nDvciGOYw15BEBNQfBBYyTi-kaVTPZQIQkG7Kik0Yr7CU2i3U6gA9vohf9cwq-DyidUVJKxKA7UE20Nw2EAATdoWmFJuNBefMk43utmQKaYs2l_cpxrQuFdOWDSuvzq0l2qXXbmXxnODAczvNsQ_4RUI-7ZzjcdIYDiFuQ4SD5QiVHzyvRuvMS15mvdPKLXOHPi-_uuKM9EW238fl7S8RDLMRwaIqdtjOmFHfTMQXzy8X0N6X-d89h8TcAAP__QMNnNA). Cousins Robert and Kaleb Weymouth, 16 and 14, and friend Colby Simmons, 16, found the husband asleep on a couch dangerously close to advancing flames that had spread from the barn. The teens [woke the sleeping couple](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2uozAUBOCnMd2JzDGQpKBIQ3e32GalbZAxY-KVfyLbBPH2q9wHuO180kgzf77mL-28i9svHTDazc7Vppkl9yRbauW8aufPuWvW0QIM1WBsr2roO74rbp6jYYVF9lJfgdui-rvmu-YbFG6dMYobN37aZNtKlv2Vh0vbYzCyM8OCwdz7XnQSq6spX_4lF-sT1p_pjXwxKTR-fNb6KkI9BE-Cp-M4LqHEjwmeEGkvgqfXvnhnqGiLepKOKyEgb4jG4ePWZXzHGcXsEDwF7SKoArFQ0W-QSfvLg2xOgZY9Rxc3eqYAgs7-pBQp4qATOlOhVZ-CJ53p8WiP3_GvavK4vg7nvSvDVXRyC9r57wH1p1PfI_8PAAD___VNfXA), helped them gather essential belongings, including medication, and dodged falling debris and propane blasts to get the couple to safety.
## Goats Graze to Guard Against Wildfires
A herd of over [300 goats in Boulder County](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL1u7CAUhJ8GOiw45me3oLiNu71tSgvDwSbBZgVorX37yKlSpZ0ZzSd9H4_54VJOx_rf7WjjGuceywwcFOOCCT4Hl_J7ljTYiAg4UrTCjFpJuI9AN3sL7q5FiLcotTEiKuTB4SIEGq28vNFkrzcuBAeuDOhBKNSeS68X1P6uFJEcQ-qlDp8lHX3DmN_lhXXwZafZbr0_Gxn_EZgITOd5Dn5pB57t6glMvuRSXSgEpislMK3FdbbU0hi6zmKqyGpqX-zXklYbnmfKOTVtiOTr7lL-Afa_JLwsfAcAAP__ieBg9Q), Colorado, is helping prevent wildfires in a delightfully natural way. Led by Goat Bros owner Jordan Sarazen, the goats graze on dry vegetation, turning potential fire fuel into harmless manure. This eco-friendly team has gained popularity since the devastating Marshall Fire, with locals embracing the goats' charming role in protecting their community. Look at [the goats on Instagram](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8zz2O6yAUQOHVQBcLrvkJBcVr3OW1U1oYLvYdYRNhFCu7H2UWMP3RJ52vx_wIVOhY_4cdfV7z3HOdQYC-CXmTYk6ByntWPPmMCDhy9NKORitwI_DN53S3aKJddHajsymAkwKtsnelnZbIyX80IaUAoS2YQWo0UahoFjTRac2UwES9tuG70tE3zOVdX9iGWHde_Nb782TjPwYTg-m6roGOs4e1hf1TMJjWGvrS6llKZDDx5tPzolLoNJYpse6Byq_V__p7efgJAAD__-GKU2w).
## Linemen Free Frozen Bobcats from Power Pole
Two Kansas linemen braved subzero wind chills to rescue a mother bobcat and her kitten that were frozen to a power pole during Sunday's severe winter storm. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80D3O4yAUheHV2N21AJufFBTTuMu0U1oXuNhMwEQ2iZXdjzIL-OojPTp6_9yXO6ac9vU3FrJxjUuLdRFMSGAcOFsCpvxZpj7YSCRo7MlyPSo5idso-s1K0joiTgJNdE4ZH7WMBqPzim7BsD7Zr8Y4Z4JJLdTAJSnPJq8cKX-TspsYhdTqMfytaW8bxfypbzoGX0uf7dba8-zGX52YOzFf1zU88EHfsRPzVgt1Yn7gfuIJOe1UcIcT33RCqQVcdR4b4B7AvxyE15H2FZInOFs9vgIeLflMSwjeGG8YeOc0cE4RUGqCEIV3pLhhkYatldwfNjyvlHM6le4mthZM-f_X9lO_txX_AgAA__8gynUX). Dominic Urban and Eric Hartwell spent two hours carefully freeing the animals in 16-degree weather, crafting a makeshift snare from pipe and rope to safely lower them to the ground. The mother bobcat ran off after being freed, and her kitten followed shortly after in the same direction, reuniting the pair in an unexpected [happy ending to their power restoration](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2O6yAUBOCnwR3W4fDjuKC4jbvcdkuLwCEmwSYybKy8_cr7ANtMM9I30nxd56tLOW33_24lG-9xbrHMCKg5CC5gDi7lz6y6YCMRkuzIikEarXCU2C32gso5A_EiQ7yNoOCCQWkptR-DMlF1yZ4aCAEIekDTC03Gg_LmRsaPWjMFFFIre_8oaWsLxfwpb9p7X9Yu26W1V2XyH8OJ4XQcR_-MIZ0lw-mkGU4gzhgYTo9H5W1xrXJ3UC0r8afbqqs8p41Wt_FWeFuI71T9NzGcut2G15FyTtUMTMF9dSn_Tre_7nhb_AkAAP__yqVhmQ) duties.

Sometimes the most heartwarming moments come in the coldest conditions. This week, two Kansas linemen braved subzero wind chills to frozen to a power pole during Sunday’s brutal winter storm. Ready to see what resilience—and a little creativity—can accomplish? Let’s dive in! We have a new sponsor this afternoon: . Check out the best pet food options they offer with a special discount for The Flyover readers. | Teens Save Couple From New Year’s Fire Three Maine teens driving home in the early hours of New Year's Day discovered a burning farmhouse and rushed inside to save a sleeping couple. . Cousins Robert and Kaleb Weymouth, 16 and 14, and friend Colby Simmons, 16, found the husband asleep on a couch dangerously close to advancing flames that had spread from the barn. The teens , helped them gather essential belongings, including medication, and dodged falling debris and propane blasts to get the couple to safety. Goats Graze to Guard Against Wildfires A herd of over , Colorado, is helping prevent wildfires in a delightfully natural way. Led by Goat Bros owner Jordan Sarazen, the goats graze on dry vegetation, turning potential fire fuel into harmless manure. Watch . This eco-friendly team has gained popularity since the devastating Marshall Fire, with locals embracing the goats' charming role in protecting their community. Look at . Linemen Free Frozen Bobcats from Power Pole Two Kansas linemen braved subzero wind chills to rescue a mother bobcat and her kitten that were frozen to a power pole during Sunday's severe winter storm. . Dominic Urban and Eric Hartwell spent two hours carefully freeing the animals in 16-degree weather, crafting a makeshift snare from pipe and rope to safely lower them to the ground. The mother bobcat ran off after being freed, and her kitten followed shortly after in the same direction, reuniting the pair in an unexpected duties. | Flying together with our sponsor Welcome to 2025, where your dog deserves real, wholesome, healthy food. What’s lost during processing is sometimes replaced with cheap fillers and synthetics to make the food look and smell more appetizing. You won’t find any artificial flavors, colors, or added fillers in . name: Team Freedom VA
subject: 💊Prescription Drug Affordability is Making Waves in Virginia💊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
freedomva.org [freedomva.org]
Yesterday, we met with legislators and affordability advocates in support of Delegate Karrie Delaney's Prescription Drug Affordability Board bill [https://lis.virginia.gov/bill-details/20251/HB1724] .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20145505.png]
“I want to live in a Commonwealth where people like my child never have to weigh the cost of buying groceries against paying for their medication,” said Del. Karrie Delaney, whose child has type-1 diabetes. “It is time to prioritize Virginians’ health over pharma’s profits. It is time for Virginians to do more than just get by every day; we must ensure they can get ahead.”
-Delegate Karrie Delaney
The Prescription Drug Affordability Board would be an independent body of health and medical experts that will lower the cost of medicine by creating upper payment limits on how much Virginia consumers will pay for certain high-cost medications. Similar legislation was passed through the legislature last year but was unfortunately vetoed by the Governor.
Read More Here [https://www.vpm.org/news/2025-01-10/karrie-delaney-shalonde-dozier-calhoun-prescription-costs-general-assembly]
We were lucky to be joined by Mrs. Shalonde Dozier Calhoun, a Hampton Roads nonprofit leader and advocate, who shared the story of her son Seth’s fight with cancer and the roadblocks her family encountered in getting treatment. After Seth’s death, Shalonde and her husband founded the “ I FIGHT Like Seth Alliance” [https://www.ifightlikeseth.org/] to advocate for other families like hers and spread awareness about the illness her son fought.
“Sadly, there are people and families across Virginia who can’t afford to fight like Seth. I believe Virginia should explore the high cost of drugs.”
-Shalonde Dozier-Calhoun
https://www.ifightlikeseth.org/ [https://www.ifightlikeseth.org/]
Shalonde Dozier-Calhoun and her son, Seth Calhoun
Learn More About Shalonde's Story [https://www.ifightlikeseth.org/]
Thank you to Delegate Karrie Delaney, Delegate Ellen Campbell, Senator-elect Kannan Srinivasan, Delegate Nadarius Clark, Jared Calfee of Virginia AARP, and Hampton Roads advocate Shalonde Dozier-Calhoun for joining us in supporting this vital legislation. It’s time to lower the cost of prescription drugs in our Commonwealth.
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva] https://www.linkedin.com/company/freedom-virginia [https://www.linkedin.com/company/freedom-virginia]
Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc.
Freedom Virginia
PO Box 10102
Norfolk, VA 23513
United States

body:
This is huge!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100209098/522015219/1328794144?refcode=ea.c053a2e6-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.c053a2e6-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwNTNhMmU2LTk1Y2YtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VFSD22-PJJSe7BtYmRnHeUU-BkpOa0dKax_DTeyoQ7g=&emci=96165d8e-8ecf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c053a2e6-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)
---
Hello there — As fires continue to devastate California, our hearts are with the families grieving, the displaced communities, and the brave first responders on the frontlines. Today, we’re reaching out with a glimmer of hope — a bold step forward in the fight against the climate crisis that we hope brings a glimmer of optimism in this challenging week. **President Biden took executive action this week to _ban new offshore drilling across 625 million acres of U.S. waters._** With this action, new drilling leases are banned across the entire East Coast, the eastern Gulf of Mexico, the Pacific coasts of California, Oregon, and Washington, and parts of Alaska’s Northern Bering Sea. Biden’s executive action will make it extremely difficult for the incoming Trump administration to undo — even with Trump’s promise to _"unban it immediately."_ The science is clear: to limit the worst impacts of the climate crisis, we need to leave all remaining fossil fuels in the ground. President Biden’s executive action prioritizes the health of our oceans, coastal economies, and future generations. From stopping catastrophic oil spills to protecting marine life and combating climate change, this victory will have ripple effects for years to come. We know Trump and his allies in Congress will fight tooth and nail to reverse this decision. That’s why it’s so important for us to show the strength of our movement. **[Add your name to support this major climate victory and thank President Biden for taking action >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100209104/522015225/-1327211447?refcode=ea.c053a2e6-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.c053a2e6-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwNTNhMmU2LTk1Y2YtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VFSD22-PJJSe7BtYmRnHeUU-BkpOa0dKax_DTeyoQ7g=&emci=96165d8e-8ecf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c053a2e6-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)** | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100209111/522015232/-1327211447?refcode=ea.c053a2e6-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.c053a2e6-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwNTNhMmU2LTk1Y2YtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VFSD22-PJJSe7BtYmRnHeUU-BkpOa0dKax_DTeyoQ7g=&emci=96165d8e-8ecf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c053a2e6-95cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)

Your voice helped make this possible. Let’s keep the momentum going.
Team JanePAC
P.S. clean_body: This is huge! | Hello there — As fires continue to devastate California, our hearts are with the families grieving, the displaced communities, and the brave first responders on the frontlines. Today, we’re reaching out with a glimmer of hope — a bold step forward in the fight against the climate crisis that we hope brings a glimmer of optimism in this challenging week. President Biden took executive action this week to ban new offshore drilling across 625 million acres of U.S. waters. With this action, new drilling leases are banned across the entire East Coast, the eastern Gulf of Mexico, the Pacific coasts of California, Oregon, and Washington, and parts of Alaska’s Northern Bering Sea. Biden’s executive action will make it extremely difficult for the incoming Trump administration to undo — even with Trump’s promise to "unban it immediately." The science is clear: to limit the worst impacts of the climate crisis, we need to leave all remaining fossil fuels in the ground. President Biden’s executive action prioritizes the health of our oceans, coastal economies, and future generations. From stopping catastrophic oil spills to protecting marine life and combating climate change, this victory will have ripple effects for years to come. We know Trump and his allies in Congress will fight tooth and nail to reverse this decision. That’s why it’s so important for us to show the strength of our movement. | Your voice helped make this possible. Let’s keep the momentum going. Team JanePAC P.S. If you’ve been impacted by the fires in Southern California and need a break from our emails, Take care of what matters most, and we’ll be here when you're ready. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

[](https://substack.com/redirect/765f1762-d12d-43ab-96b5-31b6cecd0051?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TeJUaB7q5V6HekphJk6Jjq8yi1aqNjV0DhJ4i-jfoc4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154554606)

---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
Let's start with the facts, folks. California is burning, and it's not just because someone dropped a cigarette. No, this disaster, the scale of which we're witnessing, is a direct outcome of Governor Gavin Newsom's egregious policy failures. As Mayor of New York City I saw my fair share of mismanagement, but this is on another level of incompetent failure.
First, let's talk about forest management--or rather, the lack thereof. Newsom promised the moon and the stars when he took office, claiming he'd address California's wildfire crisis with proactive measures. But what did he do? He cut the budget for fire prevention by **[a staggering $100 million](https://substack.com/redirect/7cc41c2a-f83c-4f65-b148-0c6498272caf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. That's right, at a time when the state was crying out for more resources to combat the blaze, Newsom did the opposite. This isn't just a policy failure; it's a betrayal of the trust of Californians who expected leadership, not lip service...

body:
| | | Team -- This is a long message, but you need to know all of it.

**If you don't have much time, here's the most crucial part: Flipping the Senate is our BEST opportunity to stop Trump in his tracks. The GOP knows this too, and they're already gearing up for a vicious fight.[We have more details below, but first, will you chip in $5 before our midnight deadline to fight for a Democratic Senate? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20854?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250110-DeadlineApproaching-GenericLongFormFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250110-DeadlineApproaching-GenericLongFormFR-ETG-sl1&akid=19334%2E9716520%2E0fuWyo)**

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/20854?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250110-DeadlineApproaching-GenericLongFormFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250110-DeadlineApproaching-GenericLongFormFR-ETG-sl1&akid=19334%2E9716520%2E0fuWyo)
---

Here's what you need to know:

**FIRST: DEMOCRATS HAVE AN OPENING TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE.**

With a special election in Ohio already announced and another likely on the way, plus MULTIPLE battleground seats up for election, we have a real chance to defeat Trump's biggest enablers and flip the Senate blue. But there's a catch:

**REPUBLICANS JUST SPENT OVER HALF A BILLION DOLLARS TO FLIP THE SENATE -- AND THEY COULD SPEND _EVEN MORE_ THIS TIME.**

We'll need a _big_ grassroots push to counter their money-printing megadonor machine. That means every supporter needs to make a difference if we're going to have a shot at victory.

**We've set a $50,000 midnight fundraising goal to start countering their millions -- but time's running out quickly, and we're still short of our target! Please, we need you with us:**

**[Can you pitch in $5 or more before our critical midnight deadline to take back the Senate? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20854?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250110-DeadlineApproaching-GenericLongFormFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250110-DeadlineApproaching-GenericLongFormFR-ETG-sl1&akid=19334%2E9716520%2E0fuWyo)**

name: Josh Harder
subject: My thoughts on Trump’s sentence
body:
No time.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100210123/522018535/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwNmFhODAtOTljZi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QsUIBW5Sc7o_epgQ8UVSnUxsmv9-ndazrZVEh6KykBE=) | Peter, It’s official: Donald Trump has been sentenced to 37 felony convictions. And there will be zero consequences. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100210124/522018537/-31595347?&refcode=E11938-20250110-TrumpSentence-Image-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwNmFhODAtOTljZi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QsUIBW5Sc7o_epgQ8UVSnUxsmv9-ndazrZVEh6KykBE=)****For the first time in American history, we will have a convicted felon as President of the United States.** Today really shouldn’t be about politics, it should be about the standards we want for our elected officials. In a few days Trump will be sworn in and a few weeks after that, the Senate will (most likely) be confirming his picks to lead our law enforcement and intelligence agencies. I pray that they are willing to hold our democracy to higher standards. [_**Right now, it’s essential that we have members of Congress who will stand up to Trump if he continues to disobey the law. Will you donate now to help me keep holding Trump accountable in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100210125/522018539/-31595347?&refcode=E11938-20250110-TrumpSentence-SL-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwNmFhODAtOTljZi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QsUIBW5Sc7o_epgQ8UVSnUxsmv9-ndazrZVEh6KykBE=) [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100210126/522018541/-31595347?&refcode=E11938-20250110-TrumpSentence-SB-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwNmFhODAtOTljZi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QsUIBW5Sc7o_epgQ8UVSnUxsmv9-ndazrZVEh6KykBE=) Peter, regardless of Trump’s sentence, the most important thing is that we don’t allow him to commit more crimes while he’s in office. **Trump is going to feel emboldened by this sentence and think he can get away with more crimes because of the Supreme Court’s “Presidential immunity” defense. I refuse to let him think he’s above the law.** [_**Will you help me hold Trump accountable by making a donation today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100210127/522018543/-31595347?&refcode=E11938-20250110-TrumpSentence-SL-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwNmFhODAtOTljZi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QsUIBW5Sc7o_epgQ8UVSnUxsmv9-ndazrZVEh6KykBE=) Shaking my head... \- Josh

subject: [SURVEY] We need your input!
body:

Please don’t underestimate the seriousness of the situation.
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.
| |

| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=93ee1562b1a44606b5621fa14c09c0a8&_e=TdF8Zq5XRGyyPLe2yYlWFwgJUaOr6o6Zt381UbMgLeb_YfwkYk7jyKuvpX6O5Kl6DbPSkivgqWYFGfFUDxbV-hFlzwBzu1nF7Sqy2bFtCDFHzij6FyDgr2xVPyFc--fKwEUPV3XtC6oUyXymhEuGDP72PmGtDgxVn7h4hxIju_ucPnbUxBnv7LcQIB7wdhksmgwaT8hc1Afvp23XWS5TDQqGyFzutnuvnCHSxViMiyQZkx0mW9bZZwHdQOfeyTXIKJvaHazmm8Cf0fbiLthfDTKr6tYDOrOrrrlizxym91Vy1UiC5zm5xN-Qh61U-Lw1UPq2gCx_nNIgZmythwFTIZzFUYWu2y4eEzhs756SQhut2r11sO_9TpPCcpUQHvxfKnXQp0h766fFdePMLYCtEYdxrr3SbMSb3bQOgHUA5hA%3D "Friend – we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.")_**

_***** CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES *** **_

name: Indiana GOP
subject: 2025 Legislative Session
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**2025 Legislative Session
**_
---
Friends, This week, the 124th Indiana General Assembly convened, officially launching the 2025 legislative session! Our Republican leaders in the House and Senate set the tone on Wednesday, outlining bold legislative agendas and ambitious goals. It's clear that they are ready to roll up their sleeves and work alongside Governor-Elect Mike Braun to deliver results for the people of Indiana.

As we approach Indiana’s Gubernatorial Inauguration on Monday, January 13th, let’s take a moment to celebrate the incredible efforts that brought us here. From grassroots volunteers to state party leaders, Republicans across Indiana worked tirelessly to elect outstanding candidates at every level. Thanks to your dedication, our state is positioned for a bright and prosperous future.

At Indiana GOP HQ, we’re excited for what’s to come in 2025 under Governor-Elect Braun’s leadership, as well as the initiatives from our Republican leaders in the General Assembly. Together, we’ll continue to champion the values and policies that make Indiana strong. Thank you for all you do!
---
| |
---
| | Erin Lucas, Indiana GOP Interim Chairwoman
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| | _**Governor-Elect Mike Braun is Ready for the 2025 Legislative Session, and Attended a Celebration in His Honor!**_
---
---
**Governor-elect Mike Braun** [shared](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=fb85eb64920649b396f185ad7bf635ba&_e=UGatVR6nfKrG0idhk3O5vwJMDq_xioMKy_Db5A4gB_yiX82in6HRSA1-we5ftiggLB6stdlTKRh64tMpJhVh-5mGRz7caS21A7kUY2PO2VBBo-WxzLqisXw0g1De1XI7cEHihX-kolP5xZpVb_R308zj08_qy3qSMe10Zk0nXMJurw7cy3nbPo04RTrIXT0lKGMl2EbUaERPJoo-QpEhwfmZpiDJ5UPfX9qA_b1h3CwlsIrAIk1HOnuPSjhHtvqo) a message with the Indiana General Assembly as they convened for the start of the 2025 legislative session. **What's he saying** : "As the 124th General Assembly convenes for the start of the legislative session, I am eager to tackle the issues Hoosiers from all 92 counties have shared with me. Together, we have an incredible opportunity to make a lasting impact for the people of Indiana.

I’m looking forward to working alongside each of you to achieve our shared goals—strengthening our communities, creating opportunities for Hoosiers, and ensuring Indiana remains a great place to live, work, and raise a family." \- **Governor-elect****. Braun** said via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=fb85eb64920649b396f185ad7bf635ba&_e=UGatVR6nfKrG0idhk3O5vwJMDq_xioMKy_Db5A4gB_yiX82in6HRSA1-we5ftiggLB6stdlTKRh64tMpJhVh--VNSVYUNwMFs4YMg_dGZy3O0qURMJV5YVZCOYnwIU2gK-0hjb9cDFc6rzFP3X5BSswwWLJqEfEGZW89sSu11fpQ5jrRS5qBwlkFmmbt_GpmJHGIUlPOgIPiRPvAhQcam-oWLvIikhMB94gCtlGtjWH9KIM6ahm6oW6evjIjBMtJ).
---
---
**Governor-elect Mike Braun** [attended](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=fb85eb64920649b396f185ad7bf635ba&_e=UGatVR6nfKrG0idhk3O5vwJMDq_xioMKy_Db5A4gB_zEOnSXa5hW49soB8FoTPsYuTBuJ8n2Wo1sf3O2xAL_X1NEDU9XfXMSReTQg-v73o0-oQtKRZk8cnD1z0ckGLMZPwiaMAtu3K-QZU8iW7ISn6sTa3wSuWbElFN01_Y8epoihPxWzo9tJ5jagaHqf4rfcyRECTIdjoAJ7tUnz0fZdb9tkbH18kQr5N8hBQGowxgfw-16G-TUEIx9yStdTEV7) a welcome home celebration in his honor, hosted by the Jasper Chamber of Commerce. **What's he saying** : "Thank you to the Jasper Chamber of Commerce for the warm welcome home from my time in D.C. It was wonderful to see so many familiar faces. Maureen and I feel incredibly blessed to be back home in Indiana!"
\- **Governor-elect****. Braun** said via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=fb85eb64920649b396f185ad7bf635ba&_e=UGatVR6nfKrG0idhk3O5vwJMDq_xioMKy_Db5A4gB_zEOnSXa5hW49soB8FoTPsYuTBuJ8n2Wo1sf3O2xAL_X8bhyx8tK_0yzNmMOvaSX4Yed_wcV3KM5Pl_BxRGgH5ZC9w4hXqN964VvyvuWbv_UQxj9lNbQ4r4a1uqzMrLazzMKKuLkk_XvS6eOyFScqEygeSMJiAHd4luqw8nwk7wZZTR5kizT3tVk-qXSUTKQyny4d7lK644lEtmVgPD54Pb).

_**Join us for Hoosier Heritage Family Day!**_
---
---
Big news for IndyCar fans! Ed Carpenter, one of Indiana’s own racing legends, is joining us for Hoosier Heritage Family Day during Inauguration Weekend!

This is your chance to**meet Ed Carpenter in person** —he’ll be signing autographs and taking photos with fans.
📅 Date: Sunday, January 12, 2025
⏰ Time: 1:00 PM – 4:00 PM
📍 Location: The Indiana State Museum - 650 W Washington St., Indianapolis, IN 46204
🎟️ Admission: Free for everyone! RSVP Here! 🔗 [https://braunfamilyday.rsvpify.com/](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=fb85eb64920649b396f185ad7bf635ba&_e=UGatVR6nfKrG0idhk3O5v_WoPJ3jLcitewSBx5gzzISBjNVIy2iqgKNjZT7YI_FezZAqVeTriHfu1KTY56F6uadIrhk0Eh1Vu29M09iEdu8RwXu2Xjr3Zlt4goSYZ0C3yfqkiGa8n5P28fMHFXgJj3ywzgnWJKtR2ge4HDWYBA1J0KAuUuYnjTs6baBKkGUm1Ii-9bnYMIe4e8J4-oS_Lw%3D%3D) You can also look forward to fun giveaways, photos with Governor-Elect Mike Braun, Storytime with First Lady Designate Maureen Braun, snacks and treats, and activities for the whole family! **Don’t miss this exciting opportunity to meet Ed Carpenter and join the fun!**

clean_body: | | | | | | | 2025 Legislative Session Friends, This week, the 124th Indiana General Assembly convened, officially launching the 2025 legislative session! Our Republican leaders in the House and Senate set the tone on Wednesday, outlining bold legislative agendas and ambitious goals. It's clear that they are ready to roll up their sleeves and work alongside Governor-Elect Mike Braun to deliver results for the people of Indiana. As we approach Indiana’s Gubernatorial Inauguration on Monday, January 13th, let’s take a moment to celebrate the incredible efforts that brought us here. From grassroots volunteers to state party leaders, Republicans across Indiana worked tirelessly to elect outstanding candidates at every level. Thanks to your dedication, our state is positioned for a bright and prosperous future. At Indiana GOP HQ, we’re excited for what’s to come in 2025 under Governor-Elect Braun’s leadership, as well as the initiatives from our Republican leaders in the General Assembly. Together, we’ll continue to champion the values and policies that make Indiana strong. Thank you for all you do! | | | | Erin Lucas, Indiana GOP Interim Chairwoman | | | | | | Governor-Elect Mike Braun is Ready for the 2025 Legislative Session, and Attended a Celebration in His Honor! Governor-elect Mike Braun a message with the Indiana General Assembly as they convened for the start of the 2025 legislative session. What's he saying : "As the 124th General Assembly convenes for the start of the legislative session, I am eager to tackle the issues Hoosiers from all 92 counties have shared with me. Together, we have an incredible opportunity to make a lasting impact for the people of Indiana. I’m looking forward to working alongside each of you to achieve our shared goals—strengthening our communities, creating opportunities for Hoosiers, and ensuring Indiana remains a great place to live, work, and raise a family." \- Governor-elect. Braun said via . Governor-elect Mike Braun a welcome home celebration in his honor, hosted by the Jasper Chamber of Commerce. Maureen and I feel incredibly blessed to be back home in Indiana!" \- Governor-elect. Braun said via . | Join us for Hoosier Heritage Family Day! Big news for IndyCar fans! | My name is Jamie, and I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself. I’ve known Sarah for a long time. In fact, we interned together over a decade ago in Congressman Steny Hoyer’s office, and then both went on to careers working on behalf of all Marylanders. When Sarah asked me to be her Chief of Staff, I knew I would get to continue the work I loved alongside a smart and dynamic leader. I’ve spent over 12 years working in the Maryland Congressional Delegation, and I can tell you that Sarah is the real deal.

I also wanted to introduce the rest of our amazing team to you!

Hannah Cooper will be our Deputy Chief of Staff and Legislative Director. Hannah was the Deputy Director of Federal Relations for Governor Wes Moore, and she worked for Congressman Anthony Brown for six years.

Eva Lewis will be our District Director. Eva has led the Maryland Democratic Party and Affordable Housing Conference of Montgomery as Executive Director. She served Maryland in multiple state agencies and is a proud Returned Peace Corps Volunteer and Obama for America Alumna.

Katie Petersen will be our Communications Director. She has managed communications for Acting Labor Secretary Julie Su, Congresswoman Lori Trahan, and the Center for American Progress.

[_**I couldn’t be more proud of the team we have built. Will you contribute $25 or more today to help this team start the new year strong?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100210685/522020411/-1717512322?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ5NzUzMy05Y2NmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KYYM6dU648MIh8ken97GY2U4DPO7UBmpK-n8Htyo4X0=)

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

Jason just wrapped up his first week back in Congress for the new session.

It’s more clear than ever that we need servant leaders like Jason who won’t back down from fighting for what’s right and finding commonsense solutions.

The new year is sure to present its fair share of challenges: Donald Trump will be inaugurated in just days, he has nominated many unqualified loyalists to serve in his Cabinet, and Republicans in Congress are ready to greenlight his extreme agenda.

But one thing is for sure: Jason is not running scared. Now is the time to stand up and be strong in order to get things done for the American people, and that’s exactly what Jason will do.

Jason has always gone where the fight is — and he certainly won’t back down now. Will you join him by pitching in any amount to support his important work for Colorado in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-jan25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: How to help the victims of the LA fires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
The devastation from the LA Fires is heartbreaking.
To date, at least ten people have lost their lives; over 9,000 structures, including many residences, have been outright destroyed; and approximately 180,000 residents are under mandatory evacuation orders.
Right now, I’m thinking of all of the families and communities in LA, those who have lost their loved ones, their homes, and their communities.
I’m grateful for the work of the heroic firefighters and first responders on site, doing everything they can to put out these fires and ease the situation.
And I am determined to do anything and everything to support our fellow Californians during this time of need, and through recovery as well.
If you’re looking for a way to help, please contribute to the California Fire Foundation and the California Community Foundation to provide desperately needed resources to wildfire victims today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-la-wildfirerelieffund?refcode=x_011024_LAfires]
Friend, it’s up to us to help however we can.
Whether it’s donating to relief efforts, volunteering with local organizations, or simply spreading the word about how others can contribute, every action makes a difference. Our strength as Californians has always been in our ability to come together in the face of tragedy. Let’s show our neighbors in LA that they’re not alone — that we stand with them, ready to rebuild and recover as one community.
DONATE TO SUPPORT VICTIMS OF THE LA FIRES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-la-wildfirerelieffund?refcode=x_011024_LAfires]
With hope and solidarity,
Congresswoman Lateefah Simon
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=x_011024_LAfires [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=x_011024_LAfires] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s taking this fight to Congress. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a fighter.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]

name: Hoosiers for Haggard
subject: Back in the Statehouse!
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2a76eed3eda9/on-the-road-again-17994830?e=72dace1453)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
# Back to work in the Statehouse
---
| This week, I was glad to get back to work representing my constituents for another 2 year term as your state representative. Next week I will plan on addressing my bills in more detail so this week we will discuss what we have been up to in week one.
---
|
---
| To start off the session, I met with concerned farmers and community leaders from Tippecanoe and Boone county to discuss what we will be doing to pass water access reform and ensure we have better transparency in the IEDC. Although my district is outside the affected area, I believe it is imperative we continue to reign in government overreach because issues like that affect all Hoosiers.
---
|
---
|
---
| I also had the honor to recognize our great law enforcement with a proclamation for National Law Enforcement Day. Thank you Representatives Genda and Shonkwiler and Senator Clark for joining to honor our officers!
---
|
---
| Lastly, I want to thank everyone again for the wonderful birthday wishes I have been receiving this week, it means a lot to be able to represent you and I look forward to continue to representing you these next two years!
---
[Check out our website here!](https://hoosiersforhaggard.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9e7cbafb97c2110b065cece3&id=ba0b9492b9&e=72dace1453)

| | | **This is _BEYOND BELIEF!_** Trump was just sentenced for his **BOGUS** convictions in NY. This proves everything we already know. This case of Trump was total political persecution and only served one purpose, to try and **KILL** the MAGA movement. The Deep State tried **EVERYTHING** they could to ruin our chances in November. In spite of it all, Trump came out on top and the American people **WON!** And now they want to punish Trump for winning. We can’t let this stand, and I want to lead the charge. This is Ryan Mackenzie. I’m a newly elected Congressman and Trump-endorsed Conservative. I’ve been advocating for Trump since **DAY ONE. ** But right now we have to **ACT!** I want to take this appeal all the way to the Supreme Court. But I can’t do this alone.
