clean_body: Peter, 2025 is just beginning, but our plans for this cycle are already in full swing. We’re prepping for the hard work ahead as we face a Republican-led government. We’re going to need every grassroots supporter with us to ensure we have the resources to hold this new government accountable. That’s why we’re reaching out now to ask you to make your first contribution of the year: = Name: dpwillis67@gmail.com 2025 Status: Non-Donor Suggested Contribution:= If you've recently donated by check, at an event, or with a different email address, thank you! Your online record may still be updating but don't worry, we have your contribution and appreciate your support! Peter — the challenges ahead in 2025 are clear. From protecting our democracy to championing policies that reflect our shared values, we’re relying on supporters like you to help us hit the ground running NOW to ensure we have the resources needed to defend our progress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks for considering becoming a part of this movement. Let’s make 2025 a year to remember — together. Thank you, Schrier Finance Team Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100213332/522027376/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDY1ZjNhNi1hM2NmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LxD9CqvSq3Dw4ec9wlhjZ9op9Amui0gMlksyubcEts=&emci=b4fa202c-a1cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=8465f3a6-a3cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4925535)_ ****
_Budget Legislative Session Begins at Statehouse_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100213333/522027377/-1266207301?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDY1ZjNhNi1hM2NmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LxD9CqvSq3Dw4ec9wlhjZ9op9Amui0gMlksyubcEts=&emci=b4fa202c-a1cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=8465f3a6-a3cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100213334/522027378/1786597808?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDY1ZjNhNi1hM2NmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LxD9CqvSq3Dw4ec9wlhjZ9op9Amui0gMlksyubcEts=&emci=b4fa202c-a1cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=8465f3a6-a3cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4925535) The 2025 Indiana General Assembly legislative session is underway. With it being an odd-numbered year, the legislature must pass a new two-year budget for the state. Democrats are hard at work, showing we’re the party of problem solvers, and working across the aisle on issues like education, mental health access, child care, and property taxes. Hoosiers all deserve the chance to get ahead, and that’s why we’re fighting for working families, not special interests. ****_New Republican Bills Attack Public Schools, Local Communities, Medicaid Recipients, and Victims_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100213335/522027379/398555564?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDY1ZjNhNi1hM2NmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LxD9CqvSq3Dw4ec9wlhjZ9op9Amui0gMlksyubcEts=&emci=b4fa202c-a1cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=8465f3a6-a3cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100213336/522027380/398555564?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDY1ZjNhNi1hM2NmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LxD9CqvSq3Dw4ec9wlhjZ9op9Amui0gMlksyubcEts=&emci=b4fa202c-a1cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=8465f3a6-a3cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4925535) Just hours into the legislative session, and Republicans are proposing dissolving the state’s largest school district, banning the possession of medication abortion, and requiring rape victims to fill out a notarized affidavit in order to receive care. It’s an extreme agenda by the Republican supermajority that’s out of touch with the priorities of regular Hoosiers. No low income Hoosier should lose access to health care, but that’s what the legislature is proposing to do by kicking over 100,000 off of their HIP insurance plan. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100213337/522027381/-171075377?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDY1ZjNhNi1hM2NmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LxD9CqvSq3Dw4ec9wlhjZ9op9Amui0gMlksyubcEts=&emci=b4fa202c-a1cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=8465f3a6-a3cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100213338/522027382/-171075377?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDY1ZjNhNi1hM2NmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LxD9CqvSq3Dw4ec9wlhjZ9op9Amui0gMlksyubcEts=&emci=b4fa202c-a1cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=8465f3a6-a3cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4925535) House Democrats on Wednesday launched their Working Hoosiers Agenda for the new legislative session. It includes ending the state wait lists for Medicaid and the waiting list for access to Pre-K. Instead of passing a handout to the wealthiest 1% to go to private schools, we should be funding the public schools which are the backbone of our communities. This includes universal Pre-K access for Hoosiers across Indiana. **** clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Budget Legislative Session Begins at Statehouse The 2025 Indiana General Assembly legislative session is underway. With it being an odd-numbered year, the legislature must pass a new two-year budget for the state. Democrats are hard at work, showing we’re the party of problem solvers, and working across the aisle on issues like education, mental health access, child care, and property taxes. Hoosiers all deserve the chance to get ahead, and that’s why we’re fighting for working families, not special interests. New Republican Bills Attack Public Schools, Local Communities, Medicaid Recipients, and Victims Just hours into the legislative session, and Republicans are proposing dissolving the state’s largest school district, banning the possession of medication abortion, and requiring rape victims to fill out a notarized affidavit in order to receive care. It’s an extreme agenda by the Republican supermajority that’s out of touch with the priorities of regular Hoosiers. No low income Hoosier should lose access to health care, but that’s what the legislature is proposing to do by kicking over 100,000 off of their HIP insurance plan. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. House Democrats on Wednesday launched their Working Hoosiers Agenda for the new legislative session. It includes ending the state wait lists for Medicaid and the waiting list for access to Pre-K. Instead of passing a handout to the wealthiest 1% to go to private schools, we should be funding the public schools which are the backbone of our communities. This includes universal Pre-K access for Hoosiers across Indiana. Get Involved! Opportunities After the Election As we move past the 2024 Election, it is imperative that we unite together to create a better future for our state. One of the best ways to do that is to help us rebuild our party and grow in the coming months and years. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Monday, January 13th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on Three Steps to Establishing Your Campaign. INDems IN the News WNIN: Indiana Capital Chronicle: WFYI: Courier Press: Indiana Capital Chronicle: Indiana Public Media: FOX59: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

clean_body: Want tickets? He wants you there - seriously. | | | | | He’d love the chance to meet you. P.S. In case you’ve already entered this contest, feel free to donate any amount right now, and I’ll add two more tickets with your name on them to the drawing bucket! Here’s what the winning ticket includes: -(2) Tickets to Trump’s Inauguration! -(2) Plane Tickets and a hotel in Washington DC. -(2) Tickets to the black-tie Starlight Ball - Trump and Vance will be there! Don’t forget, today is the last day to enter. We’ll reach out to you soon if you’re the winner! Sincerely, Team Trump | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. All contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. name: Team Benson
subject: Criss-cross
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Here’s how our community conversations are going:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=27%2E181023%2E2n-LnN)
Team,
Secretary Benson is committed to being a _true_ public servant — that means hearing and addressing the concerns of _everyone_ in the great state of Michigan.
That’s why she’s been criss-crossing the state to hold even more Community Conversations and having face-to-face talks with people from Ann Arbor to Kalamazoo, Canton to Downriver.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250110-1?refcode=em20250110-1&refcode2=27_181023_2n-LnN&akid=27%2E181023%2E2n-LnN)
Along the way, we’re being reminded of what makes our people great. Michiganders are tough, resilient, and always full of hope. **Above all, there’s not a single thing we can't do if we do it together.**
**[To be part of this movement and continue our conversations across Michigan, will you make a contribution of $5, $15, $25, or whatever you can right now to support Jocelyn Benson’s work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250110-1?refcode=em20250110-1&refcode2=27_181023_2n-LnN&akid=27%2E181023%2E2n-LnN)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250110-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250110-1&refcode2=27_181023_2n-LnN&akid=27%2E181023%2E2n-LnN)**
We’re so glad to see so many of you out there on the road!
With gratitude,
Team Benson

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=27%2E181023%2E2n-LnN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_2024/?t=3&akid=27%2E181023%2E2n-LnN)

Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO BOX 21368,
Detroit, MI 48221
PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
clean_body: Here’s how our community conversations are going: Team, Secretary Benson is committed to being a true public servant — that means hearing and addressing the concerns of everyone in the great state of Michigan. That’s why she’s been criss-crossing the state to hold even more Community Conversations and having face-to-face talks with people from Ann Arbor to Kalamazoo, Canton to Downriver. Along the way, we’re being reminded of what makes our people great. Michiganders are tough, resilient, and always full of hope. Above all, there’s not a single thing we can't do if we do it together. We’re so glad to see so many of you out there on the road! With gratitude, Team Benson

name: Matthew Davis, LCV
subject: Make your voice heard: Sign this petition to tell the new Congress to refuse attempts to undo climate protections
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE5ODY2NjAS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjE0MDE0MDIwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
If you or your loved ones are affected by the wildfires in California, we hope
you’re staying safe. This is just the latest example of how the climate crisis
devastates our communities — the time for action is now. Peter — With 2025 in full swing, we at LCV are prepared for whatever this year has in
store. While there are many unknowns, one thing is for sure: With new
anti-environmental leadership in Congress and President Trump about to take
office, climate solutions will be under attack. President-elect Trump has called climate change a hoax and told oil companies
he’ll do their bidding. He has promised to slash protections for clean air and
water, undermine investments in electric vehicles and clean energy, and weaken
the federal programs that help keep families safe from extreme weather. We must
organize and fight back. Make your voice heard: Sign the petition and tell the new Congress to stand up against attempts to dismantle climate protections. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/NvbyBGea9Nf~ We are deeply concerned about attacks on our climate, clean air, and water. Already,the climate crisis is fueling more and more extreme weather, with devastating
consequences for communities across the country — most recently from the
wildfires in Southern California — and the science points to even more
catastrophic impacts if we fail to stop Trump and his extreme allies in Congress
from aggressively increasing dirty energy production, opening up public lands
for drilling, and eliminating clean energy projects. That’s why LCV stands firmly behind climate and health policies, from cutting
dangerous pollution to accelerating the country’s transition to clean energy,
all while boosting the economy, creating jobs, saving on families’ energy bills,
and investing in local communities. Now is not the time to turn our backs on the problem. When President Trump joins with polluters in attacking climate solutions, we
need you with us. Undoing these popular climate policies will compromise the
health and safety of our communities, hurt the economy, inflate energy prices,
leave us more vulnerable to increasingly intense and frequent extreme weather
events, and jeopardize our nation’s ability to achieve our climate goals. The human, financial, and infrastructure costs of extreme weather events are a
painful reminder of the urgent work that still needs to be done to tackle the
climate crisis. We cannot reverse course now. We refuse to let polluters and their allies define our futures. Sign your name today and tell the new Congress that under no circumstances will we allow them to strip away climate protections and clean energy investments. https://links.messages.lcv. Onward, Matthew Davis
Vice President of Federal Policy
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: How I plan to strengthen our majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We are on defense this cycle because we have the majority, and more Republican Senators are up for re-election than Democrats. | [](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=7893e78caff64fdcb23fd37b5cefb68c&_e=rTP29I5vDkDV_eGzAw-tlVsuX7jgOoyXCyCWRUVRfpmyKI7dodSYtmAWUwYlPxOmsHLJFauccsdCOKkAUvwCBj8YDGt6t3feoy7OH_LoKTD_7ORPmdUlnZxvLc3rQJ5-vbtpqc5mvUnWNYimdbdtylIZ_tAfgOOaDChwQ7MOc6qqDzXj91OEx7pgs-5LimD8zobkXVFXF0skNCPPp2MIiyYPDTIXXu064Qv12BfRxu4WTet-aeqp5AN2AfSu0WjRbkCevkqFM6l8QywJ1kVkYSotQzsBOQUYN2x378HsDR2cUbXsy4yuy_64DMDD4SVBTVB3e3OxO4x7Cvwj-_wDPoHMfEGGK5FMz5WbOqvLeWXrEz-cd-XcdrwqgPdGj8uJva0yVNxDoJB_Xdrn-xos7mtEo-QxLlXGWFXgfyxrp9c7vgK0_V8xWBWR905aGK48)

Hello fellow American, my name is Tim Scott.

I am a Republican United States Senator from South Carolina and the recently elected Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee.

Before I move forward, thank you for all your hard work this past election cycle. Former Chairman Daines devised an expert strategy to take back the Senate, and we have him to thank for our new Republican Majority.

Senate Republicans could not have regained the majority without your generous donations and steadfast support of Chairman Daines' plans.

_Fellow American, thank you for standing with Republican Senators and President Trump to Make America Great Again in 2024._

**But the fight for the American Dream and our bright future is far from won.** Radical liberals still threaten our way of life every single day with their dangerous ideas and destructive policies.

Thanks to your efforts, our Republican majority can stand for our liberties and defend the American Dream against destructive liberal policies.

Senate Republicans are enthusiastic and motivated to get to work for the American people. I look forward to working with President Trump to support Americans in achieving their unique versions of the American Dream.

We can stop radical Democrats from destroying the American Dream and dooming this great country we love dearly, [**_but only if we work together to win FIVE competitive U.S. Senate races in 2026._**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=7893e78caff64fdcb23fd37b5cefb68c&_e=rTP29I5vDkDV_eGzAw-tlVsuX7jgOoyXCyCWRUVRfpmyKI7dodSYtmAWUwYlPxOmsHLJFauccsdCOKkAUvwCBj8YDGt6t3feoy7OH_LoKTD_7ORPmdUlnZxvLc3rQJ5-vbtpqc5mvUnWNYimdbdtylIZ_tAfgOOaDChwQ7MOc6qqDzXj91OEx7pgs-5LimD8zobkXVFXF0skNCPPp2MIiyYPDTIXXu064Qv12BfRxu4WTet-aeqp5AN2AfSu0WjRbkCevkqFM6l8QywJ1kVkYSotQzsBOQUYN2x378HsDR1QePMdVLWsdTFUDxRNK4KEq5NKjVh05be0uB7yjcdq-3giusr-Ee_t83t6ZIc1Tg15UfhoteNmTaY17qsvn5uq8XtL7AF5KL6D0t1swdcj-BesT5C6HYV-jSpEU1ZPlU6TWcbgP7hfoDpsuDxSyo2y)

**Lean -Democrat:**
**Minnesota**

**Toss-Ups:**
**Michigan**
**Georgia**
**Maine**
**North Carolina**
We must help Republican incumbents defend their seats in competitive races in Maine and North Carolina and support our GOP challengers in Minnesota, Michigan, and Georgia to pick up three more seats and strengthen our Senate majority.

**These seats are CRITICAL as we are on defense this election with 20 GOP Senators defending seats while only 13 Democrats are defending seats.**

We are more than capable of defending and EXPANDING our majority, but only if we hit the ground running and continue to progress in closing the Democrats' fundraising advantage.

We could lose our Senate majority if Democrats build on their fundraising advantage - it's up to us to stand up to their dangerous ideas and failed agenda. Generations of Americans yet to come are counting on us to step up now.

[**Please pitch in as much as you can today to support our NRSC campaign to expand our GOP majority by winning these competitive races.**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=7893e78caff64fdcb23fd37b5cefb68c&_e=rTP29I5vDkDV_eGzAw-tlVsuX7jgOoyXCyCWRUVRfpmyKI7dodSYtmAWUwYlPxOmsHLJFauccsdCOKkAUvwCBj8YDGt6t3feoy7OH_LoKTD_7ORPmdUlnZxvLc3rQJ5-vbtpqc5mvUnWNYimdbdtylIZ_tAfgOOaDChwQ7MOc6qqDzXj91OEx7pgs-5LimD8zobkXVFXF0skNCPPp2MIiyYPDTIXXu064Qv12BfRxu4WTet-aeqp5AN2AfSu0WjRbkCevkqFM6l8QywJ1kVkYSotQzsBOQUYN2x378HsDR2YaTmAkhZT6V2UwVEHBPRkCZWPLBlQf1eeHw8_Tnuv1-BwkFtjKeUj_5L1I1-PH_BKNig2Z4y00uDvIkYahchtrxfTyeljEM6mIbgOzoEJNxXOS9Y-JTqENDtlefRaVgcJ8t7UuKpDOfH43G0oySUk)

Thank you,

Senator Tim Scott

Chairman, National Republican Senatorial Committee

[**EXPAND OUR SENATE MAJORITY »**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=7893e78caff64fdcb23fd37b5cefb68c&_e=rTP29I5vDkDV_eGzAw-tlVsuX7jgOoyXCyCWRUVRfpmyKI7dodSYtmAWUwYlPxOmsHLJFauccsdCOKkAUvwCBj8YDGt6t3feoy7OH_LoKTD_7ORPmdUlnZxvLc3rQJ5-vbtpqc5mvUnWNYimdbdtylIZ_tAfgOOaDChwQ7MOc6qqDzXj91OEx7pgs-5LimD8zobkXVFXF0skNCPPp2MIiyYPDTIXXu064Qv12BfRxu4WTet-aeqp5AN2AfSu0WjRbkCevkqFM6l8QywJ1kVkYSotQzsBOQUYN2x378HsDR1Q0aEZSfchLMX6arN5Gvbtjm2i9vrVP2rJso6EIK9fGSM-poLz3GcDB_FdvFD_Hajo656DO7VvavOCFEctqSFAdRKXo7HvZ8OGIAr1Mip1VT8rU1EPBnyruxft4lGNR1kwZxn2ACmNXhEpZFHXGpMh)

That work starts with new voices in Congress like Yassamin! In order for Congress to truly be a representation of our society, we have to support and elevate young leaders like Yass who are fighting for tangible action on the climate crisis, working to hold corporations accountable, and ensuring that everyday costs aren’t hurting our pockets. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = — Team Yass Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States ** | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Less than a week from getting the keys to my office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
It’s time to end scam credit repair.
#
**I just introduced my first bill in Congress, less than a week from getting the keys to my office!** I’m proud to become the _first_ freshman Democrat to introduce legislation in this new Congress.
My new bipartisan bill — the **Ending Scam Credit Repair Act** (ESCRA) — will crack down on scammers in the so-called “credit repair” industry.
For too long, the credit repair industry has been scamming Delawareans and folks across the county with low credit scores by promising easy credit fixes. They exploit legal loopholes to target cash-trapped people, charging large upfront fees based on false hopes of debt reduction.
**ESCRA will ban upfront fees, improve transparency, and enhance consumer protections** — eliminating the loopholes that have allowed these predatory practices to flourish.
[**It’s time to end scam credit repair. But I need your help to build broad support for this bill right now. Can you pitch in $5 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250110-1?refcode=em20250110-1684&amount=5&refcode2=1684_21716_FkTa6a&akid=1684%2E21716%2EFkTa6a)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250110-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250110-1684&refcode2=1684_21716_FkTa6a&akid=1684%2E21716%2EFkTa6a)**
I promised Delaware and this grassroots team that I’d hit the ground running by bringing Democrats and Republicans together to find bipartisan solutions for working people — and with your support, that’s exactly what I’m doing.
Thank you!
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250110-1&t=1&refcode2=1684_21716_FkTa6a&akid=1684%2E21716%2EFkTa6a)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1684%2E21716%2EFkTa6a)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1684%2E21716%2EFkTa6a)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1684%2E21716%2EFkTa6a)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

| Peter,

Donald Trump is coming back to the White House, and this time, he’s bringing his ultra-wealthy buddies with him to transform the face of Washington.

**If the Senate confirms Trump's extremely unqualified nominees, the upcoming administration's total wealth could reach over $380 billion!**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100214553/522030834/-1565964854?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-01-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0Zjk1NDEyLWE5Y2YtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WP1GUBFggL6RBSxeKKgEMpexTKqBIsGUjQXWd_KHC2k=)
Under Trump’s new American oligarchy, it’s clear that the only qualifications required are unwavering loyalty to the MAGA movement and a whole lot of money.

We won’t let Trump and his cronies get away with using their money to drown out the voices of everyday Americans. _That’s why we’re working to lay the foundation to flip the House and Senate in 2026!_

**Enough is enough, Peter**. It’s time to stand up and fight back so we can get the influence of big money out of politics and deliver for hard-working Americans.

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Fwd: URGENT: PLEASE BRING SUPPLIES TO BLESS VICTIMS OF THE WILDFIRES
body:
| | | This is Sean-- I wanted to make sure you saw the email below. Tomorrow we are holding An Appeal to Heaven For California. We want to be the hands and feet of Jesus, and minister to and bless those impacted by the devastating wild fires. Here is a list of the critical supplies we are gathering: socks, toiletries, trash bags, bottled water and laundry detergent. name: Team Vasquez
subject: Demanding accountability
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=bqmEco9qQO3awjCLvKu2RBwHPiwan2lTJvg5hPM13Fp6X8bTIyv7p%2FGJYcJ6i9j3CzV4NXZ5%2FQpdiNyc%2FVqxn7QNComUBrCIUcBVKsRoaGxkR4Rd%2B6Y7S%2BobRGdIIhkFrJndJ4pgiawzKNprhoCKqTKcdrV1Ajrc%2FTWvnRfO7LPFlQl8D3n5PwdrWnK7Ax6TB%2B%2Ftypw22j2SPa%2FfGL0tUKtwIUhApV7FWP%2BVInqokfWMYTZyh7sPFycKaVZTgdcFmmCiw4%2BlwZpHnEyZxZDAGKu4hKk1laJ1RXmFTNnGZSmlJ1FHw7pwzA5BeHRyr0lEcx%2F3nPlLrofFRSkSoTdSLKbz2kwUDG9BKUuo0mbshejOsGrTHbZ6fg14%2Fr%2BxmwFF%2BQixormUUoKN8BOOPk5htG6dngDO%2FZA36GgTnzKHJ3Y%3D)
---
| |
---
Hey there, it's Team Vasquez. In recent years, we’ve seen just how devastating Republican leadership in Congress has been — in more ways than one. From failing to fulfill even the most basic functions of government to actively cutting critical services that millions of Americans rely on, Congressional Republicans have forgotten who they were elected to serve: _the American people._ We’re circulating a petition to send them a clear reminder of this, and need to know you’re on our side. | | **Sen. Katie Britt praises advancement of Laken Riley Act**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=5839a0b33e2b4213b16d1371e4136105&_e=Lb6Ac_DFE9fsjbHzs5rgF1-3P4pzLtmhVTyr9l4NiE25ozHABu5-dIhKnr7EAbrxgZ_pTva6D4F7FBtnGpTYkpytGu76MJJVko61l2F-QXems9AOiPozPIG-enDZYCSIjECGqMmdwddBjoB8IJrNDBh_sh2XUKetyq9gF5rd_xnmdSAN_D88_xZuVKEDZFhCkOK_4uhFcaqnh-rB5-bnNmwGmV0bLgcbkru74_mT8aPi8sgiAJgNf4oKOF0Zgc6I_U6W9dqfEWD-zBfypLDwnFHb7GqfFx2JNm2nqKiq95s%3D)
---
U.S. Sen. Katie Britt, R-Ala., praised the advancement of the Laken Riley Act on Thursday.

The Senate voted 84-9 to move the bill forward on the eve of what would have been Riley’s 23rd birthday.

“Today’s vote on the Laken Riley Act is an important step forward in making our country safer, but there’s still more work to be done to get this commonsense legislation across the finish line,” Britt said. “Laken’s horrific murder should never have happened. While we cannot bring Laken back, Congress can and must pass the Laken Riley Act to save American lives and prevent this tragedy from repeating itself. Congress has an obligation to Laken, her family, and to Americans in every corner of our country to get this bill passed and signed into law.”
---

[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=5839a0b33e2b4213b16d1371e4136105&_e=Lb6Ac_DFE9fsjbHzs5rgF9m-zXYRtrZylAbz2fB2JziZwGD1UdCEBoYR6IepFoL6-K8z1J85VKhv5v9hETDOZCZiW-nmYa48E5866Q-0Ic7tnyUdu8DsFNDCfUIa6YCtGAfwqWJ4p0q5D_qowysYkbUX2O5ND0VYBkun1fw0vso7tH4FJ0FOH1UaSgn8S4hESMRpelcnMyW6IVkPPmXo8HDFcyK3vvoEGksKy0P0wYq5XiL_HiEHvnOGHszirRAsxnjr_lxBWiwnb2YdtD8Fd9XWD7km5P7jg1yxHPPZvCGSzFoA9BEEf-Ysfn9UkLZW)
---
U.S. Senator Katie Britt has been named deputy whip for the Senate.

Britt, who was first elected to office in 2023, was named by new Majority Whip Sen. John Barrasso, of Wyoming. As deputy whip, Britt will be one of 10 Senators to back up Barrasso as part of the Republican majority to push President Donald Trump’s agenda through.

“I am honored Senator Barrasso chose me to join his team as one of the deputy whips. Our new Senate Republican majority has a tremendous opportunity to get things done and enact President Trump’s agenda. As deputy whip, I am excited to help unite our conference and make a difference in the lives of hardworking Americans,” Britt said in a statement.

U.S. Senators Katie Britt, Tommy Tuberville and Senate colleagues introduced the bipartisan Sunshine Protection Act to officially “lock the clock” and end the twice-yearly time change to make Daylight Saving Time the national year-round standard.

Britt released the following statement regarding the bill:

“The American people are tired of the antiquated practice of ‘falling back’ every year. Alabamians want more sunshine, and it’s better for our mental and physical health. With the Sunshine Protection Act we would make daylight savings time permanent. I appreciate Senator Rick Scott’s leadership in working to ‘lock the clock.’”
---

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | Sen. Katie Britt praises advancement of Laken Riley Act U.S. Sen. Katie Britt, R-Ala., praised the advancement of the Laken Riley Act on Thursday. The Senate voted 84-9 to move the bill forward on the eve of what would have been Riley’s 23rd birthday. “Today’s vote on the Laken Riley Act is an important step forward in making our country safer, but there’s still more work to be done to get this commonsense legislation across the finish line,” Britt said. “Laken’s horrific murder should never have happened. While we cannot bring Laken back, Congress can and must pass the Laken Riley Act to save American lives and prevent this tragedy from repeating itself. Congress has an obligation to Laken, her family, and to Americans in every corner of our country to get this bill passed and signed into law.” | | Alabama Sen. Katie Britt named deputy whip for Republican-controlled Senate U.S. Senator Katie Britt has been named deputy whip for the Senate. Britt, who was first elected to office in 2023, was named by new Majority Whip Sen. John Barrasso, of Wyoming. As deputy whip, Britt will be one of 10 Senators to back up Barrasso as part of the Republican majority to push President Donald Trump’s agenda through. “I am honored Senator Barrasso chose me to join his team as one of the deputy whips. Our new Senate Republican majority has a tremendous opportunity to get things done and enact President Trump’s agenda. As deputy whip, I am excited to help unite our conference and make a difference in the lives of hardworking Americans,” Britt said in a statement. | | Senator Katie Britt introduces bill to "Lock the Clock" U.S. Senators Katie Britt, Tommy Tuberville and Senate colleagues introduced the bipartisan Sunshine Protection Act to officially “lock the clock” and end the twice-yearly time change to make Daylight Saving Time the national year-round standard. Britt released the following statement regarding the bill: “The American people are tired of the antiquated practice of ‘falling back’ every year. Alabamians want more sunshine, and it’s better for our mental and physical health. With the Sunshine Protection Act we would make daylight savings time permanent. clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | = Peter, with the 119th Congress sworn in and the Presidential inauguration just days away, we here at Georgia HQ are pulling all the stops to prepare for the Republican trifecta in Washington and whatever it throws our way. Be it attacks on our fundamental rights or the rest of their dangerous MAGA agenda, we’re ready to push back against the incoming Trump administration’s attempts to undermine our progress, but we need your support to make it happen. Grassroots monthly contributions are exactly the type of support that allows us to plan out our budget with confidence, develop infrastructure for our voter outreach plans early, and lay the groundwork for success in the coming months. = | | = | = | = | = | = — Georgia HQ | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. |

**BREAKING: Republicans on the NC Supreme Court BLOCK certification of Democratic incumbent’s election**
* * *

We’re sounding the alarm, friend.

The 5-2 GOP majority on North Carolina’s Supreme Court just _blocked_ certification in a Supreme Court race that concluded over 2 months ago.

Democratic incumbent Allison Riggs held a 734 vote lead over her GOP challenger after the polls closed. **But then, Republicans launched a legal challenge to throw out over 60,000 votes for "irregularities”.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100215051/522032177/38783912?refcode=em-1.10.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjRlYjEyMC1hZGNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6slqlFW6hBzbnM5vMx2MwRtJ_eFZIc2dCEE2xRtrp4o=)
This is as blatant as it gets, folks. And this attempt to silence voters requires our IMMEDIATE attention.

name: Powered By People
subject: Mike Johnson is an extreme Republican who wants to roll back the clock on progress in our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Last Friday, Republican Mike Johnson was elected Speaker of the House. Mike Johnson:
❌ Wants to strip women of reproductive rights and freedom
❌ Voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act in 2017
❌ Supported Trump’s xenophobic and racist Muslim Ban
❌ Opposes LGBTQ rights and opposes same-sex marriage
**Mike Johnson is an extreme Republican who wants to roll back the clock on progress in our country.** With Trump returning to the White House in just 10 days, we need the resources to organize to fight back against this oppressive new Republican regime in the House, Senate, and Oval Office.
We can’t resign to cynicism. We know that these next few years will be difficult but we must recommit ourselves to the fight for a brighter Texas and country for all.
[**Can you make a contribution today to support our organizing efforts so we can fight back against extreme Republicans like Mike Johnson and Donald Trump?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250110.G2OFgU&refcode=ema20250110-239942&t=1&akid=239942%2E444211%2Ez9eIxt)

Thank you for all that you do,
Team Powered by People
